question_en: A company plans to use an Amazon Snowball Edge device to transfer files to the AWS Cloud. Which activities related to a Snowball Edge device are available to the company at no cost?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃使用 Amazon Snowball Edge 裝置將檔案傳輸到 AWS 雲端。哪些與 Snowball Edge 裝置相關的活動可供公司免費使用？ 【選項】

A.en: Use of the Snowball Edge appliance for a 10-day period
A.zh: 使用 Snowball Edge 裝置 10 天

B.en: The transfer of data out of Amazon S3 and to the Snowball Edge appliance
B.zh: 將資料從 Amazon S3 傳輸到 Snowball Edge 設備

C.en: The transfer of data from the Snowball Edge appliance into Amazon S3
C.zh: 將資料從 Snowball Edge 裝置傳輸到 Amazon S3

D.en: Daily use of the Snowball Edge appliance after 10 days
D.zh: 10 天後 Snowball Edge 裝置的日常使用情況

question_en: A company has deployed applications on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to assess application vulnerabilities and must identify infrastructure deployments that do not meet best practices. Which AWS service can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司已在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署了應用程式。公司需要評估應用程式漏洞，並且必須識別不符合最佳實踐的基礎架構部署。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a centralized group of users with large file storage requirements that have exceeded the space available on premises. The company wants to extend its file storage capabilities for this group while retaining the performance benefit of sharing content locally. What is the MOST operationally efficient AWS solution for this scenario?
question_zh: 一家公司擁有一組集中的用戶，他們對大文件儲存的需求已經超出了公司內部可用的空間。該公司希望為該群體擴展其文件儲存功能，同時保留本地共享內容的效能優勢。對於這種情況，最具操作效率的 AWS 解決方案是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for each user. Mount each bucket by using an S3 file system mounting utility.
A.zh: 為每個使用者建立一個 Amazon S3 儲存桶。使用 S3 檔案系統掛載公用程式掛載每個儲存桶。

B.en: Configure and deploy an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway. Connect each user’s workstation to the file gateway.
B.zh: 配置並部署 AWS Storage Gateway 檔案閘道。將每個使用者的工作站連接到檔案閘道。

C.en: Move each user’s working environment to Amazon WorkSpaces. Set up an Amazon WorkDocs account for each user.
C.zh: 將每個使用者的工作環境移至 Amazon WorkSpaces 。為每個使用者設定一個 Amazon WorkDocs 帳戶。

D.en: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance and attach an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS volume. Share the EBS volume directly with the users.
D.zh: 部署 Amazon EC2 執行個體並附加 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 預先配置 IOPS 磁碟區。直接與使用者共用 EBS 磁碟區。

question_en: According to security best practices, how should an Amazon EC2 instance be given access to an Amazon S3 bucket?
question_zh: 根據安全最佳實踐，應如何授予 Amazon EC2 執行個體對 Amazon S3 儲存桶的存取權限？ 【選項】

A.en: Hard code an IAM user’s secret key and access key directly in the application, and upload the file.
A.zh: 直接在應用程式中硬編碼 IAM 使用者的密鑰和存取密鑰，然後上傳檔案。

B.en: Store the IAM user’s secret key and access key in a text file on the EC2 instance, read the keys, then upload the file.
B.zh: 將 IAM 使用者的密鑰和存取密鑰儲存在 EC2 執行個體上的文字檔案中，讀取密鑰，然後上傳檔案。

C.en: Have the EC2 instance assume a role to obtain the privileges to upload the file.
C.zh: 讓 EC2 執行個體承擔一個角色以取得上傳檔案的權限。

D.en: Modify the S3 bucket policy so that any service can upload to it at any time.
D.zh: 修改 S3 儲存桶策略，以便任何服務都可以隨時上傳到其中。

question_en: Which option is a customer responsibility when using Amazon DynamoDB under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model?
question_zh: 在 AWS 共享責任模型下使用 Amazon DynamoDB 時，哪個選項是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

D.en: Encryption of data at rest in DynamoDB
D.zh: DynamoDB 中的靜態資料加密

question_en: Which option is a perspective that includes foundational capabilities of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)?
question_zh: 哪個選項是包含 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 基礎功能的觀點？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is running and managing its own Docker environment on Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants an alternative to help manage cluster size, scheduling, and environment maintenance. Which AWS service meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上運作和管理自己的 Docker 環境。該公司希望找到一種替代方案來幫助管理叢集規模、 調度和環境維護。哪些 AWS 服務符合這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run a NoSQL database on Amazon EC2 instances. Which task is the responsibility of AWS in this scenario?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 NoSQL 資料庫。在這種情況下， AWS 負責哪一項任務？ 【選項】

A.en: Update the guest operating system of the EC2 instances.
A.zh: 更新 EC2 執行個體的客戶作業系統。

B.en: Maintain high availability at the database layer.
B.zh: 保持資料庫層的高可用性。

C.en: Patch the physical infrastructure that hosts the EC2 instances.
C.zh: 修補託管 EC2 執行個體的實體基礎架構。

question_en: Which AWS services or tools can identify rightsizing opportunities for Amazon EC2 instances? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或工具可以辨識 Amazon EC2 執行個體的適當規模機會？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are benefits of using AWS Trusted Advisor? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 的好處？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

C.en: Detecting underutilized resources to save costs
C.zh: 檢測未充分利用的資源以節省成本

D.en: Improving security by proactively monitoring the AWS environment
D.zh: 透過主動監控 AWS 環境來提高安全性

E.en: Implementing enforced tagging across AWS resources
E.zh: 跨 AWS 資源實施強制標記

question_en: Which of the following is an advantage that users experience when they move on-premises workloads to the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是使用者將本地工作負載遷移到 AWS 雲端時所體驗到的優勢？ 【選項】

A.en: Elimination of expenses for running and maintaining data centers
A.zh: 消除運作和維護資料中心的費用

B.en: Price discounts that are identical to discounts from hardware providers
B.zh: 與硬體供應商的折扣相同的價格折扣

C.en: Distribution of all operational controls to AWS
C.zh: 將所有營運控制分發給 AWS

question_en: A company wants to manage deployed IT services and govern its infrastructure as code (IaC) templates. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望管理已部署的 IT 服務並治理其基礎架構即程式碼 (IaC) 範本。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool helps users visualize, understand, and manage spending and usage over time?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以幫助使用者直覺地了解和管理一段時間內的支出和使用情況？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is using a central data platform to manage multiple types of data for its customers. The company wants to use AWS services to discover, transform, and visualize the data. Which combination of AWS services should the company use to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用中央資料平台為其客戶管理多種類型的資料。該公司希望使用 AWS 服務來發現、 轉換和視覺化資料。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

E.zh: Amazon Quantum Ledger 資料庫 (Amazon QLDB)

question_en: A global company wants to migrate its third-party applications to the AWS Cloud. The company wants help from a global team of experts to complete the migration faster and more reliably in accordance with AWS internal best practices. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家全球性公司希望將其第三方應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望獲得全球專家團隊的協助，以 AWS 內部最佳實踐更快、 更可靠地完成遷移。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: An e-learning platform needs to run an application for 2 months each year. The application will be deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. Any application downtime during those 2 months must be avoided. Which EC2 purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一個電子學習平台每年需要運行一個應用程式 2 個月。該應用程式將部署在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。必須避免這兩個月內任何應用程式停機。哪種 EC2 購買選項能夠最經濟高效地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A developer wants to deploy an application quickly on AWS without manually creating the required resources. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 開發人員希望在 AWS 上快速部署應用程序，而無需手動建立所需的資源。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is storing sensitive customer data in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company wants to protect the data from accidental deletion or overwriting. Which S3 feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將敏感的客戶資料儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。該公司希望保護資料免於意外刪除或覆蓋。公司應該使用哪個 S3 功能來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service provides the ability to manage infrastructure as code?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務提供將基礎架構作為程式碼進行管理的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: An online gaming company needs to choose a purchasing option to run its Amazon EC2 instances for 1 year. The web traffic is consistent, and any increases in traffic are predictable. The EC2 instances must be online and available without any disruption. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家線上遊戲公司需要選擇一種購買方式來運行其 Amazon EC2 執行個體 1 年。網路流量是一致的，並且任何流量的增加都是可以預測的。 EC2 執行個體必須在線且可用，不會出現任何中斷。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature allows a user to establish a dedicated network connection between a company’s on-premises data center and the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能可讓使用者在公司本地資料中心和 AWS 雲端之間建立專用網路連線？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is a physical location of the AWS global infrastructure?
question_zh: 哪個選項是 AWS 全球基礎設施的實體位置？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to protect its AWS Cloud information, systems, and assets while performing risk assessment and mitigation tasks. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework is supported by these goals?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在執行風險評估和緩解任務的同時保護其 AWS 雲端資訊、 系統和資產。這些目標支援 AWS 完善架構框架的哪個支柱？ 【選項】

question_en: What is the purpose of having an internet gateway within a VPC?
question_zh: 在 VPC 內設立網際網路閘道的目的為何？ 【選項】

A.en: To create a VPN connection to the VPC
A.zh: 建立與 VPC 的 VPN 連接

B.en: To allow communication between the VPC and the internet
B.zh: 允許 VPC 與互聯網之間的通信

C.en: To impose bandwidth constraints on internet traffic
C.zh: 對網路流量施加頻寬限制

D.en: To load balance traffic from the internet across Amazon EC2 instances
D.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間對來自網際網路的流量進行負載平衡

question_en: A company is running a monolithic on-premises application that does not scale and is difficult to maintain. The company has a plan to migrate the application to AWS and divide the application into microservices. Which best practice of the AWS Well-Architected Framework is the company following with this plan?
question_zh: 一家公司正在運行一個單一的內部部署應用程序，該應用程式無法擴展且難以維護。該公司計劃將應用程式遷移到 AWS ，並將應用程式劃分為微服務。公司在製定計劃時遵循了 AWS 完善架構框架的哪種最佳實踐？ 【選項】

A.en: Integrate functional testing as part of AWS deployment.
A.zh: 將功能測試作為 AWS 部署的一部分進行整合。

B.zh: 使用自動化來部署變更。

C.en: Deploy the application to multiple locations.
C.zh: 將應用程式部署到多個位置。

D.zh: 實現鬆散耦合的依賴關係。

question_en: A company has an AWS account. The company wants to audit its password and access key rotation details for compliance purposes. Which AWS service or tool will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個 AWS 帳戶。該公司希望審核其密碼並存取金鑰輪換詳細資訊以達到合規目的。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to receive a notification when a specific AWS cost threshold is reached. Which AWS services or tools can the company use to meet this requirement? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望在達到特定的 AWS 成本閾值時收到通知。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務或工具來滿足此要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: Which AWS service or resource provides answers to the most frequently asked security-related questions that AWS receives from its users?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以解答 AWS 使用者最常提出的安全相關問題？ 【選項】

question_en: Which tasks are customer responsibilities, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些任務屬於客戶責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Configure the AWS provided security group firewall.
A.zh: 設定 AWS 提供的安全群組防火牆。

B.en: Classify company assets in the AWS Cloud.
B.zh: 將 AWS 雲端中的公司資產分類。

C.en: Determine which Availability Zones to use for Amazon S3 buckets.
C.zh: 確定要用於 Amazon S3 儲存桶的可用區域。

E.en: Select Amazon EC2 instances to run AWS Lambda on.
E.zh: 選擇要執行 AWS Lambda 的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

question_en: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 完善架構框架的支柱？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature is used to send both text and email messages from distributed applications?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能可用於從分散式應用程式傳送文字和電子郵件訊息？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單電子郵件服務 (Amazon SES)

D.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: A user needs programmatic access to AWS resources through the AWS CLI or the AWS API. Which option will provide the user with the appropriate access?
question_zh: 使用者需要透過 AWS CLI 或 AWS API 以程式設計方式存取 AWS 資源。哪個選項將為使用者提供適當的存取權限？ 【選項】

D.en: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys
D.zh: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰

question_en: A company runs thousands of simultaneous simulations using AWS Batch. Each simulation is stateless, is fault tolerant, and runs for up to 3 hours. Which pricing model enables the company to optimize costs and meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Batch 同時運行數千個模擬。每次模擬都是無狀態的、 具有容錯能力，並且運行時間最長為 3 小時。哪一種定價模式能讓公司優化成本並滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: What does the concept of agility mean in AWS Cloud computing? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 敏捷性概念在 AWS 雲端運算中意味著什麼？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: The speed at which AWS resources are implemented

B.en: The speed at which AWS creates new AWS Regions
B.zh: AWS 建立新 AWS 區域的速度

E.en: The low cost of entry into cloud computing
E.zh: 進入雲端運算的成本低

question_en: A company needs to block SQL injection attacks. Which AWS service or feature can meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要阻止 SQL 注入攻擊。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature identifies whether an Amazon S3 bucket or an IAM role has been shared with an external entity?
question_zh: 哪一個 AWS 服務或功能可以識別 Amazon S3 儲存桶或 IAM 角色是否已與外部實體共用？ 【選項】

question_en: A cloud practitioner needs to obtain AWS compliance reports before migrating an environment to the AWS Cloud. How can these reports be generated?
question_zh: 雲端從業人員在將環境遷移到 AWS 雲端之前需要取得 AWS 合規性報告。這些報告如何產生？ 【選項】

A.zh: 聯絡 AWS 合規性團隊。

B.en: Download the reports from AWS Artifact.
B.zh: 從 AWS Artifact 下載報告。

C.en: Open a case with AWS Support.
C.zh: 向 AWS Support 提交案例。

D.en: Generate the reports with Amazon Macie.
D.zh: 使用 Amazon Macie 產生報告。

question_en: An ecommerce company has migrated its IT infrastructure from an on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. Which cost is the company’s direct responsibility?
question_zh: 一家電子商務公司已將其 IT 基礎設施從本地資料中心遷移到 AWS 雲端。哪些成本是公司直接承擔的？ 【選項】

B.en: Cost of the hardware infrastructure on AWS
B.zh: AWS 硬體基礎架構的成本

C.en: Cost of power for the AWS servers
C.zh: AWS 伺服器的電力成本

D.en: Cost of physical security for the AWS data center
D.zh: AWS 資料中心的實體安全成本

question_en: A company is setting up AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) on an AWS account. Which recommendation complies with IAM security best practices?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 帳戶上設定 AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM) 。哪項建議符合 IAM 安全最佳實務？ 【選項】

A.en: Use the account root user access keys for administrative tasks.
A.zh: 使用帳戶根使用者存取金鑰執行管理任務。

B.en: Grant broad permissions so that all company employees can access the resources they need.
B.zh: 授予廣泛的權限，以便所有公司員工都可以存取他們需要的資源。

C.en: Turn on multi-factor authentication (MFA) for added security during the login process.
C.zh: 開啟多重身份驗證 (MFA) 以在登入過程中增加安全性。

D.en: Avoid rotating credentials to prevent issues in production applications.
D.zh: 避免輪換憑證以防止生產應用程式中出現問題。

question_en: Elasticity in the AWS Cloud refers to which of the following? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 雲中的彈性是指下列哪一項？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: How quickly an Amazon EC2 instance can be restarted
A.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體重新啟動速度有多快

B.en: The ability to rightsize resources as demand shifts
B.zh: 根據需求變化調整資源的能力

C.en: The maximum amount of RAM an Amazon EC2 instance can use
C.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體可以使用的最大 RAM 量

E.en: How easily resources can be procured when they are needed
E.zh: 在需要時如何輕鬆採購資源

question_en: Which service enables customers to audit API calls in their AWS accounts?
question_zh: 哪項服務允許客戶審核其 AWS 帳戶中的 API 呼叫？ 【選項】

question_en: What is a customer responsibility when using AWS Lambda according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，使用 AWS Lambda 時客戶的責任是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Managing the code within the Lambda function
A.zh: 管理 Lambda 函數內的程式碼

B.en: Confirming that the hardware is working in the data center
B.zh: 確認硬體在資料中心正常運作

D.en: Shutting down Lambda functions when they are no longer in use
D.zh: 當 Lambda 函數不再使用時將其關閉

question_en: A company has 5 TB of data stored in Amazon S3. The company plans to occasionally run queries on the data for analysis. Which AWS service should the company use to run these queries in the MOST cost-effective manner?
question_zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 中儲存了 5 TB 的資料。該公司計劃偶爾對數據進行查詢以進行分析。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務以最具成本效益的方式來執行這些查詢？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can be used at no additional cost?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務可以免費使用？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capability belongs to the people perspective?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 功能屬於人員視角？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to make an upfront commitment for continued use of its production Amazon EC2 instances in exchange for a reduced overall cost. Which pricing options meet these requirements with the LOWEST cost? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望預先承諾繼續使用其生產 Amazon EC2 實例，以換取降低的整體成本。哪些定價選項能夠以最低的成本滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises relational databases to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to use infrastructure as close to its current geographical location as possible. Which AWS service or resource should the company use to select its Amazon RDS deployment area?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其本地關聯式資料庫遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望使用盡可能靠近其當前地理位置的基礎設施。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或資源來選擇其 Amazon RDS 部署區域？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is exploring the use of the AWS Cloud, and needs to create a cost estimate for a project before the infrastructure is provisioned. Which AWS service or feature can be used to estimate costs before deployment?
question_zh: 一家公司正在探索使用 AWS 雲，並且需要在配置基礎架構之前為專案建立成本估算。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可用於部署前估算成本？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is building an application that needs to deliver images and videos globally with minimal latency. Which approach can the company use to accomplish this in a cost effective manner?
question_zh: 一家公司正在建立一個應用程序，需要以最小的延遲在全球範圍內傳輸圖像和視訊。公司可以採用哪種方法以經濟有效的方式實現這一目標？ 【選項】

A.en: Deliver the content through Amazon CloudFront.
A.zh: 透過 Amazon CloudFront 傳遞內容。

B.en: Store the content on Amazon S3 and enable S3 cross-region replication.
B.zh: 將內容儲存在 Amazon S3 上並啟用 S3 跨區域複製。

C.en: Implement a VPN across multiple AWS Regions.
C.zh: 跨多個 AWS 區域實作 VPN 。

D.en: Deliver the content through AWS PrivateLink.
D.zh: 透過 AWS PrivateLink 傳遞內容。

question_en: Which option is a benefit of the economies of scale based on the advantages of cloud computing?
question_zh: 哪一種選擇是基於雲端運算優勢的規模經濟效益？ 【選項】

A.en: The ability to trade variable expense for fixed expense
A.zh: 用變動費用換取固定費用的能力

C.en: Lower variable costs over fixed costs
C.zh: 變動成本低於固定成本

D.en: Increased operational costs across data centers
D.zh: 資料中心的營運成本增加

question_en: Which of the following is a software development framework that a company can use to define cloud resources as code and provision the resources through AWS CloudFormation?
question_zh: 下列哪一個是公司可以用來將雲端資源定義為程式碼並透過 AWS CloudFormation 配置資源的軟體開發框架？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 雲端開發工具包 (AWS CDK)

question_en: A company is developing an application that uses multiple AWS services. The application needs to use temporary, limited-privilege credentials for authentication with other AWS APIs. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these authentication requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在開發一款使用多種 AWS 服務的應用程式。應用程式需要使用臨時的、 權限有限的憑證來與其他 AWS API 進行身份驗證。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些身分驗證要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 安全性令牌服務 (AWS STS)

question_en: Which AWS service is a cloud security posture management (CSPM) service that aggregates alerts from various AWS services and partner products in a standardized format?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務是雲端安全態勢管理 (CSPM) 服務，它以標準化格式匯總來自各種 AWS 服務和合作夥伴產品的警報？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is always provided at no charge?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務總是免費提供？ 【選項】

question_en: To reduce costs, a company is planning to migrate a NoSQL database to AWS. Which AWS service is fully managed and can automatically scale throughput capacity to meet database workload demands?
question_zh: 為了降低成本，一家公司計劃將 NoSQL 資料庫遷移到 AWS 。哪種 AWS 服務是完全託管的並且可以自動擴展吞吐容量以滿足資料庫工作負載需求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is using Amazon DynamoDB. Which task is the company’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon DynamoDB 。根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是公司的責任？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a test AWS environment. A company is planning on testing an application within AWS. The application testing can be interrupted and does not need to run continuously. Which Amazon EC2 purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個測試 AWS 環境。一家公司計劃在 AWS 中測試一款應用程式。應用程式測試可以中斷，不需要連續運行。哪種 Amazon EC2 購買選項能夠最經濟高效地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service gives users the ability to discover and protect sensitive data that is stored in Amazon S3 buckets?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可讓使用者發現和保護儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中的敏感資料？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following services can be used to block network traffic to an instance? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪一種服務可用於阻止到實例的網路流量？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) flow logs
B.zh: Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) 流程日誌

question_en: Which AWS service can identify when an Amazon EC2 instance was terminated?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以辨識 Amazon EC2 執行個體何時終止？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is a fully managed MySQL-compatible database?
question_zh: 下列哪一個是完全託管的 MySQL 相容資料庫？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service supports a hybrid architecture that gives users the ability to extend AWS infrastructure, AWS services, APIs, and tools to data centers, co-location environments, or on-premises facilities?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務支援混合架構，使用戶能夠將 AWS 基礎架構、 AWS 服務、 API 和工具擴展到資料中心、 主機託管環境或本地設施？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can run a managed PostgreSQL database that provides online transaction processing (OLTP)?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以運行提供線上事務處理 (OLTP) 的託管 PostgreSQL 資料庫？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to provide managed Windows virtual desktops and applications to its remote employees over secure network connections. Which AWS services can the company use to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過安全的網路連線向其遠端員工提供託管的 Windows 虛擬桌面和應用程式。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

E.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: A company wants to monitor for misconfigured security groups that are allowing unrestricted access to specific ports. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要監控允許不受限制地存取特定連接埠的錯誤配置的安全性群組。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is a key-value database that provides sub-millisecond latency on a large scale?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務是可大規模提供亞毫秒延遲的鍵值資料庫？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is deploying a machine learning (ML) research project that will require a lot of compute power over several months. The ML processing jobs do not need to run at specific times. Which Amazon EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements at the lowest cost?
question_zh: 一家公司正在部署一項機器學習 (ML) 研究項目，該項目需要幾個月的大量運算能力。 ML 處理作業不需要在特定時間執行。哪種 Amazon EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠以最低的成本滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services or features provide disaster recovery solutions for Amazon EC2 instances? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能為 Amazon EC2 執行個體提供災難復原解決方案？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

C.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots
C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 快照

question_en: Which AWS service provides command line access to AWS tools and resources directly from a web browser?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務提供直接從 Web 瀏覽器對 AWS 工具和資源的命令列存取？ 【選項】

question_en: A network engineer needs to build a hybrid cloud architecture connecting on-premises networks to the AWS Cloud using AWS Direct Connect. The company has a few VPCs in a single AWS Region and expects to increase the number of VPCs to hundreds over time. Which AWS service or feature should the engineer use to simplify and scale this connectivity as the VPCs increase in number?
question_zh: 網路工程師需要建立一個混合雲架構，使用 AWS Direct Connect 將本機網路連接到 AWS 雲端。該公司在單一 AWS 區域中擁有幾個 VPC ，並預計隨著時間的推移將 VPC 的數量增加到數百個。隨著 VPC 數量的增加，工程師應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來簡化和擴展此連接？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to assess its operational readiness. It also wants to identify and mitigate any operational risks ahead of a new product launch. Which AWS Support plan offers guidance and support for this kind of event at no additional charge?
question_zh: 一家公司想要評估其營運準備。該公司還希望在新產品發布之前識別並減輕任何營運風險。哪個 AWS Support 計劃免費提供此類事件的指導和支援？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to establish a schedule for rotating database user credentials. Which AWS service will support this requirement with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司想要製定一個輪換資料庫使用者憑證的時間表。哪種 AWS 服務能夠以最少的營運開銷支援這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature can be used to create a private connection between an on-premises workload and an AWS Cloud workload?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能可用於在本機工作負載和 AWS 雲端工作負載之間建立私有連線？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is used to provide encryption for Amazon EBS?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務用於為 Amazon EBS 提供加密？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to manage its AWS Cloud resources through a web interface. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過 Web 介面管理其 AWS 雲端資源。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are advantages of the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 雲端的優勢？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Trade variable expenses for capital expenses
A.zh: 用變動費用換取資本費用

C.zh: 幾分鐘內即可在全球推出

D.zh: 專注於管理硬體基礎設施

question_en: Which AWS Cloud benefit is shown by an architecture’s ability to withstand failures with minimal downtime?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 雲優勢體現在架構能夠以最少的停機時間承受故障？ 【選項】

question_en: A developer needs to maintain a development environment infrastructure and a production environment infrastructure in a repeatable fashion. Which AWS service should the developer use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 開發人員需要以可重複的方式維護開發環境基礎設施和生產環境基礎設施。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is the customer’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Maintain the security of the AWS Cloud.
A.zh: 維護 AWS 雲端的安全性。

C.en: Patch the operating system of Amazon RDS instances.
C.zh: 修補 Amazon RDS 執行個體的作業系統。

question_en: Which AWS service helps deliver highly available applications with fast failover for multi-Region and Multi-AZ architectures?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務有助於為多區域和多可用區架構提供具有快速故障轉移功能的高可用性應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a set of ecommerce applications. The applications need to be able to send messages to each other. Which AWS service meets this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司有一套電子商務應用程式。應用程式需要能夠相互發送訊息。哪一項 AWS 服務符合此要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: What are the benefits of consolidated billing for AWS Cloud services? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 雲端服務整合計費有哪些好處？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: A minimal additional fee for use
B.zh: 最低限度的額外使用費

C.zh: 一張帳單可管理多個帳戶

E.en: Custom cost and usage budget creation
E.zh: 自訂成本和使用預算創建

question_en: A user wants to review all Amazon S3 buckets with ACLs and S3 bucket policies in the S3 console. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 使用者想要在 S3 控制台中查看所有具有 ACL 和 S3 儲存桶策略的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
C.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: What is the best resource for a user to find compliance-related information and reports about AWS?
question_zh: 使用者查找有關 AWS 合規性資訊和報告的最佳資源是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service enables companies to deploy an application close to end users?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許公司將應用程式部署到靠近最終用戶的地方？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature improves network performance by sending traffic through the AWS worldwide network infrastructure?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務或功能透過 AWS 全球網路基礎設施發送流量來提升網路效能？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service provides highly durable object storage?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務提供高度持久的物件儲存？ 【選項】

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: Which responsibility belongs to AWS when a company hosts its databases on Amazon EC2 instances?
question_zh: 當公司將其資料庫託管在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上時， AWS 承擔哪些責任？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are advantages of moving to the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是遷移到 AWS 雲端的優勢？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: The ability to turn over the responsibility for all security to AWS.
A.zh: 將所有安全責任移交給 AWS 的能力。

B.en: The ability to use the pay-as-you-go model.
B.zh: 使用現收現付模式的能力。

C.en: The ability to have full control over the physical infrastructure.
C.zh: 完全控制實體基礎設施的能力。

D.en: No longer having to guess what capacity will be required.
D.zh: 不再需要猜測需要什麼容量。

E.en: No longer worrying about users access controls.
E.zh: 不再擔心使用者存取控制。

question_en: Which AWS service is a hybrid cloud storage service that provides on-premises users access to virtually unlimited cloud storage?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務是混合雲端儲存服務，可為本機使用者提供幾乎無限的雲端儲存存取權限？ 【選項】

D.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company plans to migrate to AWS and wants to create cost estimates for its AWS use cases. Which AWS service or tool can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃遷移到 AWS ，並希望為其 AWS 用例建立成本估算。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which tool should a developer use to integrate AWS service features directly into an application?
question_zh: 開發人員應該使用哪種工具將 AWS 服務功能直接整合到應用程式中？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is a recommended design principle of the AWS Well-Architected Framework?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS Well-Architected Framework 的推薦設計原則？ 【選項】

A.en: Reduce downtime by making infrastructure changes infrequently and in large increments.
A.zh: 透過不頻繁地、 大幅度地改變基礎設施來減少停機時間。

B.en: Invest the time to configure infrastructure manually.
B.zh: 投入時間手動配置基礎架構。

C.en: Learn to improve from operational failures.
C.zh: 從操作失敗中學習改進。

D.en: Use monolithic application design for centralization.
D.zh: 使用單片應用程式設計實現集中化。

question_en: Using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) to grant access only to the resources needed to perform a task is a concept known as:
question_zh: 使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 僅授予執行任務所需資源的存取權限是稱為： 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool can be used to set up a firewall to control traffic going into and coming out of an Amazon VPC subnet?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務或工具可用來設定防火牆來控制進出 Amazon VPC 子網路的流量？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to operate a data warehouse to analyze data without managing the data warehouse infrastructure. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望經營一個資料倉儲來分析數據，但又不管理資料倉儲基礎設施。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: How does AWS Cloud computing help businesses reduce costs? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 雲端運算如何幫助企業降低成本？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: AWS charges the same prices for services in every AWS Region.
A.zh: AWS 對每個 AWS 區域的服務收取相同的價格。

B.en: AWS enables capacity to be adjusted on demand.

C.en: AWS offers discounts for Amazon EC2 instances that remain idle for more than 1 week.
C.zh: AWS 為閒置超過 1 週的 Amazon EC2 執行個體提供折扣。

D.en: AWS does not charge for data sent from the AWS Cloud to the internet.
D.zh: AWS 不會對從 AWS 雲端傳送到網際網路的資料收費。

E.en: AWS eliminates many of the costs of building and maintaining on-premises data centers.
E.zh: AWS 消除了建置和維護本機資料中心的許多成本。

question_en: A company wants to grant users in one AWS account access to resources in another AWS account. The users do not currently have permission to access the resources. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望授予一個 AWS 帳戶中的使用者存取另一個 AWS 帳戶中的資源的權限。使用者目前沒有存取資源的權限。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is the responsibility of AWS when using AWS services?
question_zh: 使用 AWS 服務時 AWS 負責哪一項任務？ 【選項】

B.en: Creation of security group rules for outbound access
B.zh: 建立出站存取的安全群組規則

C.en: Maintenance of physical and environmental controls

D.en: Application of Amazon EC2 operating system patches
D.zh: Amazon EC2 作業系統修補程式的應用

question_en: A company wants to automate infrastructure deployment by using infrastructure as code (IaC). The company wants to scale production stacks so the stacks can be deployed in multiple AWS Regions. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過使用基礎設施即程式碼 (IaC) 來實現基礎設施部署的自動化。該公司希望擴展生產堆疊，以便可以在多個 AWS 區域部署堆疊。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is an AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) platform perspective capability?
question_zh: 哪個選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 平台視角功能？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is running a workload in the AWS Cloud. Which AWS best practice ensures the MOST cost-effective architecture for the workload?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 雲端中運行工作負載。哪種 AWS 最佳實務可確保工作負載最具成本效益的架構？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is using a third-party service to back up 10 TB of data to a tape library. The on-premises backup server is running out of space. The company wants to use AWS services for the backups without changing its existing backup workflows. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用第三方服務將 10 TB 的資料備份到磁帶庫。本地備份伺服器空間不足。該公司希望使用 AWS 服務進行備份，而不會改變其現有的備份工作流程。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

C.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: Which AWS tool gives users the ability to plan their service usage, service costs, and instance reservations, and also allows them to set custom alerts when their costs or usage exceed established thresholds?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 工具可以讓使用者規劃他們的服務使用情況、 服務成本和實例預留，並且還允許他們在成本或使用情況超過既定閾值時設定自訂警報？ 【選項】

question_en: Which tasks are the customer’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些任務是客戶的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

E.zh: 修補 Amazon RDS DB 執行個體。

question_en: A developer has been hired by a large company and needs AWS credentials. Which are security best practices that should be followed? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一名開發人員已被一家大公司聘用，需要 AWS 憑證。應該遵循哪些最佳安全實務？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Grant the developer access to only the AWS resources needed to perform the job.
A.zh: 僅授予開發人員執行作業所需的 AWS 資源的存取權限。

B.en: Share the AWS account root user credentials with the developer.
B.zh: 與開發人員共用 AWS 帳戶根使用者憑證。

C.en: Add the developer to the administrator’s group in AWS IAM.
C.zh: 將開發人員新增至 AWS IAM 中的管理員群組。

D.en: Configure a password policy that ensures the developer’s password cannot be changed.
D.zh: 配置密碼策略，確保開發人員的密碼無法變更。

E.en: Ensure the account password policy requires a minimum length.
E.zh: 確保帳戶密碼原則要求最小長度。

question_en: A company has multiple AWS accounts that include compute workloads that cannot be interrupted. The company wants to obtain billing discounts that are based on the company’s use of AWS services. Which AWS feature or purchasing option will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司擁有多個 AWS 帳戶，其中包含無法中斷的運算工作負載。該公司希望根據公司對 AWS 服務的使用情況獲得帳單折扣。哪些 AWS 功能或購買選項可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A user wants to allow applications running on an Amazon EC2 instance to make calls to other AWS services. The access granted must be secure. Which AWS service or feature should be used?
question_zh: 使用者希望允許在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式呼叫其他 AWS 服務。授予的存取必須是安全的。應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能？ 【選項】

D.zh: IAM 用戶 SSH 金鑰

question_en: A company wants a fully managed Windows file server for its Windows-based applications. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要為其基於 Windows 的應用程式提供完全託管的 Windows 檔案伺服器。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

C.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: A company wants to migrate its NFS on-premises workload to AWS. Which AWS Storage Gateway type should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其 NFS 本地工作負載遷移到 AWS 。公司應該使用哪種 AWS Storage Gateway 類型來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to track the activity in its AWS accounts, and needs to know when an API call is made against its AWS resources. Which AWS tool or service can be used to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要追蹤其 AWS 帳戶中的活動，並需要知道何時對其 AWS 資源進行 API 呼叫。可以使用哪種 AWS 工具或服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has an uninterruptible application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application constantly processes a backlog of files in an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. This usage is expected to continue to grow for years. What is the MOST cost-effective EC2 instance purchasing model to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上運行的不間斷應用程式。該應用程式會不斷處理 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列中的積壓檔案。預計未來幾年這種使用量將持續成長。滿足這些要求的最具成本效益的 EC2 執行個體購買模式是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants an AWS service to provide product recommendations based on its customer data. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望 AWS 服務根據其客戶資料提供產品推薦。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning its migration to the AWS Cloud. The company is identifying its capability gaps by using the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspectives. Which phase of the cloud transformation journey includes these identification activities?
question_zh: 一家公司正在計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司正在利用 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 視角來確定其能力差距。雲端轉型之旅的哪個階段包括這些識別活動？ 【選項】

question_en: A social media company wants to protect its web application from common web exploits such as SQL injections and cross-site scripting. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家社交媒體公司希望保護其網路應用程式免受 SQL 注入和跨站點腳本等常見網路攻擊。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which fully managed AWS service assists with the creation, testing, and management of custom Amazon EC2 images?
question_zh: 哪種完全託管的 AWS 服務可協助建立、 測試和管理自訂 Amazon EC2 映像？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants an automated process to continuously scan its Amazon EC2 instances for software vulnerabilities. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過自動化流程持續掃描其 Amazon EC2 執行個體以尋找軟體漏洞。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to perform data processing once a week that typically takes about 5 hours to complete. Which AWS service should the company use for this workload?
question_zh: 一家公司每週需要進行一次數據處理，通常需要大約 5 個小時才能完成。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來處理這項工作負載？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature provides log information of the inbound and outbound traffic on network interfaces in a VPC?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務或功能提供 VPC 中網路介面的入站和出站流量的日誌資訊？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to design a centralized storage system to manage the configuration data and passwords for its critical business applications. Which AWS service or capability will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司希望設計一個集中式儲存系統來管理其關鍵業務應用程式的配置資料和密碼。哪種 AWS 服務或功能能夠最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS Systems Manager 參數存儲

question_en: A company plans to deploy containers on AWS. The company wants full control of the compute resources that host the containers. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃在 AWS 上部署容器。該公司希望完全控制託管容器的運算資源。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

D.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: Which AWS service or feature allows users to create new AWS accounts, group multiple accounts to organize workflows, and apply policies to groups of accounts?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能可讓使用者建立新的 AWS 帳戶、 將多個帳戶分組以組織工作流程以及將政策套用至帳戶群組？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to store and retrieve files in Amazon S3 for its existing on-premises applications by using industry-standard file system protocols. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用業界標準文件系統協定在 Amazon S3 中為其現有的本機應用程式儲存和檢索文件。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to block SQL injection attacks. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要阻止 SQL 注入攻擊。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants a unified tool to provide a consistent method to interact with AWS services. Which AWS service or tool will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一個統一的工具來提供與 AWS 服務互動的一致方法。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

D.zh: AWS 虛擬私人網路 (AWS VPN)

question_en: A company needs to evaluate its AWS environment and provide best practice recommendations in five categories: cost, performance, service limits, fault tolerance and security. Which AWS service can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要評估其 AWS 環境並在成本、 效能、 服務限制、 容錯和安全性五個類別中提供最佳實踐建議。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which perspective in the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) includes capabilities for configuration management and patch management? AWS
question_zh: 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 中的哪個觀點包括組態管理和修補程式管理功能？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a compute workload that is steady, predictable, and uninterruptible. Which Amazon EC2 instance purchasing options meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司的計算工作量穩定、 可預測且不間斷。哪些 Amazon EC2 執行個體購買選項最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which Amazon EC2 pricing model is the MOST cost efficient for an uninterruptible workload that runs once a year for 24 hours?
question_zh: 對於每年運行一次、 持續 24 小時不間斷的工作負載，哪種 Amazon EC2 定價模型最具成本效益？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is a shared responsibility between AWS and its customers under the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 在 AWS 共享責任模式下，哪一種選項是 AWS 與其客戶之間的共享責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Configuration of Amazon EC2 instance operating systems
A.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體作業系統的配置

B.zh: 應用程式檔案系統伺服器端加密

question_en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises workloads to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to separate workloads for chargeback to different departments. Which AWS services or features will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其本地工作負載遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望將退款工作量劃分給不同的部門。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which task is a responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Enable client-side encryption for objects that are stored in Amazon S3.
A.zh: 為儲存在 Amazon S3 中的物件啟用用戶端加密。

B.en: Configure IAM security policies to comply with the principle of least privilege.
B.zh: 配置 IAM 安全性原則以遵守最小特權原則。

C.en: Patch the guest operating system on an Amazon EC2 instance.
C.zh: 修補 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的客戶作業系統。

D.en: Apply updates to the Nitro Hypervisor.
D.zh: 將更新套用到 Nitro Hypervisor 。

question_en: Which option is a benefit of using AWS for cloud computing?
question_zh: 哪一種選擇是使用 AWS 進行雲端運算的好處？ 【選項】

A.en: Trade variable expense for fixed expense
A.zh: 用變動費用換取固定費用

D.en: Spending money running and maintaining data centers
D.zh: 花費資金來運作和維護資料中心

question_en: Which option is an AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) business perspective capability?
question_zh: 哪個選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 業務視角能力？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is assessing its AWS Business Support plan to determine if the plan still meets the company’s needs. The company is considering switching to AWS Enterprise Support. Which additional benefit will the company receive with AWS Enterprise Support?
question_zh: 一家公司正在評估其 AWS 商業支援計劃，以確定該計劃是否仍滿足公司的需求。該公司正在考慮轉向 AWS 企業支援。公司透過 AWS 企業支援還能獲得哪些額外好處？ 【選項】

A.en: A full set of AWS Trusted Advisor checks
A.zh: 全套 AWS Trusted Advisor 檢查

B.en: Phone, email, and chat access to cloud support engineers 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
B.zh: 每週 7 天、 每天 24 小時透過電話、 電子郵件和聊天聯絡雲端支援工程師

C.en: A designated technical account manager (TAM) to assist in monitoring and optimization
C.zh: 指定技術客戶經理 (TAM) 協助監控和優化

D.en: A consultative review and architecture guidance for the company’s applications
D.zh: 為公司應用程式提供諮詢審查和架構指導

question_en: Which pricing model will interrupt a running Amazon EC2 instance if capacity becomes temporarily unavailable?
question_zh: 如果容量暫時無法使用，哪種定價模型會中斷正在執行的 Amazon EC2 執行個體？ 【選項】

question_en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) security perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 安全視角功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run its workload on Amazon EC2 instances for more than 1 year. This workload will run continuously. Which option offers a discounted hourly rate compared to the hourly rate of On-Demand Instances?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行其工作負載超過 1 年。此工作負載將持續運作。與按需實例的小時費率相比，哪種選項可提供折扣小時費率？ 【選項】

C.zh: EC2 執行個體節省計劃

D.zh: Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 執行個體

question_en: Which characteristic of the AWS Cloud helps users eliminate underutilized CPU capacity? AWS
question_zh: 雲端的哪個特性可以幫助使用者消除未充分利用的 CPU 容量？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services can a company use to achieve a loosely coupled architecture? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務來實現鬆散耦合的架構？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: Which AWS Cloud service can send alerts to customers if custom spending thresholds are exceeded?
question_zh: 如果超出自訂支出閾值，哪種 AWS 雲端服務可以向客戶發送警報？ 【選項】

question_en: A company plans to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) to define and track business outcomes as part of its cloud transformation journey. Which AWS CAF governance perspective capability will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望使用 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 來定義和追蹤業務成果，作為其雲端轉型之旅的一部分。哪一種 AWS CAF 治理視角能力能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to quickly and securely move files over long distances between its client and an Amazon S3 bucket. Which S3 feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在其客戶端和 Amazon S3 儲存桶之間快速安全地遠距離行動檔案。哪個 S3 功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to continuously run an experimental workload on an Amazon EC2 instance and stop the instance after 12 hours. Which instance purchasing option will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上持續執行實驗工作負載，並在 12 小時後停止執行個體。哪一種實例購買選項能夠最經濟高效地滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which cloud transformation journey phase of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) focuses on demonstrating how the cloud helps accelerate business outcomes? AWS
question_zh: 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 的哪個雲端轉型之旅階段專注於展示雲端如何協助加速業務成果？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is a customer responsibility under the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 在 AWS 共享責任模式下，哪個選項是客戶責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Maintenance of underlying hardware of Amazon EC2 instances
A.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體底層硬體的維護

question_en: A company wants its Amazon EC2 instances to operate in a highly available environment, even if there is a natural disaster in a particular geographic area. Which approach will achieve this goal?
question_zh: 一家公司希望其 Amazon EC2 執行個體能夠在高度可用的環境中運行，即使特定地理區域發生自然災害。哪種方法可以實現這個目標？ 【選項】

A.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions.
A.zh: 在多個 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple Amazon CloudFront locations.
B.zh: 在多個 Amazon CloudFront 位置使用 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations.
C.zh: 在多個邊緣位置使用 EC2 執行個體。

D.en: Use EC2 instances in AWS Local Zones.
D.zh: 在 AWS 本地區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。

question_en: A company wants to modernize and convert a monolithic application into microservices. The company wants to move the application to AWS. Which migration strategy should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將單體應用程式現代化並轉換為微服務。該公司希望將應用程式遷移到 AWS 。公司該採用哪種遷移策略？ 【選項】

question_en: A systems administrator created a new IAM user for a developer and assigned the user an access key instead of a user name and password. What is the access key used for?
question_zh: 系統管理員為開發人員建立了一個新的 IAM 用戶，並為該用戶分配了存取金鑰而不是用戶名和密碼。存取密鑰有何用途？ 【選項】

A.en: To access the AWS account as the AWS account root user
A.zh: 以 AWS 帳戶根用戶身分存取 AWS 帳戶

B.en: To access the AWS account through the AWS Management Console
B.zh: 透過 AWS 管理主控台存取 AWS 帳戶

C.en: To access the AWS account through a CLI
C.zh: 透過 CLI 存取 AWS 帳戶

D.en: To access all of a company’s AWS accounts
D.zh: 存取公司的所有 AWS 帳戶

question_en: Which option is an environment that consists of one or more data centers?
question_zh: 哪個選項是由一個或多個資料中心組成的環境？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is moving an on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. The company must migrate 50 petabytes of file storage data to AWS with the least possible operational overhead. Which AWS service or resource should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將本地資料中心遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司必須以盡可能少的營運開銷將 50PB 的文件儲存資料遷移到 AWS 。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或資源來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: A company has an application with robust hardware requirements. The application must be accessed by students who are using lightweight, low-cost laptops. Which AWS service will help the company deploy the application without investing in backend infrastructure or high-end client hardware?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個對硬體要求很高的應用程式。學生必須使用輕便、 低成本的筆記型電腦才能存取該應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務可以幫助公司部署應用程序，而無需投資後端基礎設施或高階客戶硬體？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to query its server logs to gain insights about its customers’ experiences. Which AWS service will store this data MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司希望查詢其伺服器日誌以了解其客戶的體驗。哪種 AWS 服務能夠最經濟有效率地儲存這些資料？ 【選項】

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: Which of the following is a recommended design principle for AWS Cloud architecture?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS 雲端架構的建議設計原則？ 【選項】

B.en: Build a single application component that can handle all the application functionality.
B.zh: 建立一個可以處理所有應用程式功能的單一應用程式元件。

C.en: Make large changes on fewer iterations to reduce chances of failure.
C.zh: 在較少的迭代中進行較大的更改以減少失敗的機會。

D.en: Avoid monolithic architecture by segmenting workloads.
D.zh: 透過分割工作負載來避免單一架構。

question_en: Which AWS service helps users audit API activity across their AWS account?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務可協助使用者審核其 AWS 帳戶中的 API 活動？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is a customer’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Management of the guest operating systems

B.en: Maintenance of the configuration of infrastructure devices
B.zh: 維護基礎設施設備的配置

C.en: Management of the host operating systems and virtualization
C.zh: 主機作業系統和虛擬化的管理

D.en: Maintenance of the software that powers Availability Zones
D.zh: 維護支援可用區域的軟體

question_en: A company wants to automatically add and remove Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants the EC2 instances to adjust to varying workloads dynamically. Which service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望自動新增和刪除 Amazon EC2 執行個體。該公司希望 EC2 執行個體能夠動態調整以適應不同的工作負載。哪些服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon EC2 Spot 執行個體

question_en: A user wants to securely automate the management and rotation of credentials that are shared between applications, while spending the least amount of time on managing tasks. Which AWS service or feature can be used to accomplish this?
question_zh: 使用者希望安全地自動化應用程式之間共享的憑證的管理和輪換，同時花費最少的時間來管理任務。可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來實現此目的？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 金鑰管理服務 (AWS KMS)

question_en: Which security service automatically recognizes and classifies sensitive data or intellectual property on AWS?
question_zh: 哪種安全服務可以自動識別和分類 AWS 上的敏感資料或智慧財產權？ 【選項】

question_en: Which actions are best practices for an AWS account root user? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些操作是 AWS 帳戶根用戶的最佳實務？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Share root user credentials with team members.
A.zh: 與團隊成員共用根使用者憑證。

B.en: Create multiple root users for the account, separated by environment.
B.zh: 為帳戶建立多個根用戶，並依環境分隔。

C.en: Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) on the root user.
C.zh: 對根用戶啟用多重身份驗證 (MFA) 。

D.en: Create an IAM user with administrator privileges for daily administrative tasks, instead of using the root user.
D.zh: 建立具有管理員權限的 IAM 使用者來執行日常管理任務，而不是使用根使用者。

E.en: Use programmatic access instead of the root user and password.
E.zh: 使用程式存取而不是根用戶和密碼。

question_en: A company is running a critical workload on an Amazon RDS DB instance. The company needs the DB instance to be highly available with a recovery time of less than 5 minutes. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon RDS DB 執行個體上執行關鍵工作負載。該公司需要資料庫執行個體具有高可用性，恢復時間少於 5 分鐘。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Create a read replica of the DB instance.
A.zh: 建立資料庫實例的唯讀副本。

B.en: Create a template of the DB instance by using AWS CloudFormation.
B.zh: 使用 AWS CloudFormation 建立資料庫執行個體的範本。

C.en: Take frequent snapshots of the DB instance. Store the snapshots in Amazon S3.
C.zh: 頻繁拍攝資料庫實例的快照。將快照儲存在 Amazon S3 中。

D.en: Modify the DB instance to be a Multi-AZ deployment.
D.zh: 將資料庫執行個體修改為多可用區部署。

question_en: A company plans to migrate its application to AWS and run the application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application will have continuous usage for 1 year. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃將其應用程式遷移到 AWS 並在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行該應用程式。該應用程式將持續使用 1 年。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to transfer data between an Amazon S3 bucket and an on-premises application. Who is responsible for the security of this data, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 Amazon S3 儲存桶和本機應用程式之間傳輸資料。根據 AWS 共享責任模型，誰負責這些資料的安全？ 【選項】

question_en: Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework refers to the ability of a system to recover from infrastructure or service disruptions and dynamically acquire computing resources to meet demand? AWS
question_zh: 完善架構框架的哪個支柱是指系統從基礎架構或服務中斷中復原並動態取得運算資源以滿足需求的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to identify Amazon S3 buckets that are shared with another AWS account. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要識別與另一個 AWS 帳戶共用的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service gives users the ability to build interactive business intelligence dashboards that include machine learning insights?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務可讓使用者建立包含機器學習見解的互動式商業智慧儀表板？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is an AWS value proposition that describes a user’s ability to scale infrastructure based on demand?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS 價值主張，描述了使用者根據需求擴展基礎架構的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: Which action is a security best practice for access to sensitive data that is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket?
question_zh: 哪種操作是存取儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中的敏感資料的最佳實踐？ 【選項】

A.en: Enable S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) on the S3 bucket.
A.zh: 在 S3 儲存桶上啟用 S3 跨區域複製 (CRR) 。

B.en: Use IAM roles for applications that require access to the S3 bucket.
B.zh: 對需要存取 S3 儲存桶的應用程式使用 IAM 角色。

C.en: Configure AWS WAF to prevent unauthorized access to the S3 bucket.
C.zh: 配置 AWS WAF 以防止未經授權存取 S3 儲存桶。

D.en: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to prevent unauthorized access to the S3 bucket.
D.zh: 配置 Amazon GuardDuty 以防止未經授權存取 S3 儲存桶。

question_en: A company wants to know more about the benefits offered by cloud computing. The company wants to understand the operational advantage of agility. How does AWS provide agility for users?
question_zh: 一家公司想了解更多雲端運算帶來的好處。該公司希望了解敏捷性的營運優勢。 AWS 如何為使用者提供敏捷性？ 【選項】

A.en: The ability the ensure high availability by deploying workloads to multiple regions
A.zh: 透過將工作負載部署到多個區域來確保高可用性的能力

B.en: A pay-as-you-go model for many services and resources
B.zh: 多種服務和資源採用現收現付模式

C.en: The ability to transfer infrastructure management to the AWS Cloud
C.zh: 將基礎設施管理轉移到 AWS 雲端的能力

D.en: The ability to provision and deprovision resources quickly with minimal effort
D.zh: 能夠以最少的努力快速配置和取消配置資源

question_en: A company needs a central user portal so that users can log in to third-party business applications that support Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) 2.0. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 公司需要一個中央用戶門戶，以便用戶可以登入支援安全斷言標記語言 (SAML) 2.0 的第三方業務應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
C.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: Which AWS service should users use to learn about AWS service availability and operations?
question_zh: 使用者應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來了解 AWS 服務的可用性和操作？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool can be used to capture information about inbound and outbound traffic in an Amazon VPC?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具可用於擷取 Amazon VPC 中的入站和出站流量的資訊？ 【選項】

question_en: What is the customer ALWAYS responsible for managing, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，客戶始終負責管理什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can be used to retrieve compliance reports on demand?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務可用於按需檢索合規性報表？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service enables users to check for vulnerabilities on Amazon EC2 instances by using predefined assessment templates?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許使用者使用預先定義的評估範本檢查 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的漏洞？ 【選項】

question_en: A company plans to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is gathering information about its on-premises infrastructure and requires information such as the hostname, IP address, and MAC address. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司正在收集有關其內部基礎設施的信息，並需要主機名稱、 IP 位址和 MAC 位址等資訊。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

C.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

D.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: Which action will help increase security in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪些操作將有助於提高 AWS 雲端的安全性？ 【選項】

A.en: Enable programmatic access for all IAM users.
A.zh: 為所有 IAM 使用者啟用編程存取。

B.en: Use IAM users instead of IAM roles to delegate permissions.
B.zh: 使用 IAM 使用者而不是 IAM 角色來委派權限。

C.en: Rotate access keys on a reoccurring basis.

D.en: Use inline policies instead of customer managed policies.
D.zh: 使用內聯策略而不是客戶管理策略。

question_en: A company is planning to migrate its application to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS tool or set of resources should the company use to analyze and assess its readiness for migration?
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃將其應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 工具或資源集來分析和評估其遷移準備？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF)

question_en: Which of the following describes some of the core functionality of Amazon S3?
question_zh: 下列哪一項描述了 Amazon S3 的一些核心功能？ 【選項】

A.en: Amazon S3 is a high-performance block storage service that is designed for use with Amazon EC2.
A.zh: Amazon S3 是一種高效能區塊儲存服務，專為與 Amazon EC2 搭配使用而設計。

B.en: Amazon S3 is an object storage service that provides high-level performance, security, scalability, and data availability.
B.zh: Amazon S3 是一種物件儲存服務，提供高水準的效能、 安全性、 可擴充性和資料可用性。

C.en: Amazon S3 is a fully managed, highly reliable, and scalable file storage system that is accessible over the industry-standard SMB protocol.
C.zh: Amazon S3 是一個完全託管、 高度可靠且可擴展的文件儲存系統，可透過業界標準 SMB 協定存取。

D.en: Amazon S3 is a scalable, fully managed elastic NFS for use with AWS Cloud services and on-premises resources.
D.zh: Amazon S3 是一種可擴充、 完全託管的彈性 NFS ，可與 AWS 雲端服務和本機資源一起使用。

question_en: Which AWS benefit is demonstrated by on-demand technology services that enable companies to replace upfront fixed expenses with variable expenses?
question_zh: 按需技術服務使公司能夠以變動費用取代前期固定費用，這反映了 AWS 的哪項優勢？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services or features enable users to connect on-premises networks to a VPC? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能允許使用者將本機網路連接到 VPC ？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A user needs to quickly deploy a nonrelational database on AWS. The user does not want to manage the underlying hardware or the database software. Which AWS service can be used to accomplish this?
question_zh: 使用者需要在 AWS 上快速部署非關聯式資料庫。使用者不想管理底層硬體或資料庫軟體。可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來實現此目的？ 【選項】

question_en: Which actions are examples of a company’s effort to rightsize its AWS resources to control cloud costs? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些行動是公司努力調整其 AWS 資源以控制雲端成本的例子？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Switch from Amazon RDS to Amazon DynamoDB to accommodate NoSQL datasets.
A.zh: 從 Amazon RDS 切換到 Amazon DynamoDB 以適應 NoSQL 資料集。

B.en: Base the selection of Amazon EC2 instance types on past utilization patterns.
B.zh: 根據過去的使用模式選擇 Amazon EC2 執行個體類型。

C.en: Use Amazon S3 Lifecycle policies to move objects that users access infrequently to lower-cost storage tiers.
C.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 生命週期策略將使用者不經常存取的物件移至成本較低的儲存層。

D.en: Use Multi-AZ deployments for Amazon RDS.
D.zh: 對 Amazon RDS 使用多可用區部署。

E.en: Replace existing Amazon EC2 instances with AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
E.zh: 用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 取代現有的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

question_en: Which AWS service or feature can a company use to apply security rules to specific Amazon EC2 instances?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能將安全性規則套用至特定的 Amazon EC2 執行個體？ 【選項】

question_en: Which design principles support the reliability pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些設計原則支援 AWS 完善架構框架的可靠性支柱？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.zh: 以程式碼形式執行操作。

D.en: Deploy resources globally to improve response time.
D.zh: 在全球範圍內部署資源以提高回應時間。

question_en: A company that uses AWS needs to transfer 2 TB of data. Which type of transfer of that data would result in no cost for the company?
question_zh: 一家使用 AWS 的公司需要傳輸 2 TB 的資料。哪種類型的資料傳輸不會為公司帶來任何成本？ 【選項】

A.en: Inbound data transfer from the internet
A.zh: 來自互聯網的入站資料傳輸

B.en: Outbound data transfer to the internet
B.zh: 向網際網路進行出站資料傳輸

C.zh: AWS 區域之間的資料傳輸

D.zh: 可用區之間的資料傳輸

question_en: A company wants to create templates that the company can reuse to deploy multiple AWS resources. Which AWS service or feature can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望建立可重複使用的範本來部署多個 AWS 資源。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is building an application that requires the ability to send, store, and receive messages between application components. The company has another requirement to process messages in first-in, first-out (FIFO) order. Which AWS service should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司正在建立一個應用程序，該應用程式需要能夠在應用程式元件之間發送、 儲存和接收訊息。該公司還有另一項要求，就是按照先進先出 (FIFO) 的順序處理訊息。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

D.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: Which AWS service or feature is a browser-based, pre-authenticated service that can be launched directly from the AWS Management Console?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務或功能是基於瀏覽器的、 預先驗證的服務，可以直接從 AWS 管理主控台啟動？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its database to a managed AWS service that is compatible with PostgreSQL. Which AWS services will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其資料庫遷移到與 PostgreSQL 相容的託管 AWS 服務。哪些 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company has a fleet of cargo ships. The cargo ships have sensors that collect data at sea, where there is intermittent or no internet connectivity. The company needs to collect, format, and process the data at sea and move the data to AWS later. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司擁有貨船隊。貨船上裝有感測器，可以在海上收集數據，因為海上的網路連線斷斷續續或根本沒有網路連線。該公司需要在海上收集、 格式化和處理數據，然後將數據遷移到 AWS 。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company hosts an application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances. The application uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send messages. Which AWS service or feature will give the application permission to access required AWS services?
question_zh: 一家公司在多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上託管一個應用程式。該應用程式使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 發送訊息。哪一項 AWS 服務或功能將授予應用程式存取所需 AWS 服務的權限？ 【選項】

question_en: A user has limited knowledge of AWS services, but wants to quickly deploy a scalable Node.js application in the AWS Cloud. Which service should be used to deploy the application?
question_zh: 使用者對 AWS 服務的了解有限，但希望在 AWS 雲端中快速部署可擴展的 Node.js 應用程式。應該使用哪種服務來部署應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs a content delivery network that provides secure delivery of data, videos, applications, and APIs to users globally with low latency and high transfer speeds. Which AWS service meets these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要一個內容交付網絡，以低延遲和高傳輸速度向全球用戶安全交付資料、 視訊、 應用程式和 API 。哪些 AWS 服務符合這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to use third-party software for its workload on AWS. Which AWS service or feature can the company use to purchase the software?
question_zh: 一家公司需要使用第三方軟體來處理其在 AWS 上的工作負載。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來購買該軟體？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs fully managed, highly reliable, and scalable file storage that is accessible over the Server Message Block (SMB) protocol. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要完全託管、 高度可靠且可擴展的文件存儲，並且可以透過伺服器訊息區塊 (SMB) 協定存取。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.en: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server
C.zh: 適用於 Windows 檔案伺服器的 Amazon FSx

D.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company needs to centrally configure and manage Amazon VPC security groups across multiple AWS accounts within an organization in AWS Organizations. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 AWS Organizations 中集中配置和管理組織內跨多個 AWS 帳戶的 Amazon VPC 安全群組。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is a responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Configure identity and access management for applications.
A.zh: 為應用程式配置身分和存取管理。

B.en: Manage encryption options for data that is stored on AWS.
B.zh: 管理儲存在 AWS 上的資料的加密選項。

C.en: Configure security groups for Amazon EC2 instances.
C.zh: 為 Amazon EC2 執行個體配置安全性群組。

D.en: Maintain the physical hardware of the infrastructure.
D.zh: 維護基礎設施的實體硬體。

question_en: A company has an Amazon EC2 instance in a private subnet. The company wants to initiate a connection to the internet to pull operating system updates while preventing traffic from the internet from accessing the EC2 instance. Which AWS managed service allows this?
question_zh: 一家公司在私有子網路中有一個 Amazon EC2 執行個體。該公司希望啟動與互聯網的連接以獲取作業系統更新，同時阻止來自互聯網的流量存取 EC2 執行個體。哪個 AWS 託管服務允許這樣做？ 【選項】

question_en: Which actions are the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些行動屬於 AWS 的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: Patching the operating system on Amazon EC2 instances
B.zh: 修補 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的作業系統

C.en: Enforcing a strict password policy for IAM users
C.zh: 對 IAM 使用者實施嚴格的密碼策略

D.en: Patching the operating system on Amazon RDS instances
D.zh: 修補 Amazon RDS 執行個體上的作業系統

E.en: Configuring security groups and network ACLs
E.zh: 設定安全群組和網路 ACL

question_en: A company is storing data that will not be frequently accessed in the AWS Cloud. If the company needs to access the data, the data needs to be retrieved within 12 hours. The company wants a solution that is cost-effective for storage costs for each gigabyte. Which Amazon S3 storage class will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 雲端中儲存不常存取的資料。如果公司需要存取數據，則需要在 12 小時內檢索數據。該公司希望找到每 GB 儲存成本都具有成本效益的解決方案。哪個 Amazon S3 儲存類別可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.en: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)
C.zh: S3 單區 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 單區 -IA ）

D.zh: S3 標準 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 標準 -IA ）

question_en: Which AWS service or resource can be used to identify services that have been used by a user within a specified date range?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務或資源可用於識別使用者在指定日期範圍內所使用過的服務？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon S3 存取控制清單 (ACL)

D.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer
D.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理存取分析器

question_en: A company needs to engage third-party consultants to help maintain and support its AWS environment and the company’s business needs. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要聘請第三方顧問來協助維護和支援其 AWS 環境和公司的業務需求。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to create Amazon QuickSight dashboards every week by using its billing data. Which AWS feature or tool can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望每週使用其帳單資料建立 Amazon QuickSight 儀表板。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 功能或工具來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to move data backups to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to replace on-premises storage with storage that is cloud-based but locally cached. Which AWS service meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃將資料備份遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司需要用基於雲端但本地快取的儲存替換內部儲存。哪些 AWS 服務符合這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to organize its resources and track AWS costs on a detailed level. The company needs to categorize costs by business department, environment, and application. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要組織其資源並詳細追蹤 AWS 成本。公司需要依照業務部門、 環境、 應用程式將成本分類。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Access the AWS Cost Management console to organize resources, set an AWS budget, and receive notifications of unintentional usage.
A.zh: 造訪 AWS 成本管理主控台來組織資源、 設定 AWS 預算並接收意外使用通知。

B.en: Use tags to organize the resources. Activate cost allocation tags to track AWS costs on a detailed level.
B.zh: 使用標籤來組織資源。啟動成本分配標籤以詳細追蹤 AWS 成本。

C.en: Create Amazon CloudWatch dashboards to visually organize and track costs individually.
C.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudWatch 儀表板以直觀地組織和單獨追蹤成本。

D.en: Access the AWS Billing and Cost Management dashboard to organize and track resource consumption on a detailed level.
D.zh: 存取 AWS 計費和成本管理儀表板，以詳細組織和追蹤資源消耗。

question_en: A company needs to plan, schedule, and run hundreds of thousands of computing jobs on AWS. Which AWS service can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 AWS 上規劃、 排程和執行數十萬個運算作業。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: Which AWS services or features provide high availability and low latency by enabling failover across different AWS Regions? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能透過跨不同 AWS 區域啟用故障轉移來提供高可用性和低延遲？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is a way to use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling groups to scale capacity in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 下列哪一種方法是使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組來擴展 AWS 雲端中的容量的方法？ 【選項】

A.en: Scale the number of EC2 instances in or out automatically, based on demand.
A.zh: 根據需求自動擴展或縮減 EC2 執行個體的數量。

B.zh: 使用無伺服器 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Scale the size of EC2 instances up or down automatically, based on demand.
C.zh: 根據需求自動擴大或縮小 EC2 執行個體的大小。

D.en: Transfer unused CPU resources between EC2 instances.
D.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體之間轉移未使用的 CPU 資源。

question_en: Which abilities are benefits of the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些能力是 AWS 雲端的優勢？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Trade variable expenses for capital expenses.
A.zh: 用變動費用換取資本費用。

B.zh: 幾分鐘內即可實現全球部署。

C.en: Plan capacity in advance of deployments.

D.en: Take advantage of economies of scale.

E.zh: 減少對網路連線的依賴。

question_en: Which AWS security service protects applications from distributed denial of service attacks with always-on detection and automatic inline mitigations?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 安全服務透過始終在線偵測和自動內聯緩解來保護應用程式免受分散式阻斷服務攻擊？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS Web 應用程式防火牆 (AWS WAF)

question_en: Which AWS service allows users to model and provision AWS resources using common programming languages?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許使用者使用常見的程式語言對 AWS 資源進行建模和配置？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 雲端開發工具包 (AWS CDK)

question_en: Which Amazon EC2 instance pricing model can provide discounts of up to 90%?
question_zh: 哪種 Amazon EC2 執行個體定價模型可以提供高達 90% 的折扣？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following acts as an instance-level firewall to control inbound and outbound access?
question_zh: 下列哪一項可充當實例級防火牆來控制入站和出站存取？ 【選項】

question_en: A company must be able to develop, test, and launch an application in the AWS Cloud quickly. Which advantage of cloud computing will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司必須能夠在 AWS 雲端中快速開發、 測試和啟動應用程式。雲端運算的哪些優勢可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense
B.zh: 用固定費用代替變動費用

question_en: A company has teams that have different job roles and responsibilities. The company’s employees often change teams. The company needs to manage permissions for the employees so that the permissions are appropriate for the job responsibilities. Which IAM resource should the company use to meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司擁有不同工作角色和職責的團隊。該公司的員工經常更換團隊。公司需要對員工的權限進行管理，以便權限適合工作職責。公司應該使用哪種 IAM 資源來以最少的營運開銷滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: 針對個人使用者的 IAM 策略

question_en: Which AWS service can a company use to securely store and encrypt passwords for a database?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來安全地儲存和加密資料庫密碼？ 【選項】

question_en: What can a cloud practitioner use to retrieve AWS security and compliance documents and submit them as evidence to an auditor or regulator?
question_zh: 雲端從業者可以使用什麼來檢索 AWS 安全性和合規性文件並將其作為證據提交給審計員或監管機構？ 【選項】

question_en: Which encryption types can be used to protect objects at rest in Amazon S3? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些加密類型可用於保護 Amazon S3 中的靜態物件？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3)
A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 託管加密金鑰 (SSE-S3) 進行伺服器端加密

B.en: Server-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (SSE-KMS)
B.zh: 使用 AWS KMS 託管金鑰 (SSE-KMS) 進行伺服器端加密

question_en: A company wants to integrate its online shopping website with social media login credentials. Which AWS service can the company use to make this integration?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其線上購物網站與社交媒體登入憑證整合在一起。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來實現這種整合？ 【選項】

D.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
D.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: Which AWS service is used to track, record, and audit configuration changes made to AWS resources?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務用於追蹤、 記錄和稽核對 AWS 資源所做的配置變更？ 【選項】

question_en: A customer runs an On-Demand Amazon Linux EC2 instance for 3 hours, 5 minutes, and 6 seconds. For how much time will the customer be billed?
question_zh: 一位客戶執行隨選 Amazon Linux EC2 執行個體 3 小時 5 分鐘 6 秒。需要向客戶收取多久的費用？ 【選項】

question_en: A company website is experiencing DDoS attacks. Which AWS service can help protect the company website against these attacks?
question_zh: 一家公司網站正在遭受 DDoS 攻擊。哪種 AWS 服務可以幫助保護公司網站免受這些攻擊？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants a customized assessment of its current on-premises environment. The company wants to understand its projected running costs in the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望對其當前的內部環境進行客製化評估。該公司希望了解其在 AWS 雲端中的預計營運成本。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company that has multiple business units wants to centrally manage and govern its AWS Cloud environments. The company wants to automate the creation of AWS accounts, apply service control policies (SCPs), and simplify billing processes. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 擁有多個業務部門的公司希望集中管理和管理其 AWS 雲端環境。該公司希望自動建立 AWS 帳戶、 應用程式服務控制策略 (SCP) 並簡化計費流程。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is hosting an application in the AWS Cloud. The company wants to verify that underlying AWS services and general AWS infrastructure are operating normally. Which combination of AWS services can the company use to gather the required information? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 雲端中託管一個應用程式。該公司希望驗證底層 AWS 服務和通用 AWS 基礎架構是否正常運作。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務組合來收集所需的資訊？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 服務運作狀況儀表板

question_en: A company needs to migrate a PostgreSQL database from on-premises to Amazon RDS. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要將 PostgreSQL 資料庫從本地遷移到 Amazon RDS 。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

D.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: Which cloud concept is demonstrated by using AWS Compute Optimizer?
question_zh: 使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 示範了哪種雲端概念？ 【選項】

question_en: A company hosts a large amount of data in AWS. The company wants to identify if any of the data should be considered sensitive. Which AWS service will meet the requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司在 AWS 中託管大量資料。該公司希望確定是否有任何資料應被視為敏感資料。哪一項 AWS 服務可以滿足該要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A user has a stateful workload that will run on Amazon EC2 for the next 3 years. What is the MOST cost-effective pricing model for this workload?
question_zh: 用戶有一個有狀態的工作負載，將在未來 3 年內在 Amazon EC2 上運作。對於這種工作負載來說，最具成本效益的定價模式是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: Who enables encryption of data at rest for Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)?
question_zh: 誰為 Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）啟用靜態資料加密？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 金鑰管理服務 (AWS KMS)

question_en: What can a user accomplish using AWS CloudTrail?
question_zh: 使用者可以使用 AWS CloudTrail 完成什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Generate an IAM user credentials report.
A.zh: 產生 IAM 使用者憑證報告。

B.en: Record API calls made to AWS services.
B.zh: 記錄對 AWS 服務發出的 API 呼叫。

C.en: Assess the compliance of AWS resource configurations with policies and guidelines.
C.zh: 評估 AWS 資源配置是否符合政策和指南。

D.en: Ensure that Amazon EC2 instances are patched with the latest security updates.
D.zh: 確保 Amazon EC2 執行個體已使用最新的安全性更新進行修補。

question_en: A company is planning to host its workloads on AWS. Which AWS service requires the company to update and patch the guest operating system?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃在 AWS 上託管其工作負載。哪一項 AWS 服務要求公司更新和修補客戶作業系統？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature will search for and identify AWS resources that are shared externally?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務或功能將搜尋並識別外部共享的 AWS 資源？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is migrating its workloads to the AWS Cloud. The company must retain full control of patch management for the guest operating systems that host its applications. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將其工作負載遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司必須完全控制承載其應用程式的客戶作業系統的修補程式管理。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: At what support level do users receive access to a support concierge?
question_zh: 用戶在哪個支援等級可以獲得支援禮賓服務？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can a company use to visually design and build serverless applications?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來直觀地設計和建立無伺服器應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate to AWS and use the same security software it uses on premises. The security software vendor offers its security software as a service on AWS. Where can the company purchase the security solution?
question_zh: 一家公司希望遷移到 AWS 並使用其在本地使用的相同的安全軟體。該安全軟體供應商在 AWS 上提供其安全軟體即服務。公司可以在哪裡購買安全解決方案？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 合作夥伴解決方案查找器

question_en: A company has deployed an Amazon EC2 instance. Which option is an AWS responsibility under the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 一家公司部署了一個 Amazon EC2 執行個體。在 AWS 共享責任模型下，哪個選項是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

A.zh: 管理和加密應用程式數據

B.en: Installing updates and security patches of guest operating system
B.zh: 安裝客戶作業系統的更新和安全性補丁

D.en: Configuration of security groups on each instance
D.zh: 每個實例上的安全性群組配置

question_en: A company wants to migrate its PostgreSQL database to AWS. The company does not use the database frequently. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司想要將 PostgreSQL 資料庫遷移到 AWS 。該公司不經常使用該資料庫。哪種 AWS 服務或資源能夠以最少的管理開銷來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: 適用於 PostgreSQL 的 Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 相容版本

D.zh: 亞馬遜 Aurora 無伺服器

question_en: A company is using Amazon DynamoDB for its application database. Which tasks are the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon DynamoDB 作為其應用程式資料庫。根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些任務是 AWS 的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

D.en: Provide public endpoints to store and retrieve data.
D.zh: 提供公共端點來儲存和檢索資料。

E.en: Manage the infrastructure layer and the operating system.
E.zh: 管理基礎設施層和作業系統。

question_en: A company wants to create a globally accessible ecommerce platform for its customers. The company wants to use a highly available and scalable DNS web service to connect users to the platform. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望為其客戶創建一個全球可訪問的電子商務平台。該公司希望使用高度可用且可擴展的 DNS 網路服務將用戶連接到平台。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which maintenance task is the customer’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪項維護任務是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.zh: 可用區之間的實體連接

D.en: Amazon EC2 updates and security patches
D.zh: Amazon EC2 更新與安全性補丁

question_en: A company wants to improve its security posture by reviewing user activity through API calls. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過 API 呼叫審查用戶活動來改善其安全態勢。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is migrating to the AWS Cloud and plans to run experimental workloads for 3 to 6 months on AWS. Which pricing model will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在遷移到 AWS 雲，並計劃在 AWS 上運行 3 到 6 個月的實驗工作負載。哪種定價模式能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Use Savings Plans for a 3-year term.
A.zh: 使用為期 3 年的儲蓄計劃。

question_en: A company that has AWS Enterprise Support is launching a new version of a popular product in 2 months. The company expects a large increase in traffic to its website. The website is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances. Which action should the company take to assess its readiness to scale for this launch?
