question_zh: 擁有 AWS 企業支援的公司將在 2 個月內推出熱門產品的新版本。該公司預計其網站的訪問量將大幅增加。網站託管在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。公司應採取哪些行動來評估其為此次發布擴大規模的準備？ 【選項】

A.en: Replace the EC2 instances with AWS Lambda functions.
A.zh: 用 AWS Lambda 函數取代 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Use AWS Infrastructure Event Management (IEM) support.
B.zh: 使用 AWS 基礎設施事件管理 (IEM) 支援。

C.en: Submit a request on AWS Marketplace to monitor the event.
C.zh: 在 AWS Marketplace 上提交請求來監控事件。

D.en: Review the coverage reports in the AWS Cost Management console.
D.zh: 在 AWS 成本管理主控台中查看覆蓋率報告。

question_en: A company wants to launch multiple workloads on AWS. Each workload is related to a different business unit. The company wants to separate and track costs for each business unit. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 上啟動多個工作負載。每個工作負載都與不同的業務部門相關。該公司希望分離並追蹤每個業務部門的成本。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Use AWS Organizations and create one account for each business unit.
A.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations 並為每個業務部門建立帳戶。

B.en: Use a spreadsheet to control the owners and cost of each resource.
B.zh: 使用電子表格來控制每個資源的所有者和成本。

C.en: Use an Amazon DynamoDB table to record costs for each business unit.
C.zh: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 表格記錄每個業務部門的成本。

D.en: Use the AWS Billing console to assign owners to resources and track costs.
D.zh: 使用 AWS 計費控制台為資源分配所有者並追蹤成本。

question_en: A company wants a time-series database service that makes it easier to store and analyze trillions of events each day. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一種時間序列資料庫服務，以便更輕鬆地儲存和分析每天數萬億個事件。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is a shared control between AWS and the customer, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪個選項是 AWS 和客戶之間的共享控制？ 【選項】

question_en: A company often does not use all of its current Amazon EC2 capacity to run stateless workloads. The company wants to optimize its EC2 costs. Which EC2 instance type will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 本公司通常不會使用其目前的全部 Amazon EC2 容量來運作無狀態工作負載。該公司希望優化其 EC2 成本。哪種 EC2 執行個體類型可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to store data in Amazon S3. The company rarely access the data, and the data can be regenerated if necessary. The company wants to store the data in the most cost-effective storage class. Which S3 storage class will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。公司很少存取這些數據，並且必要時可以重新產生數據。該公司希望將資料儲存在最具成本效益的儲存類別中。哪種 S3 儲存類別可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: S3 標準 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 標準 -IA ）

D.en: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)
D.zh: S3 單區 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 單區 -IA ）

question_en: A company has migrated its workloads to AWS. The company wants to adopt AWS at scale and operate more efficiently and securely. Which AWS service or framework should the company use for operational support?
question_zh: 一家公司已將工作負載遷移至 AWS 。該公司希望大規模採用 AWS ，並更有效率、 更安全地營運。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或框架來提供營運支援？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF)

question_en: A company wants to provision and manage its AWS infrastructure by using the common programming languages Typescript, Python, Java, and.NET. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用常見的程式語言 Typescript 、 Python 、 Java 和 .NET 來配置和管理其 AWS 基礎架構。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 雲端開發工具包 (AWS CDK)

question_en: Which Amazon EC2 pricing model provides the MOST cost savings for an always-up, right-sized database server running for a project that will last 1 year?
question_zh: 對於運行時間長達 1 年的專案且始終處於運行狀態、 大小合適的資料庫伺服器，哪種 Amazon EC2 定價模型可以最大程度地節省成本？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a physical tape library to store data backups. The tape library is running out of space. The company needs to extend the tape library's capacity to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個實體磁帶庫來儲存資料備份。磁帶庫空間不足。該公司需要將磁帶庫的容量擴展到 AWS 雲端。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company is using the AWS Free Tier for several AWS services for an application. What will happen if the Free Tier usage period expires or if the application use exceeds the Free Tier usage limits?
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 免費套餐為應用程式提供多種 AWS 服務。如果免費套餐使用期限到期或應用程式使用超出免費套餐使用限制，會發生什麼情況？ 【選項】

A.en: The company will be charged the standard pay-as-you-go service rates for the usage that exceeds the Free Tier usage.
A.zh: 對於超出免費套餐使用量的部分，公司將按照標準的即用即付服務費率付費。

B.en: AWS Support will contact the company to set up standard service charges.
B.zh: AWS Support 將聯絡該公司來設定標準服務費。

C.en: The company will be charged for the services it consumed during the Free Tier period, plus additional charges for service consumption after the Free Tier period.
C.zh: 本公司將為免費套餐期間使用的服務支付費用，並為免費套餐期後使用的服務支付額外費用。

D.en: The company's AWS account will be frozen and can be restarted after a payment plan is established.
D.zh: 該公司的 AWS 帳戶將被凍結，在製定付款計劃後才能重新啟動。

question_en: A company wants to monitor its workload performance. The company wants to ensure that the cloud services are delivered at a level that meets its business needs. Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspective will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要監控其工作負載表現。該公司希望確保提供的雲端服務能夠滿足其業務需求。哪個 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 視角能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its applications to the AWS Cloud. The company plans to identify and prioritize any business transformation opportunities and evaluate its AWS Cloud readiness. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司計劃識別和優先考慮任何業務轉型機會並評估其 AWS 雲端準備。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF)

question_en: A company need an AWS service that provides a clear baseline of what the company runs in its on-premises data centers. The company needs the projected cost to run its on-premises workloads in the AWS Cloud. What AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要 AWS 服務來為公司在本地資料中心運作的業務提供清晰的基準。該公司需要在 AWS 雲端中運行其本地工作負載的預計成本。哪些 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS Systems Manager 代理程式（ SSM 代理程式）

question_en: A company acquired another corporation. The company now has two AWS accounts. Which AWS service or tool can the company use to consolidate the billing for these two accounts?
question_zh: 一家公司收購了另一家公司。該公司現在有兩個 AWS 帳戶。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來合併這兩個帳戶的帳單？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to set up its workloads to perform their intended functions and recover quickly from failure. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework aligns with these goals?
question_zh: 一家公司希望設定其工作負載來執行其預期功能並從故障中快速恢復。 AWS 完善架構框架的哪個支柱與這些目標相符？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is a managed AWS service that is used specifically for extract, transform, and load (ETL) data?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是專門用於擷取、 轉換和載入 (ETL) 資料的託管 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate petabytes of data from its on-premises data center to AWS. The company does not want to use an internet connection to perform the migration. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將數 PB 的資料從其本地資料中心遷移到 AWS 。該公司不想使用網路連線來執行遷移。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to receive alerts to monitor its overall operating costs for its AWS public cloud infrastructure. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望接收警報來監控其 AWS 公有雲基礎設施的整體營運成本。哪種 AWS 產品能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: How does the AWS Enterprise Support Concierge team help users? AWS
question_zh: 企業支援禮賓團隊如何幫助使用者？ 【選項】

D.en: Answering questions regarding technical support cases
D.zh: 回答有關技術支援案例的問題

question_en: A company wants to run a simulation for 3 years without interruptions. Which Amazon EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司希望連續 3 年運行模擬。哪種 Amazon EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or resource can provide discounts on some AWS service costs in exchange for a spending commitment?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以提供部分 AWS 服務費用折扣以換取支出承諾？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 完善架構框架的支柱？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use Amazon EC2 instances to provide a static website to users all over the world. The company needs to minimize latency for the users. Which solution meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體為世界各地的使用者提供靜態網站。公司需要盡量減少用戶的延遲。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations.
A.zh: 在多個邊緣位置使用 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS Regions.
B.zh: 在相同可用區但不同的 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Use Amazon CloudFront with the EC2 instances configured as the source.
C.zh: 使用將 EC2 執行個體配置為來源的 Amazon CloudFront 。

D.en: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS accounts.
D.zh: 在相同可用區但不同的 AWS 帳戶中使用 EC2 執行個體。

question_en: A team of researchers is going to collect data at remote locations around the world. Many locations do not have internet connectivity. The team needs to capture the data in the field, and transfer it to the AWS Cloud later. Which AWS service will support these requirements?
question_zh: 一個研究小組將在世界各地的偏遠地區收集數據。許多地方沒有網路連線。團隊需要在現場捕獲數據，然後將其傳輸到 AWS 雲端。哪種 AWS 服務將支援這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are benefits that a company receives when it moves an on-premises production workload to AWS? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 當公司將本地生產工作負載遷移到 AWS 時，公司可以獲得下列哪些好處？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: AWS trains the company's staff on the use of all the AWS services.
A.zh: AWS 對公司員工進行所有 AWS 服務的使用訓練。

B.en: AWS manages all security in the cloud.
B.zh: AWS 管理雲端中的所有安全性。

C.en: AWS offers free support from technical account managers (TAMs).
C.zh: AWS 提供技術客戶經理 (TAM) 的免費支援。

question_en: A company has decided to adopt Amazon EC2 infrastructure and wants to scale various stateless services for short-term usage. Which EC2 pricing model is MOST cost-efficient to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司決定採用 Amazon EC2 基礎設施，並希望擴展各種無狀態服務以供短期使用。哪種 EC2 定價模型最具成本效益，可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are benefits of AWS Trusted Advisor? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是 AWS Trusted Advisor 的優點？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Access to Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
A.zh: 存取 Amazon 簡單佇列服務 (Amazon SQS)

C.en: Hourly refresh of the service limit checks
C.zh: 每小時刷新服務限制檢查

E.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) approval management
E.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 核准管理

question_en: A company wants to save costs by archiving data that is no longer frequently accessed by end users. Which Amazon S3 feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過存檔最終用戶不再頻繁存取的資料來節省成本。哪個 Amazon S3 功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which cloud computing advantage is a company applying when it uses AWS Regions to increase application availability to users in different countries?
question_zh: 當公司使用 AWS 區域來提高不同國家 / 地區用戶的應用程式可用性時，它應用了哪種雲端運算優勢？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants an AWS service to collect and process 10 TB of data locally and transfer the data to AWS. The company has intermittent connectivity. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望 AWS 服務在本地收集和處理 10 TB 數據，並將數據傳輸到 AWS 。該公司的連接不穩定。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: Which of the following is an AWS Well-Architected Framework design principle for operational excellence in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 下列何者是 AWS 完善架構框架設計原則，旨在實現 AWS 雲端的卓越營運？ 【選項】

B.zh: 進行頻繁、 小的、 可逆的改變。

C.en: Implement a strong foundation of identity and access management
C.zh: 實施強大的身份和存取管理基礎

D.en: Stop spending money on hardware infrastructure for data center operations.
D.zh: 停止為資料中心營運的硬體基礎設施投入資金。

question_en: What is a benefit of using AWS serverless computing?
question_zh: 使用 AWS 無伺服器運算有什麼好處？ 【選項】

A.en: Application deployment and management are not required.
A.zh: 不需要應用程式部署和管理。

B.en: Application security will be fully managed by AWS.
B.zh: 應用程式安全將完全由 AWS 管理。

C.en: Monitoring and logging are not needed.

D.en: Management of infrastructure is offloaded to AWS.
D.zh: 基礎設施的管理被轉移到 AWS 。

question_en: A developer wants AWS users to access AWS services by using temporary security credentials. Which AWS service or feature should the developer use to provide these credentials?
question_zh: 開發人員希望 AWS 使用者使用臨時安全憑證存取 AWS 服務。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來提供這些憑證？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 安全性令牌服務 (AWS STS)

D.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
D.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: A global company wants to use a managed security service for protection from SQL injection attacks. The service also must provide detailed logging information about access to the company's ecommerce applications. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家跨國公司希望使用託管安全服務來防範 SQL 注入攻擊。該服務還必須提供有關存取公司電子商務應用程式的詳細日誌資訊。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: 適用於 SQL Server 的 Amazon RDS

question_en: A company is migrating its on-premises server to an Amazon EC2 instance. The server must stay active at all times for the next 12 months. Which EC2 pricing option is the MOST cost-effective for the company's workload?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將其本地伺服器遷移到 Amazon EC2 執行個體。伺服器必須在接下來的 12 個月內始終保持活躍。對於公司的工作負載來說，哪種 EC2 定價選項最具成本效益？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is the customer's responsibility under the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS 共享責任模式下客戶的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Maintain the configuration of infrastructure devices.
A.zh: 維護基礎設施設備的配置。

B.en: Maintain patching and updates within the hardware infrastructure.
B.zh: 維護硬體基礎設施內的修補和更新。

C.en: Maintain the configuration of guest operating systems and applications.
C.zh: 維護客戶作業系統和應用程式的配置。

D.zh: 管理涉及加密選項的決策。

question_en: A company wants to verify if multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enabled for all users within its AWS accounts. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要驗證其 AWS 帳戶內的所有使用者是否啟用了多重身份驗證 (MFA) 。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company uses AWS security services and tools. The company needs a service to help manage the security alerts and must organize the alerts into a single dashboard. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 AWS 安全服務和工具。該公司需要一項服務來幫助管理安全警報，並且必須將警報組織到單一儀表板中。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run its workloads in the AWS Cloud effectively, reduce management overhead, and improve processes. Which AWS Well-Architected Framework pillar represents these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 雲端中有效地運行其工作負載、 減少管理開銷並改善流程。哪個 AWS 完善架構框架支柱代表這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company uses Amazon S3 to store records that can contain personally identifiable information (PII). The company wants a solution that can monitor all S3 buckets for PII and immediately alert staff about vulnerabilities. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon S3 來儲存可能包含個人識別資訊 (PII) 的記錄。該公司希望找到一種解決方案，可以監控所有 S3 儲存桶中的 PII ，並立即向員工發出有關漏洞的警報。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service allows users to download security and compliance reports about the AWS infrastructure on demand?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務允許使用者按需下載有關 AWS 基礎架構的安全性和合規性報告？ 【選項】

question_en: An external auditor has requested that a company provide a list of all its IAM users, including the status of users' credentials and access keys. What is the SIMPLEST way to provide this information?
question_zh: 一位外部審計師要求一家公司提供其所有 IAM 使用者的列表，包括使用者憑證和存取金鑰的狀態。提供此資訊最簡單的方法是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Create an IAM user account for the auditor, granting the auditor administrator permissions.
A.zh: 為審計員建立 IAM 使用者帳戶，授予審計員管理員權限。

B.en: Take a screenshot of each user's page in the AWS Management Console, then provide the screenshots to the auditor.
B.zh: 在 AWS 管理主控台中截取每個使用者的頁面螢幕截圖，然後將螢幕截圖提供給審計員。

C.en: Download the IAM credential report, then provide the report to the auditor.
C.zh: 下載 IAM 憑證報告，然後將該報告提供給稽核人員。

D.en: Download the AWS Trusted Advisor report, then provide the report to the auditor.
D.zh: 下載 AWS Trusted Advisor 報告，然後將報告提供給審計員。

question_en: Which task can a company perform by using security groups in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 公司可以使用 AWS 雲端中的安全群組執行哪些任務？ 【選項】

A.en: Allow access to an Amazon EC2 instance through only a specific port.
A.zh: 僅允許透過特定連接埠存取 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Deny access to malicious IP addresses at a subnet level.
B.zh: 在子網路層級拒絕惡意 IP 位址的存取。

C.en: Protect data that is cached by Amazon CloudFront.
C.zh: 保護由 Amazon CloudFront 快取的資料。

D.en: Apply a stateless firewall to an Amazon EC2 instance.
D.zh: 將無狀態防火牆套用於 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

question_en: A company plans to run a compute-intensive workload that uses graphics processing units (GPUs). Which Amazon EC2 instance type should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃運行使用圖形處理單元 (GPU) 的運算密集型工作負載。公司應該使用哪種 Amazon EC2 執行個體類型？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are features of network ACLs as they are used in the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 雲端中使用的網路 ACL 的功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

C.en: They evaluate all rules before allowing traffic.
C.zh: 他們在允許通行之前會評估所有規則。

D.en: They process rules in order, starting with the lowest numbered rule, when deciding whether to allow traffic.
D.zh: 它們按順序處理規則，從編號最低的規則開始，決定是否允許流量。

E.en: They operate at the instance level.

question_en: Which capabilities are in the platform perspective of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 的平台視角包含哪些功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: According to the AWS shared responsibility model, the customer is responsible for applying the latest security updates and patches for which of the following?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，客戶負責為下列哪一項套用最新的安全性更新和修補程式？ 【選項】

question_en: Which Amazon S3 storage class is MOST cost-effective for unknown access patterns?
question_zh: 對於未知存取模式，哪種 Amazon S3 儲存類別最具成本效益？ 【選項】

B.zh: S3 標準 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 標準 -IA ）

C.en: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)
C.zh: S3 單區 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 單區 -IA ）

question_en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) security perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 安全視角功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company has a managed IAM policy that does not grant the necessary permissions for users to accomplish required tasks. How can this be resolved?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個託管的 IAM 策略，該策略沒有授予用戶完成所需任務所需的權限。該如何解決？ 【選項】

B.zh: 建立自訂 IAM 策略。

C.en: Use a third-party web application firewall (WAF) managed rule from the AWS Marketplace.
C.zh: 使用來自 AWS Marketplace 的第三方 Web 應用程式防火牆 (WAF) 託管規則。

D.en: Use AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) to create a customer-managed key.
D.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 建立客戶管理金鑰。

question_en: Who is responsible for managing IAM user access and secret keys according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，誰負責管理 IAM 使用者存取和金鑰？ 【選項】

A.en: IAM access and secret keys are static, so there is no need to rotate them.
A.zh: IAM 存取和金鑰是靜態的，因此無需輪換它們。

B.en: The customer is responsible for rotating keys.

C.en: AWS will rotate the keys whenever required.
C.zh: AWS 將在需要時輪換金鑰。

D.en: The AWS Support team will rotate keys when requested by the customer.
D.zh: 當客戶提出請求時， AWS Support 團隊將輪換金鑰。

question_en: A company needs to run a pre-installed third-party firewall on an Amazon EC2 instance. Which AWS service or feature can provide this solution?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行預先安裝的第三方防火牆。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以提供此解決方案？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud benefit gives a company the ability to quickly deploy cloud resources to access compute, storage, and database infrastructures in a matter of minutes?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 雲端優勢可讓公司在幾分鐘內快速部署雲端資源以存取運算、 儲存和資料庫基礎架構？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is entirely the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，下列哪一項完全是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

B.en: Development of an IAM password policy
B.zh: 制定 IAM 密碼原則

C.en: Patching of the guest operating system

question_en: Which of the following is a characteristic of the AWS account root user?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS 帳戶根用戶的特徵？ 【選項】

A.en: The root user is the only user that can be configured with multi-factor authentication (MFA).
A.zh: 根用戶是唯一可以設定多重身份驗證 (MFA) 的用戶。

B.en: The root user is the only user that can access the AWS Management Console.
B.zh: 根用戶是唯一可以存取 AWS 管理控制台的使用者。

C.en: The root user is the first sign-in identity that is available when an AWS account is created.
C.zh: 根用戶是建立 AWS 帳戶時可用的第一個登入身分。

D.en: The root user has a password that cannot be changed.
D.zh: root 用戶有一個無法更改的密碼。

question_en: An Amazon EC2 instance previously used for development is inaccessible and no longer appears in the AWS Management Console. Which AWS service should be used to determine what action made this EC2 instance inaccessible?
question_zh: 先前用於開發的 Amazon EC2 執行個體無法存取，並且不再出現在 AWS 管理主控台中。應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來決定什麼操作導致此 EC2 執行個體無法存取？ 【選項】

question_en: A company's application developers need to quickly provision and manage AWS services by using scripts. Which AWS offering should the developers use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司的應用程式開發人員需要使用腳本快速配置和管理 AWS 服務。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 產品來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF)

D.zh: AWS Systems Manager 會話管理器

question_en: A company wants to migrate unstructured data to AWS. The data needs to be securely moved with inflight encryption and end-to-end data validation. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將非結構化資料遷移到 AWS 。資料需要透過傳輸中加密和端到端資料驗證來安全地移動。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: A development team wants to deploy multiple test environments for an application in a fast, repeatable manner. Which AWS service should the team use?
question_zh: 開發團隊希望以快速、 可重複的方式為應用程式部署多個測試環境。團隊應該使用哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

D.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: A company wants to quickly implement a continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipeline. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望快速實施持續整合 / 持續交付（ CI/CD ）管道。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud deployment model uses AWS Outposts as part of the application deployment infrastructure?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 雲端部署模型使用 AWS Outposts 作為應用程式部署基礎架構的一部分？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is a fully managed graph database service on AWS?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS 上完全託管的圖形資料庫服務？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service could an administrator use to provide desktop environments for several employees?
question_zh: 管理員可以使用哪種 AWS 服務為多名員工提供桌面環境？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature gives users the ability to capture information about network traffic in a VPC?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能可讓使用者擷取有關 VPC 中的網路流量的資訊？ 【選項】

question_en: Which type of AWS storage is ephemeral and is deleted when an Amazon EC2 instance is stopped or terminated?
question_zh: 哪種類型的 AWS 儲存是暫時的，並且在 Amazon EC2 執行個體停止或終止時會被刪除？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

B.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體儲存

question_en: A company wants to provide access to Windows file shares in AWS from its on-premises workloads. The company does not want to provision any additional infrastructure or applications in its data center. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望從其本地工作負載提供對 AWS 中的 Windows 檔案共享的存取。該公司不想在其數據中心配置任何額外的基礎設施或應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants durable storage for static content and infinitely scalable data storage infrastructure at the lowest cost. Which AWS service should the company choose?
question_zh: 一家公司希望以最低的成本實現靜態內容的持久性儲存和無限可擴展的資料儲存基礎設施。公司應該選擇哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: An ecommerce company wants to use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to add and remove EC2 instances based on CPU utilization. Which AWS service or feature can initiate an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling action to achieve this goal?
question_zh: 一家電子商務公司希望使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 根據 CPU 使用率新增和刪除 EC2 執行個體。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以啟動 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 操作來實現此目標？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: A company wants to transform its workforce by attracting and developing a digitally fluent high-performance workforce. The company wants to attract a diverse and inclusive workforce with appropriate mix of technical and non-technical skills. Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspective will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過吸引和培養一支精通數位技術的高績效員工隊伍來改變其員工隊伍。該公司希望吸引一支多元化、 包容性、 擁有適當技術和非技術技能組合的勞動力。哪個 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 視角能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to move its on-premises databases to managed cloud database services by using a simplified migration process. Which AWS service or tool can help the company meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過簡化的遷移流程將其內部部署資料庫遷移到託管雲端資料庫服務。哪些 AWS 服務或工具可以幫助公司滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

D.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: A company needs a fully managed file server that natively supports Microsoft workloads and file systems. The file server must also support the SMB protocol. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要一個完全託管的文件伺服器，該伺服器原生支援 Microsoft 工作負載和檔案系統。檔案伺服器也必須支援 SMB 協定。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.en: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server
C.zh: 適用於 Windows 檔案伺服器的 Amazon FSx

D.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company has been storing monthly reports in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company exports the report data into comma-separated values (.csv) files. A developer wants to write a simple query that can read all of these files and generate a summary report. Which AWS service or feature should the developer use to meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司一直將月度報告儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。該公司將報告資料匯出為逗號分隔值 (.csv) 檔案。開發人員想要編寫一個簡單的查詢，可以讀取所有這些文件並產生摘要報告。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS feature provides a no-cost platform for AWS users to join community groups, ask questions, find answers, and read community-generated articles about best practices?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 功能為 AWS 使用者提供了一個免費平台，以便他們加入社群團體、 提出問題、 尋找答案以及閱讀社群產生的有關最佳實踐的文章？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to search for text in documents that are stored in Amazon S3. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在儲存在 Amazon S3 中的文件中搜尋文字。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services make use of global edge locations? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務利用全球邊緣站點？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A user needs a relational database but does not have the resources to manage the hardware, resiliency, and replication. Which AWS service option meets the user's requirements?
question_zh: 使用者需要關係資料庫，但沒有資源來管理硬體、 彈性和複製。哪種 AWS 服務選項可以滿足使用者的要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Run MySQL on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS).
A.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 上執行 MySQL 。

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上執行 MySQL 。

C.zh: 選擇 Amazon RDS for MySQL 。

D.zh: 選擇 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 。

question_en: A company needs to deploy applications in the AWS Cloud as quickly as possible. The company also needs to minimize the complexity that is related to the management of AWS resources. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要盡快在 AWS 雲端部署應用程式。該公司還需要盡量減少與 AWS 資源管理相關的複雜性。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which mechanism allows developers to access AWS services from application code?
question_zh: 哪種機制允許開發人員從應用程式程式碼存取 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is migrating to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to understand and identify potential security misconfigurations or unexpected behaviors. The company wants to prioritize any protective controls it might need. Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) security perspective capability will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望了解並識別潛在的安全配置錯誤或意外行為。該公司希望優先考慮可能需要的任何保護控制措施。哪種 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 安全視角功能能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to establish a private network connection between AWS and its corporate network. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 和其公司網路之間建立私人網路連線。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services or features give users the ability to create a network connection between two VPCs? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能允許使用者在兩個 VPC 之間建立網路連線？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service converts text to lifelike voices?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以將文字轉換為逼真的聲音？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use application stacks to run a workload in the AWS Cloud. The company wants to use pre-configured instances. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用應用程式堆疊在 AWS 雲端中運行工作負載。該公司希望使用預先配置的實例。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services are supported by Savings Plans? (Choose two.) Savings Plans
question_zh: 支援哪些 AWS 服務？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool can provide rightsizing recommendations for Amazon EC2 resources at no additional cost?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或工具可以免費提供針對 Amazon EC2 資源的適當規模建議？ 【選項】

question_en: A company operates a petabyte-scale data warehouse to analyze its data. The company wants a solution that will not require manual hardware and software management. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司經營一個 PB 級資料倉儲來分析其資料。該公司希望找到一種不需要手動管理硬體和軟體的解決方案。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A library wants to automate the classification of electronic books based on the contents of the books. Which AWS service should the library use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 圖書館希望根據書籍內容自動對電子書進行分類。圖書館應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is a responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

B.zh: 應用程式使用者的身份驗證

C.zh: 保護實體網路基礎設施

question_en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) cloud transformation journey recommendations? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 雲端轉型之旅建議有哪些選項？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to generate a list of IAM users. The company also wants to view the status of various credentials that are associated with the users, such as password, access keys, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) devices. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要產生一份 IAM 使用者清單。該公司還希望查看與用戶相關的各種憑證的狀態，例如密碼、 存取金鑰和多因素身份驗證 (MFA) 設備。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer
C.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理存取分析器

question_en: A company is designing its AWS workloads so that components can be updated regularly and so that changes can be made in small, reversible increments. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this design support?
question_zh: 一家公司正在設計其 AWS 工作負載，以便可以定期更新組件，並且可以以小的、 可逆的增量進行更改。此設計支援 AWS 完善架構框架的哪個支柱？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to track tags, buckets, and prefixes for its Amazon S3 objects. Which S3 feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要追蹤其 Amazon S3 物件的標籤、 儲存桶和前綴。哪個 S3 功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to allow users to authenticate and authorize multiple AWS accounts by using a single set of credentials. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望允許使用者使用一組憑證對多個 AWS 帳戶進行身份驗證和授權。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
C.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: A company created an Amazon EC2 instance. The company wants to control the incoming and outgoing network traffic at the instance level. Which AWS resource or service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司創建了一個 Amazon EC2 執行個體。該公司希望在實例層級控制傳入和傳出的網路流量。哪些 AWS 資源或服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use the AWS Cloud to deploy an application globally. Which architecture deployment model should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 雲端在全球部署應用程式。公司應該採用哪種架構部署模型來滿足這項需求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants a web application to interact with various AWS services. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望 Web 應用程式能夠與各種 AWS 服務進行互動。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is migrating its applications from on-premises to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to ensure that the applications are assigned only the minimum permissions that are needed to perform all operations. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將其應用程式從本地遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望確保應用程式僅分配執行所有操作所需的最低權限。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) governance perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 治理視角功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務提供單一位置來追蹤應用程式遷移的進度？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

B.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: A company launched an Amazon EC2 instance with the latest Amazon Linux 2 Amazon Machine Image (AMI). Which actions can a system administrator take to connect to the EC2 instance? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司使用最新的 Amazon Linux 2 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI) 啟動了 Amazon EC2 執行個體。系統管理員可以採取哪些操作來連線到 EC2 執行個體？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體連線。

B.en: Use a Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection.
B.zh: 使用遠端桌面協定 (RDP) 連線。

D.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.
D.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Session Manager 。

question_en: Which architecture concept describes the ability to deploy resources on demand and release resources when they are no longer needed?
question_zh: 哪種架構概念描述了按需部署資源以及在不再需要資源時釋放資源的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task requires a user to sign in as the AWS account root user?
question_zh: 哪項任務要求使用者以 AWS 帳戶根使用者身分登入？ 【選項】

B.en: The deletion of an AWS account

C.en: The creation of an organization in AWS Organizations
C.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中建立組織

D.en: The deletion of Amazon EC2 instances
D.zh: 刪除 Amazon EC2 執行個體

question_en: What does the Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class offer? Amazon S3
question_zh: 智慧分層儲存類別提供什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Payment flexibility by reserving storage capacity
A.zh: 透過預留儲存容量實現付款彈性

B.en: Long-term retention of data by copying the data to an encrypted Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume
B.zh: 透過將資料複製到加密的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區來長期保留數據

C.en: Automatic cost savings by moving objects between tiers based on access pattern changes
C.zh: 根據訪問模式的變化在層級之間移動對象，自動節省成本

D.en: Secure, durable, and lowest cost storage for data archival
D.zh: 安全、 耐用且成本最低的資料存檔存儲

question_en: A company needs Amazon EC2 instances for a workload that can tolerate interruptions. Which EC2 instance purchasing option meets this requirement with the LARGEST discount compared to On-Demand prices?
question_zh: 一家公司需要 Amazon EC2 執行個體來處理可以容忍中斷的工作負載。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠滿足此要求，並且與隨選價格相比具有最大的折扣？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to identify measurable business outcomes that will explain the value of the company's decision to migrate. Which phase of the cloud transformation journey includes these activities?
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望確定可衡量的業務成果，以解釋公司遷移決策的價值。雲端轉型之旅的哪個階段包括這些活動？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or component allows inbound traffic from the internet to access a VPC?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 服務或元件允許來自網際網路的入站流量存取 VPC ？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can companies use to create infrastructure from code?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務從程式碼建立基礎架構？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

question_en: Which guideline is a well-architected design principle for building cloud applications?
question_zh: 哪一條準則是建構雲端應用程式的良好架構設計原則？ 【選項】

A.en: Keep static data closer to compute resources.
A.zh: 使靜態資料更接近計算資源。

C.en: Design for automated recovery from failure.
C.zh: 設計用於自動從故障中恢復。

question_en: A company needs to move 75 petabytes of data from its on-premises data centers to AWS. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司需要將 75PB 的資料從其本地資料中心遷移到 AWS 。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來最經濟高效地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS Snowball Edge 儲存最佳化

question_en: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 完善架構框架的支柱？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to connect its on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. The company needs a dedicated, low-latency connection with consistent network performance. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要將其本地資料中心連接到 AWS 雲端。該公司需要專用的、 低延遲的、 具有穩定網路性能的連接。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which design principles should a company apply to AWS Cloud workloads to maximize sustainability and minimize environmental impact? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 公司應將哪些設計原則應用於 AWS 雲端工作負載以最大限度地提高永續性並最大限度地減少對環境的影響？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Maximize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.
A.zh: 最大限度地利用 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Minimize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.
B.zh: 盡量減少 Amazon EC2 執行個體的使用率。

C.zh: 盡量減少託管服務的使用。

D.en: Force frequent application reinstallations by users.
D.zh: 強制使用者頻繁重新安裝應用程式。

E.en: Reduce the need for users to reinstall applications.
E.zh: 減少用戶重新安裝應用程式的需要。

question_en: In which ways does the AWS Cloud offer lower total cost of ownership (TCO) of computing resources than on-premises data centers? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 與本地資料中心相比， AWS 雲端在哪些方面提供更低的運算資源總擁有成本 (TCO) ？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: AWS replaces upfront capital expenditures with pay-as-you-go costs.
A.zh: AWS 以現收現付成本取代前期資本支出。

B.en: AWS is designed for high availability, which eliminates user downtime.
B.zh: AWS 專為高可用性而設計，可消除使用者停機時間。

C.en: AWS eliminates the need for on-premises IT staff.
C.zh: AWS 消除了對本地 IT 人員的需求。

D.en: AWS uses economies of scale to continually reduce prices.
D.zh: AWS 利用規模經濟不斷降低價格。

E.en: AWS offers a single pricing model for Amazon EC2 instances.
E.zh: AWS 為 Amazon EC2 執行個體提供單一定價模型。

question_en: A company wants to deploy some of its resources in the AWS Cloud. To meet regulatory requirements, the data must remain local and on premises. There must be low latency between AWS and the company resources. Which AWS service or feature can be used to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 雲端部署部分資源。為了滿足監管要求，資料必須保留在本地和場所內。 AWS 和公司資源之間的延遲必須較低。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可用於滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following AWS services are serverless? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些 AWS 服務是無伺服器的？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

question_en: When a user wants to utilize their existing per-socket, per-core, or per-virtual machine software licenses for a Microsoft Windows server running on AWS, which Amazon EC2 instance type is required?
question_zh: 當使用者想要將現有的每個插槽、 每個核心或每個虛擬機器軟體授權用於在 AWS 上執行的 Microsoft Windows 伺服器時，需要哪種 Amazon EC2 執行個體類型？ 【選項】

question_en: A solutions architect needs to maintain a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances so that any impaired instances are replaced with new ones. Which AWS service should the solutions architect use?
question_zh: 解決方案架構師需要維護一組 Amazon EC2 執行個體，以便用新執行個體取代任何受損的執行個體。解決方案架構師應該使用哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: Which AWS service provides on-premises applications with low-latency access to data that is stored in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務為本機應用程式提供對儲存在 AWS 雲端中的資料的低延遲存取？ 【選項】

question_en: What does Amazon CloudFront provide? Amazon CloudFront
question_zh: 提供什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Automatic scaling for all resources to power an application from a single unified interface
A.zh: 透過單一統一介面自動擴展所有資源來支援應用程式

B.en: Secure delivery of data, videos, applications, and APIs to users globally with low latency
B.zh: 以低延遲向全球用戶安全交付資料、 影片、 應用程式和 API

C.en: Ability to directly manage traffic globally through a variety of routing types, including latency-based routing, geo DNS, geoproximity, and weighted round robin
C.zh: 能夠透過多種路由類型直接管理全球流量，包括基於延遲的路由、 地理 DNS 、 地理位置鄰近度和加權循環

D.en: Automatic distribution of incoming application traffic across multiple targets, such as Amazon EC2 instances, containers, IP addresses, and AWS Lambda functions
D.zh: 在多個目標（例如 Amazon EC2 執行個體、 容器、 IP 位址和 AWS Lambda 函數）之間自動指派傳入的應用程式流量

question_en: Which AWS service supports the deployment and management of applications in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務支援在 AWS 雲端中部署和管理應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to integrate natural language processing (NLP) into business intelligence (BI) dashboards. The company wants to ask questions and receive answers with relevant visualizations. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將自然語言處理 (NLP) 整合到商業智慧 (BI) 儀表板中。該公司希望提出問題並透過相關的視覺化方式獲得答案。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which Amazon S3 feature or storage class uses the AWS backbone network and edge locations to reduce latencies from the end user to Amazon S3?
question_zh: 哪個 Amazon S3 功能或儲存類別使用 AWS 主幹網路和邊緣位置來減少從最終用戶到 Amazon S3 的延遲？ 【選項】

D.zh: S3 標準 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 標準 -IA ）

question_en: Which AWS service provides the ability to host a NoSQL database in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務提供在 AWS 雲端中託管 NoSQL 資料庫的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is a relational database compatible with MySQL and PostgreSQL?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務是與 MySQL 和 PostgreSQL 相容的關聯式資料庫？ 【選項】

question_en: Which architecture design principle describes the need to isolate failures between dependent components in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪一種架構設計原則描述了隔離 AWS 雲端中依賴元件之間故障的必要性？ 【選項】

C.en: Design for single points of failure.
C.zh: 針對單點故障進行設計。

question_en: Which benefit of cloud computing gives a company the ability to deploy applications to users all over the world through a network of AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and edge locations?
question_zh: 雲端運算的哪項優勢使公司能夠透過 AWS 區域、 可用區和邊緣位置網路向世界各地的使用者部署應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service makes it easier to monitor and troubleshoot application logs and cloud resources?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以更輕鬆地監控和排除應用程式日誌和雲端資源故障？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service uses AWS Compute Optimizer to provide sizing recommendations based on workload metrics?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 根據工作負載指標提供規模建議？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service will help a company plan a migration to AWS by collecting the configuration, usage, and behavior data of on-premises data centers?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務可以透過收集本地資料中心的配置、 使用情況和行為資料來幫助公司規劃向 AWS 的遷移？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

question_en: Which AWS service uses a combination of publishers and subscribers?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務使用發布者和訂閱者的組合？ 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: A company is in the early stages of planning a migration to AWS. The company wants to obtain the monthly predicted total AWS cost of ownership for future Amazon EC2 instances and associated storage. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正處於計劃遷移到 AWS 的早期階段。該公司希望獲得未來 Amazon EC2 執行個體和相關儲存的每月預測總 AWS 擁有成本。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: Which AWS service or tool will monitor AWS resources and applications in real time?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具將即時監控 AWS 資源和應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capability belongs to the business perspective?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 功能屬於業務視角？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS resource can help a company reduce its costs in exchange for a usage commitment when using Amazon EC2 instances?
question_zh: 在使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體時，哪種 AWS 資源可以幫助公司降低成本，以換取使用承諾？ 【選項】

question_en: Which perspective in the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) includes a capability for well-designed data and analytics architecture? AWS
question_zh: 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 中的哪個視角包含精心設計的資料和分析架構的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) people perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 人員視角功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company needs a bridge between technology and business to help evolve to a culture of continuous growth and learning. Which perspective in the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) serves as this bridge?
question_zh: 公司需要在技術和業務之間架起一座橋樑，以幫助公司發展形成持續成長和學習的文化。 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 中的哪個視角扮演了這條橋樑？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is a responsibility of AWS under the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 在 AWS 共享責任模式下，哪個選項是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

B.en: Patch management for applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances
B.zh: 對在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式進行修補程式管理

C.en: Patch management of the underlying infrastructure for managed services
C.zh: 託管服務底層基礎架構的修補程式管理

D.zh: 應用程式身分和存取管理

question_en: Which AWS service or resource can identify and provide reports on IAM resources in one AWS account that is shared with another AWS account?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務或資源可以識別一個 AWS 帳戶中與另一個 AWS 帳戶共用的 IAM 資源並提供報表？ 【選項】

B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer
C.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理存取分析器

question_en: Which AWS Well-Architected Framework pillar focuses on structured and streamlined allocation of computing resources?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 完善架構框架支柱專注於結構化和簡化的運算資源分配？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capabilities belong to the governance perspective? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 功能屬於治理觀點？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use AWS Managed Services (AMS) for operational support and wants to understand the scope of AMS. Which AMS feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 託管服務 (AMS) 進行營運支持，並希望了解 AMS 的範圍。哪個 AMS 功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises NoSQL workload to Amazon DynamoDB. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其本地 NoSQL 工作負載遷移到 Amazon DynamoDB 。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

D.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: A company is in the process of finding correct Amazon EC2 instance types and sizes to meet its performance and capacity requirements. The company wants to find the lowest possible cost. Which option accurately characterizes the company's actions?
question_zh: 一家公司正在尋找正確的 Amazon EC2 執行個體類型和大小以滿足其效能和容量要求。該公司希望找到盡可能低的成本。哪個選項準確描述了該公司的行為？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to manage sign-in security for workforce users. The company needs to create workforce users and centrally manage their access across all the company's AWS accounts and applications. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要管理員工用戶的登入安全。該公司需要建立員工使用者並集中管理他們在公司所有 AWS 帳戶和應用程式中的存取權限。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

D.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
D.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: A company wants a report that lists the status of multi-factor authentication (MFA) devices that all users in the company's AWS account use. Which AWS feature or service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一份報告，列出公司 AWS 帳戶中所有使用者使用的多重驗證 (MFA) 裝置的狀態。哪些 AWS 功能或服務可以滿足此要求？

C.en: Detailed Billing Reports - D AWS Cost Explorer reports
C.zh: 詳細帳單報告 - D AWS Cost Explorer 報告

question_en: A company wants to use machine learning capabilities to analyze log data from its Amazon EC2 instances and efficiently conduct security investigations. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望利用機器學習功能來分析來自其 Amazon EC2 執行個體的日誌資料並有效地進行安全調查。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？

C.zh: 亞馬遜偵探 - D 亞馬遜 GuardDuty

question_en: A company is launching a mobile app in the AWS Cloud. The company wants the app's users to sign in through social media identity providers (IdPs). Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 雲端中推出一款行動應用程式。該公司希望該應用程式的用戶透過社群媒體身分提供者（ IdP ）登入。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which complimentary AWS service or tool creates data-driven business cases for cloud planning?
question_zh: 哪種免費的 AWS 服務或工具可以為雲端規劃建立資料驅動的業務案例？ 【選項】

question_en: Which cloud concept is demonstrated by using AWS Cost Explorer?
question_zh: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 示範了哪種雲端概念？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to deploy a non-containerized Java-based web application on AWS. The company wants to use a managed service to quickly deploy the application. The company wants the service to automatically provision capacity, load balance, scale, and monitor application health. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要在 AWS 上部署一個基於非容器化的 Java Web 應用程式。該公司希望使用託管服務來快速部署應用程式。該公司希望該服務能夠自動配置容量、 負載平衡、 擴展和監控應用程式健康狀況。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

question_en: Which AWS service or tool gives users the ability to connect with AWS and deploy resources programmatically?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具使用戶能夠連接 AWS 並以程式設計方式部署資源？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has deployed a web application to Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances have low usage. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to rightsize the EC2 instances?
question_zh: 一家公司已將 Web 應用程式部署到 Amazon EC2 執行個體。 EC2 執行個體使用率低。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來調整 EC2 執行個體的大小？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to define a central data protection policy that works across AWS services for compute, storage, and database resources. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望定義一個適用於 AWS 服務的運算、 儲存和資料庫資源的中央資料保護策略。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to categorize and track AWS usage cost based on business categories. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要根據業務類別對 AWS 使用成本進行分類和追蹤。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can migrate data between AWS storage services?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務可以在 AWS 儲存服務之間遷移資料？ 【選項】

question_en: Which statements represent the cost-effectiveness of the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些陳述代表了 AWS 雲端的成本效益？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Users can trade fixed expenses for variable expenses.
A.zh: 用戶可以用固定支出換取可變支出。

B.en: Users can deploy all over the world in minutes.
B.zh: 用戶可以在幾分鐘內部署到世界各地。

C.en: AWS offers increased speed and agility.
C.zh: AWS 提供了更高的速度和靈活性。

D.en: AWS is responsible for patching the infrastructure.
D.zh: AWS 負責修補基礎架構。

E.en: Users benefit from economies of scale.

question_en: A company wants to design its cloud architecture so that it can support development innovations, and continuously improve processes and procedures. This is an example of which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework?
question_zh: 一家公司希望設計其雲端架構，以便它能夠支援開發創新，並不斷改進流程和程序。這是 AWS 完善架構框架哪個支柱的範例？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to consolidate the billing for multiple AWS accounts. The company needs to use one account to pay on behalf of all the other accounts. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要合併多個 AWS 帳戶的帳單。公司需要使用一個帳戶來代表所有其他帳戶付款。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is moving some of its on-premises IT services to the AWS Cloud. The finance department wants to see the entire bill so it can forecast spending limits. Which AWS service can the company use to set spending limits and receive notifications if those limits are exceeded?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將部分內部 IT 服務遷移到 AWS 雲端。財務部門希望看到整筆帳單，以便預測支出限額。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來設定支出限額並在超出限額時收到通知？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Support plans provide access to an AWS technical account manager (TAM)? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS Support 方案提供對 AWS 技術客戶經理 (TAM) 的存取權？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Where can users find examples of AWS Cloud solution designs?
question_zh: 使用者在哪裡可以找到 AWS 雲端解決方案設計的範例？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is the responsibility of a company that is using Amazon RDS?
question_zh: 使用 Amazon RDS 的公司負責哪一項任務？ 【選項】

B.en: Create IAM policies to control administrative access to the service.
B.zh: 建立 IAM 策略來控制對服務的管理存取。

C.en: Install the cables to connect the hardware for compute and storage.
C.zh: 安裝電纜以連接運算和儲存硬體。

D.en: Install and patch the RDS operating system.
D.zh: 安裝並修補 RDS 作業系統。

question_en: Which of the following is an advantage that the AWS Cloud provides to users?
question_zh: 下列哪一項是 AWS 雲端為使用者提供的優勢？ 【選項】

A.en: Users eliminate the need to guess about infrastructure capacity requirements.
A.zh: 用戶無需猜測基礎設施容量需求。

B.en: Users decrease their variable costs by maintaining sole ownership of IT hardware.
B.zh: 使用者透過保持 IT 硬體的唯一所有權來降低其變動成本。

C.en: Users maintain control of underlying IT infrastructure hardware.
C.zh: 使用者保持對底層 IT 基礎設施硬體的控制。

D.en: Users maintain control of operating systems for managed services.
D.zh: 使用者保持對託管服務的作業系統的控制。

question_en: Which feature of Amazon RDS provides the ability to automatically create a primary database instance and to synchronously replicate data to an instance in another Availability Zone? Amazon RDS
question_zh: 的哪一項功能可以自動建立主資料庫執行個體並將資料同步複製到另一個可用區域中的執行個體？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to check for IAM access keys that have not been rotated recently. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 公司需要檢查最近未輪調的 IAM 存取金鑰。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs many Amazon EC2 instances in its VPC. The company wants to use a native AWS security resource to control network traffic between certain EC2 instances. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司在其 VPC 中運行許多 Amazon EC2 執行個體。該公司希望使用原生 AWS 安全資源來控制某些 EC2 執行個體之間的網路流量。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following can be components of a VPC in the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些可以成為 AWS 雲端中 VPC 的元件？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon S3 儲存桶和對象

question_en: A company is building a new application on AWS. The company needs the application to remain available if an individual application component fails. Which design principle should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上建立一個新的應用程式。當單一應用程式元件發生故障時，公司需要該應用程式仍然可用。公司應該使用哪種設計原則來滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use a managed service to identify and protect sensitive data that is stored in Amazon S3. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用託管服務來識別和保護儲存在 Amazon S3 中的敏感資料。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature can a user configure to limit network access at the subnet level?
question_zh: 使用者可以配置哪些 AWS 服務或功能來限制子網路層級的網路存取？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can a company use to manage encryption keys in the cloud?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來管理雲端中的加密金鑰？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to enhance security by launching a third-party ISP intrusion detection system from its AWS account. Which AWS service or resource should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過從其 AWS 帳戶啟動第三方 ISP 入侵偵測系統來增強安全性。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或資源來滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: How does the AWS Cloud help companies build agility into their processes and cloud infrastructure? AWS
question_zh: 雲端如何幫助公司在其流程和雲端基礎架構中建立敏捷性？ 【選項】

A.en: Companies can avoid provisioning too much capacity when they do not know how much capacity is required.
A.zh: 當公司不知道需要多少容量時，他們可以避免配置過多的容量。

B.en: Companies can expand into new geographic regions.
B.zh: 公司可以擴展到新的地理區域。

C.en: Companies can access a range of technologies to experiment and innovate quickly.
C.zh: 公司可以利用一系列技術來快速進行實驗和創新。

D.en: Companies can pay for IT resources only when they use the resources.
D.zh: 企業只有在使用 IT 資源時才需要付費。

question_en: Which AWS service or tool gives a company the ability to release application changes in an automated way?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具可讓公司以自動化方式發布應用程式變更？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspective focuses on managing identities and permissions at scale?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 觀點著重於大規模管理身分和權限？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature allows users to securely store encrypted credentials and retrieve these credentials when required?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能允許使用者安全地儲存加密憑證並在需要時檢索這些憑證？ 【選項】

question_en: Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework aligns with the ability to make frequent, small, and reversible changes to AWS Cloud architecture? AWS
question_zh: 完善架構框架的哪個支柱與對 AWS 雲端架構進行頻繁、 小幅和可逆變更的能力相符？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or resource can a company use to deploy AWS WAF rules?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務或資源來部署 AWS WAF 規則？ 【選項】

question_en: A company hosts its website on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to ensure that the website reaches a global audience and provides minimum latency to users. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上託管其網站。該公司需要確保網站能夠覆蓋全球受眾並為用戶提供最小的延遲。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS design principle emphasizes the reduction of interdependencies between components of an application?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 設計原則強調減少應用程式元件之間的相互依賴性？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to provide one of its employees with access to Amazon RDS. The company also wants to limit the interaction to only the AWS CLI and AWS software development kits (SDKs). Which combination of actions should the company take to meet these requirements while following the principles of least privilege? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望為其一名員工提供存取 Amazon RDS 的權限。該公司還希望將互動限制在 AWS CLI 和 AWS 軟體開發工具包 (SDK) 內。公司應該採取哪些行動組合來滿足這些要求，同時遵循最小特權原則？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Create an IAM user and provide AWS Management Console access only.
A.zh: 建立 IAM 使用者並僅提供 AWS 管理控制台存取權限。

B.en: Create an IAM user and provide programmatic access only.
B.zh: 建立 IAM 使用者並僅提供程式存取。

C.en: Create an IAM role and provide AWS Management Console access only.
C.zh: 建立 IAM 角色並僅提供 AWS 管理控制台存取權限。

D.en: Create an IAM policy with administrator access and attach it to the IAM user.
D.zh: 建立具有管理員存取權限的 IAM 原則並將其附加到 IAM 使用者。

E.en: Create an IAM policy with Amazon RDS access and attach it to the IAM user.
E.zh: 建立具有 Amazon RDS 存取權限的 IAM 原則並將其附加到 IAM 使用者。

question_en: A company is running a reporting web server application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application runs once every week and once again at the end of the month. The EC2 instances can be shut down when they are not in use. What is the MOST cost-effective billing model for this use case?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行報告 Web 伺服器應用程式。該應用程式每週運行一次，並在月底運行一次。 EC2 執行個體在不使用時可以關閉。對於此用例來說，最具成本效益的計費模式是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to discover, prepare, move, and integrate data from multiple sources for data analytics and machine learning. Which AWS serverless data integration service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望發現、 準備、 移動和整合來自多個來源的數據，以進行數據分析和機器學習。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 無伺服器資料整合服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is moving its development and test environments to AWS to increase agility and reduce cost. Because these are not production workloads and the servers are not fully utilized, occasional unavailability is acceptable. What is the MOST cost-effective Amazon EC2 pricing model that will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將其開發和測試環境遷移到 AWS ，以提高靈活性並降低成本。由於這些不是生產工作負載且伺服器未充分利用，因此偶爾的不可用是可以接受的。最符合成本效益的 Amazon EC2 定價模式是什麼，可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company deploys its application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application occasionally experiences sudden increases in demand. The company wants to ensure that its application can respond to changes in demand at the lowest possible cost. Which AWS service or concept will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署其應用程式。應用程式偶爾會遇到需求突然增加的情況。該公司希望確保其應用程式能夠以盡可能低的成本回應需求的變化。哪一種 AWS 服務或概念能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to organize its users so that the company can grant permissions to the users as a group. Which AWS service or tool can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望組織其用戶，以便公司可以按群組授予用戶權限。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to build an application that uses AWS Lambda to run Python code. Under the AWS shared responsibility model, which tasks will be the company’s responsibility? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司想要建立一個使用 AWS Lambda 運行 Python 程式碼的應用程式。在 AWS 共享責任模式下，哪些任務將由公司負責？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

D.en: Installation of the computer language runtime.
D.zh: 安裝電腦語言執行時期。

E.en: Providing AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) access to the Lambda service.
E.zh: 提供對 Lambda 服務的 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 存取。

question_en: A company needs to identify who accessed an AWS service and what action was performed for a given time period. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 公司需要確定誰存取了 AWS 服務以及在給定時間段內執行了什麼操作。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use a centralized AWS service to enforce compliance with the organizational business standards. The company wants to use an AWS service that can govern and control who can deploy, manage, and decommission AWS resources. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用集中式 AWS 服務來強制遵守組織業務標準。該公司希望使用能夠管理和控制誰可以部署、 管理和停用 AWS 資源的 AWS 服務。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: What does "security of the cloud” refer to in the AWS shared responsibility model? AWS
question_zh: 共享責任模型中的「雲端安全」指的是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Availability of AWS services such as Amazon EC2
A.zh: Amazon EC2 等 AWS 服務的可用性

B.en: Security of the cloud infrastructure that runs all the AWS services
B.zh: 運行所有 AWS 服務的雲端基礎設施的安全性

C.en: Implementation of password policies for IAM users
C.zh: 實施 IAM 使用者的密碼原則

D.en: Security of customer environments by using AWS Network Firewall partners
D.zh: 透過使用 AWS 網路防火牆合作夥伴來保障客戶環境的安全

question_en: A company has an application that produces unstructured data continuously. The company needs to store the data so that the data is durable and easy to query. Which AWS service can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個不斷產生非結構化資料的應用程式。公司需要儲存數據，以便數據持久且易於查詢。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspectives? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些選項是 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 的觀點？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate a company’s on-premises container infrastructure to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to prevent unplanned administration and operation cost and adapt to a serverless architecture. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將公司內部的容器基礎架構遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望避免計劃外的管理和營運成本並適應無伺服器架構。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants its Amazon EC2 instances to be in different locations but share the same geographic area. The company also wants to use multiple power grids and independent networking connectivity for the EC2 instances. Which solution meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望其 Amazon EC2 執行個體位於不同位置但共用相同地理區域。該公司還希望為 EC2 執行個體使用多個電網和獨立的網路連接。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations in the same AWS Region.
A.zh: 在同一 AWS 區域的多個邊緣站點使用 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones in the same AWS Region.
B.zh: 在相同 AWS 區域的多個可用區中使用 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple Amazon Connect locations in the same AWS Region.
C.zh: 在相同 AWS 區域的多個 Amazon Connect 位置使用 EC2 執行個體。

D.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Artifact locations in the same AWS Region.
D.zh: 在相同 AWS 區域的多個 AWS Artifact 位置使用 EC2 執行個體。

question_en: An ecommerce company has deployed a new web application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to distribute incoming HTTP traffic evenly across all running instances. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家電子商務公司在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署了一個新的 Web 應用程式。該公司希望在所有正在運行的實例之間平均分配傳入的 HTTP 流量。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature gives users the ability to connect VPCs and on-premises networks to a central hub?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能使用戶能夠將 VPC 和本地網路連接到中央樞紐？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run CPU-intensive workload across multiple Amazon EC2 instances. Which EC2 instance type should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 某公司希望在多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 CPU 密集型工作負載。公司應該使用哪種 EC2 執行個體類型來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is connecting multiple VPCs and on-premises networks. The company needs to use an AWS service as a cloud router to simplify peering relationships. Which AWS service can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司正在連接多個 VPC 和本地網路。該公司需要使用 AWS 服務作為雲端路由器來簡化對等關係。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company stores a large amount of data that auditors access only twice each year. Which Amazon S3 storage class should the company use to store the data with the LOWEST cost?
question_zh: 一家公司儲存了大量數據，但審計員每年僅訪問兩次。公司應該使用哪種 Amazon S3 儲存類別來以最低成本儲存資料？ 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier 即時檢索

question_en: Which action should a company take to improve security in its AWS account?
question_zh: 公司應採取哪些措施來提高其 AWS 帳戶的安全性？ 【選項】

A.en: Require multi-factor authentication (MFA) for privileged users.
A.zh: 要求特權使用者進行多重身份驗證 (MFA) 。

B.zh: 刪除 root 使用者帳號。

C.en: Create an access key for the AWS account root user.
C.zh: 為 AWS 帳戶根使用者建立存取金鑰。

D.en: Create an access key for each privileged user.
D.zh: 為每個特權使用者建立一個存取密鑰。

question_en: Which of the following are ways to improve security on AWS? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些方法可以提高 AWS 的安全性？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: Granting the broadest permissions to all IAM roles
B.zh: 向所有 IAM 角色授予最廣泛的權限

C.en: Running application code with AWS Cloud
C.zh: 使用 AWS Cloud 運行應用程式程式碼

D.en: Enabling multi-factor authentication (MFA) with Amazon Cognito
D.zh: 使用 Amazon Cognito 啟用多重身份驗證 (MFA)

E.en: Using AWS Trusted Advisor security checks
E.zh: 使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 安全檢查

question_en: Which AWS service can a company use to manage encryption keys in the cloud?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來管理雲端中的加密金鑰？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to store its files in the AWS Cloud. Users need to be able to download these files directly using a public URL. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其檔案儲存在 AWS 雲端。使用者需要能夠使用公用 URL 直接下載這些文件。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company is using AWS for all its IT infrastructure. The company's developers are allowed to deploy applications on their own. The developers want to deploy their applications without having to provision the infrastructure themselves. Which AWS service should the developers use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 作為其所有 IT 基礎設施。該公司的開發人員可以自行部署應用程式。開發人員希望部署他們的應用程式而不必自己提供基礎設施。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to gain insights from its data and build interactive data visualization dashboards. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望從其數據中獲得洞察力並建立互動式數據視覺化儀表板。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A cloud engineer wants to store data in Amazon S3. The engineer will access some of the data yearly and some of the data daily. Which S3 storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一位雲端工程師想要將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。工程師將每年存取一些數據，並每天存取一些數據。哪一種 S3 儲存類別能夠最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.en: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)
C.zh: S3 單區 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 單區 -IA ）

question_en: Which of the following are economic benefits of using the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是使用 AWS 雲端的經濟效益？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

D.en: AWS Enterprise Support at no additional cost
D.zh: 免費提供 AWS 企業支持

question_en: A user is moving a workload from a local data center to an architecture that is distributed between the local data center and the AWS Cloud. Which type of migration is this?
question_zh: 使用者正在將工作負載從本地資料中心轉移到分佈在本地資料中心和 AWS 雲端之間的架構。這是哪種類型的遷移？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to store infrequently used data for data archives and long-term backups. Which AWS service or storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 公司需要儲存不常用的資料以用於資料存檔和長期備份。哪種 AWS 服務或儲存類別能夠最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

D.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier 彈性檢索

question_en: Which AWS service provides users with AWS issued reports, certifications, accreditations, and third-party attestations?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務提供使用者 AWS 發布的報告、 認證、 認可和第三方證明？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to create and publish interactive business intelligence dashboards. The dashboards require insights that are powered by machine learning. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要創建和發布互動式商業智慧儀表板。儀表板需要由機器學習提供支援的洞察力。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use AWS. The company has stringent requirements about low-latency access to on-premises systems and data residency. Which AWS service should the company use to design a solution that meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要使用 AWS 。該公司對內部系統的低延遲存取和資料駐留有嚴格的要求。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來設計符合這些要求的解決方案？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs an on-premises contact center for customers. The company needs to migrate to a cloud-based solution that can deliver artificial intelligence features to improve user experience. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司為客戶經營一個內部聯絡中心。該公司需要遷移到能夠提供人工智慧功能的基於雲端的解決方案，以改善用戶體驗。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

question_en: A company needs the ability to acquire resources when the resources are needed. The company also needs the ability to release the resources when the resources are no longer needed. Which AWS concept represents the company's goals?
question_zh: 公司需要具備在需要資源時獲取資源的能力。當不再需要資源時，公司還需要有釋放資源的能力。哪個 AWS 概念代表了公司的目標？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use Amazon EC2 instances for a stable production workload that will run for 1 year. Which instance purchasing option meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體來運作為期 1 年的穩定生產工作負載。哪一種實例購買選項最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to log in securely to Linux Amazon EC2 instances. How can the company accomplish this goal?
question_zh: 一家公司希望安全地登入 Linux Amazon EC2 執行個體。公司如何才能實現這個目標？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use a serverless compute service for an application. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望為應用程式使用無伺服器運算服務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants a solution that will automatically adjust the number of Amazon EC2 instances that are being used based on the current load. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一種能夠根據當前負載自動調整正在使用的 Amazon EC2 執行個體數量的解決方案。哪種 AWS 產品能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is building AWS architecture to deliver real-time data feeds from an on-premises data center into an application that runs on AWS. The company needs a consistent network connection with minimal latency. What should the company use to connect the application and the data center to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在建立 AWS 架構，以便將即時資料饋送從本地資料中心傳送到在 AWS 上運行的應用程式中。該公司需要穩定且延遲最小的網路連線。公司應該使用什麼來連接應用程式和資料中心以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company plans to migrate its custom marketing application and order-processing application to AWS. The company needs to deploy the applications on different types of instances with various configurations of CPU, memory, storage, and networking capacity. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃將其客製化行銷應用程式和訂單處理應用程式遷移到 AWS 。該公司需要在不同類型的實例上部署應用程序，這些實例具有不同的 CPU 、 記憶體、 儲存和網路容量配置。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to monitor and block malicious HTTP and HTTPS requests that its Amazon CloudFront distributions receive. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要監控並阻止其 Amazon CloudFront 散佈接收的惡意 HTTP 和 HTTPS 請求。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services can host PostgreSQL databases? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務可以託管 PostgreSQL 資料庫？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can generate information that can be used by external auditors?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務可以產生可供外部稽核師使用的資訊？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature requires an internet service provider (ISP) and a colocation facility to be implemented?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務或功能需要網路服務供應商 (ISP) 和主機代管設施才能實施？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants its Amazon EC2 instances to operate in a highly available environment, even if there is a natural disaster in a particular geographic area. Which solution achieves this goal?
question_zh: 一家公司希望其 Amazon EC2 執行個體能夠在高度可用的環境中運行，即使特定地理區域發生自然災害。哪種解決方案可以實現這一目標？ 【選項】

A.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions.
A.zh: 在多個 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations.
B.zh: 在多個邊緣位置使用 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS Regions.
C.zh: 在相同可用區但不同的 AWS 區域中使用 EC2 執行個體。

D.en: Use Amazon CloudFront with the EC2 instances configured as the source.
D.zh: 使用將 EC2 執行個體配置為來源的 Amazon CloudFront 。

question_en: Which AWS service allows for file sharing between multiple Amazon EC2 instances?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間共用檔案？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to manage multiple logins across AWS accounts within the same organization in AWS Organizations. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 AWS Organizations 中管理同一組織內跨 AWS 帳戶的多個登入。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company uses Amazon WorkSpaces. Which task is the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon WorkSpaces 。根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) for each WorkSpaces user account.
A.zh: 為每個 WorkSpaces 使用者帳戶設定多重身份驗證 (MFA) 。

B.en: Ensure the environmental safety and security of the AWS infrastructure that hosts WorkSpaces.
B.zh: 確保託管 WorkSpaces 的 AWS 基礎架構的環境安全。

C.en: Provide security for WorkSpaces user accounts through AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM).
C.zh: 透過 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 為 WorkSpaces 使用者帳戶提供安全性。

D.en: Configure AWS CloudTrail to log API calls and user activity.
D.zh: 配置 AWS CloudTrail 以記錄 API 呼叫和使用者活動。

question_en: A company is migrating its public website to AWS. The company wants to host the domain name for the website on AWS. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司正在將其公共網站遷移到 AWS 。該公司希望在 AWS 上託管該網站的網域。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company uses a third-party identity provider (IdP). The company wants to provide its employees with access to AWS accounts and services without requiring another set of login credentials. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司使用第三方身分提供者 (IdP) 。該公司希望讓員工存取 AWS 帳戶和服務，而無需另一組登入憑證。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 資源存取管理器 (AWS RAM)

question_en: Which combination of AWS services can be used to move a commercial relational database to an Amazon-managed open-source database? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 可以使用哪種 AWS 服務組合將商業關係型資料庫遷移到亞馬遜管理的開源資料庫？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: Which AWS service gives users on-demand, self-service access to AWS compliance control reports?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許使用者按需自助存取 AWS 合規性控制報告？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs a legacy workload in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the workload to AWS. The company does not want to make any changes to the workload. Which migration strategy should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心運行遺留工作負載。該公司希望將工作負載遷移到 AWS 。該公司不想對工作量做出任何改變。公司該採用哪種遷移策略？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to migrate applications to the AWS Cloud. During a system audit, the company finds that its content management system (CMS) application is incompatible with cloud environments. Which migration strategies will help the company to migrate the CMS application with the LEAST effort? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃將應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。在系統審核期間，該公司發現其內容管理系統 (CMS) 應用程式與雲端環境不相容。哪些遷移策略將幫助公司以最少的努力遷移 CMS 應用程式？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following are AWS best practice recommendations for the use of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些是針對使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 的 AWS 最佳實務建議？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Use the AWS account root user for daily access.
A.zh: 使用 AWS 帳戶根用戶進行日常存取。

B.en: Use access keys and secret access keys on Amazon EC2.
B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上使用存取金鑰和秘密存取金鑰。

C.en: Rotate credentials on a regular basis.

D.en: Create a shared set of access keys for system administrators.
D.zh: 為系統管理員建立一組共用的存取金鑰。

question_en: Which option is AWS responsible for under the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 在 AWS 共享責任模式下， AWS 對哪個選項負責？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run a graph query that provides credit card users’ names, addresses, and transactions. The company wants the graph to show if the names, addresses, and transactions indicates possible fraud. Which AWS database service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要運行圖形查詢，提供信用卡用戶的姓名、 地址和交易。該公司希望透過圖表顯示姓名、 地址和交易是否表明可能存在詐欺行為。哪種 AWS 資料庫服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service provides machine learning capability to detect and analyze content in images and videos?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務提供機器學習功能來偵測和分析影像和影片中的內容？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants its AWS usage to be more sustainable. The company wants to track, measure, review, and forecast polluting emissions that result from its AWS applications. Which AWS service or tool can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望其 AWS 的使用更永續。該公司希望追蹤、 測量、 審查和預測其 AWS 應用程式產生的污染排放。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service gives users the ability to deploy highly repeatable infrastructure configurations?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務允許使用者部署高度可重複的基礎架構配置？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to provide customer service by using voice calls and web chat features. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 本公司需要利用語音通話和網路聊天功能提供客戶服務。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is designed to help users handle large amounts of data in a data warehouse environment?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務旨在協助使用者在資料倉儲環境中處理大量資料？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is building a web application using AWS. Which AWS service will help prevent network layer DDoS attacks against the web application?
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 建立 Web 應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務有助於防止針對 Web 應用程式的網路層 DDoS 攻擊？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS compute service gives users the ability to securely and reliably run containers at scale?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 運算服務能夠讓使用者安全可靠地大規模運行容器？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: Which AWS tool or feature acts as a VPC firewall at the subnet level?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 工具或功能可作為子網路層級的 VPC 防火牆？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs an application on AWS that performs batch jobs. The application is fault-tolerant and can handle interruptions. The company wants to optimize the cost to run the application. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上執行執行批次作業的應用程式。該應用程式具有容錯能力並能處理中斷。該公司希望優化運行該應用程式的成本。哪種 AWS 產品能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: Amazon EC2 Spot 執行個體

D.zh: Amazon EC2 隨選執行個體

question_en: Which AWS service can be used to send alerts when a specific Amazon CloudWatch alarm is invoked?
question_zh: 當呼叫特定的 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時，可以使用哪種 AWS 服務發送警報？ 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

C.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: A cloud practitioner wants to use a highly available and scalable DNS service for its AWS workload. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一位雲端從業人員希望為其 AWS 工作負載使用高可用性和可擴充性的 DNS 服務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: According to the AWS shared responsibility model, which task is the customer's responsibility?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Maintaining the infrastructure needed to run AWS Lambda
A.zh: 維護運作 AWS Lambda 所需的基礎設施

B.en: Updating the operating system of Amazon DynamoDB instances
B.zh: 更新 Amazon DynamoDB 執行個體的作業系統

C.zh: 維護 Amazon S3 基礎設施

D.en: Updating the guest operating system on Amazon EC2 instances
D.zh: 更新 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的客戶作業系統
