question_en: A company is learning about its responsibilities that are related to the management of Amazon EC2 instances. Which tasks for EC2 instances are the company’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正在了解與 Amazon EC2 執行個體管理相關的職責。根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些 EC2 執行個體任務是公司的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Install and patch the machine hypervisor.
A.zh: 安裝並修補機器管理程式。

C.en: Encrypt data at rest on associated storage.
C.zh: 對相關儲存體上的靜態資料進行加密。

D.en: Install the physical hardware and cabling.

E.en: Provide physical security for the EC2 instances.
E.zh: 為 EC2 執行個體提供實體安全。

question_en: A company runs MySQL database workloads on self-managed servers in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the database workloads to an AWS managed service. Which migration strategy should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心的自管理伺服器上運行 MySQL 資料庫工作負載。該公司希望將資料庫工作負載遷移到 AWS 託管服務。公司該採用哪種遷移策略？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to migrate a monolithic application to AWS. The company wants to modernize the application by splitting it into microservices. The company will deploy the microservices on AWS. Which migration strategy should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃將單體應用程式遷移到 AWS 。該公司希望透過將應用程式拆分為微服務來實現應用程式的現代化。該公司將在 AWS 上部署微服務。公司該採用哪種遷移策略？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to implement detailed tracking of its cloud costs by department and project. Which AWS feature or service should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司希望按部門和專案對其雲端成本進行詳細追蹤。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 功能或服務？ 【選項】

question_en: A user wants to invoke an AWS Lambda function when an Amazon EC2 instance enters the “stopping” state. Which AWS service is appropriate for this use case?
question_zh: 當 Amazon EC2 執行個體進入「停止」狀態時，使用者想要呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數。哪種 AWS 服務適合此用例？ 【選項】

C.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: A company has a MariaDB database on premises. The company wants to move the data to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service will host this database with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司內部有一個 MariaDB 資料庫。該公司希望將資料遷移到 AWS 雲端。哪項 AWS 服務將以最少的營運開銷託管此資料庫？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature supports governance, compliance, and risk auditing of AWS accounts?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能支援 AWS 帳戶的治理、 合規性和風險審計？ 【選項】

C.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: Which AWS Cloud design principle is a company using when the company implements AWS CloudTrail?
question_zh: 公司實施 AWS CloudTrail 時使用哪種 AWS 雲端設計原則？ 【選項】

B.zh: 使用無伺服器運算架構。

C.zh: 以程式碼形式執行操作。

question_en: A company needs a threat detection service that will continuously monitor its AWS accounts, workloads, and Amazon S3 buckets for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. Which AWS service meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要一種威脅偵測服務，以持續監控其 AWS 帳戶、 工作負載和 Amazon S3 儲存桶是否有惡意活動和未經授權的行為。哪些 AWS 服務符合這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)?
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司正在進行組織轉型，希望能夠更快地回應客戶的詢問和回饋。根據 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) ，公司應該執行哪項任務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.
A.zh: 重新調整團隊以專注於產品和價值流。

B.en: Create new value propositions with new products and services.
B.zh: 透過新產品和服務創造新的價值主張。

C.en: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.
C.zh: 使用新的數據和分析平台來創建可行的見解。

D.zh: 遷移和現代化遺留基礎設施。

question_en: A company wants to rightsize its Amazon EC2 instances. Which configuration change will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司希望調整其 Amazon EC2 執行個體的規模。哪種配置變更能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足此要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Add EC2 instances in another Availability Zone.
A.zh: 在另一個可用區域中新增 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Change the size and type of the EC2 instances based on utilization.
B.zh: 根據使用率變更 EC2 執行個體的大小和類型。

C.en: Convert the payment method from On-Demand to Savings Plans.
C.zh: 將付款方式從按需付款轉換為儲蓄計劃。

D.en: Reprovision the EC2 instances with a larger instance type.
D.zh: 使用更大的執行個體類型重新配置 EC2 執行個體。

question_en: Which AWS service supports user sign-up functionality and authentication to mobile and web applications?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務支援使用者註冊功能以及行動和 Web 應用程式的身份驗證？ 【選項】

question_en: Which benefit of the AWS Cloud helps companies achieve lower usage costs because of the aggregate usage of all AWS users? AWS
question_zh: 雲端的哪項優勢可以幫助公司因所有 AWS 使用者的整體使用而降低使用成本？ 【選項】

B.en: Ability to go global in minutes
B.zh: 幾分鐘內即可走向全球

question_en: Which task is the responsibility of the customer, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Patch the Amazon DynamoDB operating system.
A.zh: 修補 Amazon DynamoDB 作業系統。

B.en: Secure Amazon CloudFront edge locations by allowing physical access according to the principle of least privilege.
B.zh: 根據最小特權原則允許實體訪問，從而保護 Amazon CloudFront 邊緣位置的安全。

C.en: Protect the hardware that runs AWS services.
C.zh: 保護運行 AWS 服務的硬體。

D.en: Use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) according to the principle of least privilege.
D.zh: 根據最小特權原則使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 。

question_en: A company wants to manage its cloud resources by using infrastructure as code (IaC) templates. The company needs to meet compliance requirements. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用基礎設施即程式碼 (IaC) 範本來管理其雲端資源。該公司需要滿足合規性要求。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A systems administrator wants to monitor the CPU utilization of a company's Amazon EC2 instances. Which AWS service can provide this information?
question_zh: 系統管理員想要監控公司 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 CPU 使用率。哪個 AWS 服務可以提供此資訊？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate all of its on-premises infrastructure to the AWS Cloud. Before migration, the company wants estimate of costs for running its as-is infrastructure. Which AWS service or principle should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其所有本地基礎設施遷移到 AWS 雲端。在遷移之前，該公司希望估算運行現有基礎設施的成本。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或原則來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF)

question_en: An independent software vendor wants to deliver and share its custom Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) to prospective customers. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 獨立軟體供應商希望向潛在客戶交付和分享其客製化的 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI) 。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which component must be attached to a VPC to enable inbound internet access?
question_zh: 必須將哪個元件附加到 VPC 才能啟用入站網際網路存取？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service supports a company's ability to treat infrastructure as code?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務支援公司將基礎架構視為程式碼的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is building an application that will receive millions of database queries each second. The company needs the data store for the application to scale to meet these needs. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司正在建立一個每秒將接收數百萬個資料庫查詢的應用程式。公司需要應用程式的資料儲存來擴展以滿足這些需求。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: 適用於 Memcached 的 Amazon ElastiCache

question_en: An AWS user wants to proactively detect when an instance or account might be compromised or if there are threats from attacks. Which AWS service should the user choose? AWS
question_zh: 使用者希望主動偵測執行個體或帳戶何時可能受到損害或是否有攻擊威脅。使用者應該選擇哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Support plan provides the full set of AWS Trusted Advisor checks at the LOWEST cost?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS Support 方案以最低的成本提供全套 AWS Trusted Advisor 檢查？ 【選項】

question_en: A company's application is running on Amazon EC2 instances. The company is planning a partial migration to a serverless architecture in the next year and wants to pay for resources up front. Which AWS purchasing option will optimize the company's costs?
question_zh: 一家公司的應用程式正在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。該公司計劃明年部分遷移到無伺服器架構，並希望預先支付資源費用。哪種 AWS 購買選項可以優化公司的成本？ 【選項】

C.zh: EC2 執行個體節省計劃

question_en: A retail company is building a new mobile app. The company is evaluating whether to build the app at an on-premises data center or in the AWS Cloud. Which of the following are benefits of building this app in the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家零售公司正在開發一款新的行動應用程式。該公司正在評估是在本地資料中心還是在 AWS 雲端中建置該應用程式。以下哪些是在 AWS 雲端中建立此應用程式的好處？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: A large, upfront capital expense and low variable expenses
A.zh: 前期資本支出較大，變動費用較低

B.en: Increased speed for trying out new projects
B.zh: 加快嘗試新項目的速度

C.en: Complete control over the physical security of the infrastructure
C.zh: 完全控制基礎設施的實體安全

D.en: Flexibility to scale up in minutes as the application becomes popular
D.zh: 隨著應用程式的流行，可以在幾分鐘內靈活擴展

E.en: Ability to pick the specific data centers that will host the application servers
E.zh: 能夠選擇託管應用程式伺服器的特定資料中心

question_en: A company must archive its documents by using a write-once, read-many (WORM) model to meet legal and compliance obligations. Which feature of Amazon S3 can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 公司必須使用一次寫入、 多次讀取 (WORM) 模型來存檔其文檔，以滿足法律和合規義務。公司可以使用 Amazon S3 的哪個功能來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: S3 多重身份驗證 (MFA) 刪除

question_en: A company has batch workloads that need to run for short periods of time on Amazon EC2. The workloads can handle interruptions and can start again from where they ended. What is the MOST cost-effective EC2 instance purchasing option to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司有一些需要在 Amazon EC2 上短暫運作的批次工作負載。工作負載可以處理中斷並且可以從中斷的地方重新開始。為滿足這些要求，最具成本效益的 EC2 執行個體購買選項是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to deploy a PostgreSQL database into Amazon RDS. The database must be highly available and fault tolerant. Which AWS solution should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要將 PostgreSQL 資料庫部署到 Amazon RDS 中。資料庫必須具有高可用性和容錯能力。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 解決方案來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Amazon RDS with a single Availability Zone
A.zh: 具有單一可用區的 Amazon RDS

C.en: Amazon RDS with multiple Availability Zones
C.zh: 具有多個可用區的 Amazon RDS

D.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: What is the MOST secure way to store passwords on AWS?
question_zh: 在 AWS 上儲存密碼最安全的方法是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Store passwords in an Amazon S3 bucket.
A.zh: 將密碼儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。

B.en: Store passwords as AWS CloudFormation parameters.
B.zh: 將密碼儲存為 AWS CloudFormation 參數。

C.en: Store passwords in AWS Storage Gateway.
C.zh: 將密碼儲存在 AWS Storage Gateway 中。

D.en: Store passwords in AWS Secrets Manager.
D.zh: 將密碼儲存在 AWS Secrets Manager 中。

question_en: Which statements accurately describe the relationships among components of AWS global infrastructure? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些陳述準確描述了 AWS 全球基礎設施組件之間的關係？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: There are more AWS Regions than Availability Zones.
A.zh: AWS 區域的數量多於可用區域的數量。

B.en: There are more edge locations than AWS Regions.
B.zh: 邊緣站點的數量比 AWS 區域的數量還多。

C.en: An edge location is an Availability Zone.

D.en: There are more AWS Regions than edge locations.
D.zh: AWS 區域的數量比邊緣站點的數量多。

E.en: There are more Availability Zones than AWS Regions.
E.zh: 可用區比 AWS 區域多。

question_en: Which AWS service provides DNS resolution?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務提供 DNS 解析？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to host an application in a specific geographic area to comply with regulations. Which feature of the AWS global infrastructure will help the company meet this requirement?
question_zh: 公司需要在特定地理區域託管應用程式以遵守法規。 AWS 全球基礎設施的哪個功能將幫助公司滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

question_en: An ecommerce company plans to move its data center workload to the AWS Cloud to support highly dynamic usage patterns. Which benefits make the AWS Cloud cost-effective for the migration of this type of workload? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家電子商務公司計劃將其資料中心工作負載遷移至 AWS 雲，以支援高度動態的使用模式。哪些優勢使得 AWS 雲端對於此類工作負載的遷移具有成本效益？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: When designing AWS workloads to be operational even when there are component failures, what is an AWS best practice?
question_zh: 在設計 AWS 工作負載時，即使出現元件故障也能正常運行， AWS 最佳實踐是什麼？ 【選項】

A.zh: 每季度進行一次災難復原測試。

B.en: Place the main component on the us-east-1 Region.
B.zh: 將主要組件放置在 us-east-1 區域。

C.en: Design for automatic failover to healthy resources.
C.zh: 設計自動故障轉移到健康資源。

D.en: Design workloads to fit on a single Amazon EC2 instance.
D.zh: 設計工作負載以適合單一 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

question_en: Which of the following can the AWS Pricing Calculator do? AWS
question_zh: 定價計算器可以執行下列哪一項操作？ 【選項】

A.zh: 項目每月的 AWS 成本。

B.zh: 計算歷史 AWS 成本。

C.en: Provide in-depth information about AWS pricing strategies.
C.zh: 提供有關 AWS 定價策略的深入資訊。

D.en: Provide users with access to their monthly bills.
D.zh: 讓用戶能夠查看他們的每月帳單。

question_en: Which AWS solution gives companies the ability to use protocols such as NFS to store and retrieve objects in Amazon S3?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 解決方案可讓公司能夠使用 NFS 等協定在 Amazon S3 中儲存和擷取物件？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 磁碟區閘道

C.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 檔案網關

question_en: A user has been granted permission to change their own IAM user password. Which AWS services can the user use to change the password? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 使用者已被授予更改自己的 IAM 使用者密碼的權限。使用者可以使用哪些 AWS 服務來變更密碼？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 金鑰管理服務 (AWS KMS)

D.zh: AWS 資源存取管理器 (AWS RAM)

question_en: Which task is the customer's responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Patch a guest operating system that is deployed on an Amazon EC2 instance.
A.zh: 修補部署在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的客戶作業系統。

B.en: Control physical access to an AWS data center.
B.zh: 控制對 AWS 資料中心的實體存取。

C.en: Control access to AWS underlying hardware.
C.zh: 控制對 AWS 底層硬體的存取。

D.en: Patch a host operating system that is deployed on Amazon S3.
D.zh: 修補部署在 Amazon S3 上的主機作業系統。

question_en: Which AWS service or feature provides a firewall at the subnet level within a VPC?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能在 VPC 內的子網路層級提供防火牆？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to use automated video analysis to identify employees that are accessing its offices. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用自動視訊分析來識別進入其辦公室的員工。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to host a web server on Amazon EC2 instances for at least 1 year. The web server cannot tolerate interruption. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上託管 Web 伺服器至少 1 年。網路伺服器不能容忍中斷。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which guidelines are best practices for using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些準則是使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 的最佳實務？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.zh: 建立單獨的 IAM 使用者。

C.en: Use inline policies instead of customer managed policies.
C.zh: 使用內聯策略而不是客戶管理策略。

D.en: Grant maximum privileges to IAM users.
D.zh: 授予 IAM 使用者最大權限。

E.en: Use groups to assign permissions to IAM users.
E.zh: 使用群組為 IAM 使用者指派權限。

question_en: Which advantage of cloud computing allows users to scale resources up and down based on the amount of load that an application supports?
question_zh: 雲端運算的哪項優勢允許使用者根據應用程式支援的負載量來擴大或縮小資源規模？ 【選項】

C.en: Benefit from massive economies of scale

D.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense
D.zh: 用固定費用代替變動費用

question_en: A company is requesting Payment Card Industry (PCI) reports that validate the operating effectiveness of AWS security controls. How should the company obtain these reports?
question_zh: 一家公司正在請求支付卡產業 (PCI) 報告來驗證 AWS 安全控制的運作有效性。公司應如何取得這些報告？ 【選項】

B.zh: 從 AWS Artifact 下載報告。

C.en: Download reports from AWS Security Hub.
C.zh: 從 AWS Security Hub 下載報告。

D.en: Contact an AWS technical account manager (TAM).
D.zh: 聯絡 AWS 技術客戶經理 (TAM) 。

question_en: An ecommerce company wants to distribute traffic between the Amazon EC2 instances that host its website. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家電子商務公司希望在託管其網站的 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間分配流量。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services or features form the AWS Cloud global infrastructure? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能構成了 AWS 雲端全球基礎架構？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: According to the AWS shared responsibility model, which of the following are AWS responsibilities? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，下列哪些是 AWS 的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Network infrastructure and virtualization of infrastructure
A.zh: 網路基礎架構和基礎架構虛擬化

question_en: A company uses Amazon Aurora as its database service. The company wants to encrypt its databases and database backups. Which party manages the encryption of the database clusters and database snapshots, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Aurora 作為其資料庫服務。該公司希望對其資料庫和資料庫備份進行加密。根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一方管理資料庫叢集和資料庫快照的加密？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is hosting a web application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to implement custom conditions to filter and control inbound web traffic. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上託管一個 Web 應用程式。該公司希望實施自訂條件來過濾和控制入站網路流量。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to maintain bandwidth throughput and provide a more consistent network experience than public internet-based connections. Which AWS service should the company choose?
question_zh: 一家公司希望保持頻寬吞吐量並提供比基於公共互聯網的連接更一致的網路體驗。公司應該選擇哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has temporary workload that is also variable. The company needs to use Amazon EC2 instances for the workload. The EC2 instances need to handle short bursts of work that cannot stop before finishing. Which purchase option will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司的工作量是臨時性的，而且也是可變的。該公司需要使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體來處理工作負載。 EC2 執行個體需要處理短時間突發的工作，這些工作在完成前不能停止。哪種購買選項可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company's employees are working from home. The company wants its employees to use their personal devices to connect to a managed workstation in the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service should the company use to provide the remote environment?
question_zh: 一家公司的員工都在家工作。該公司希望員工使用個人裝置連接到 AWS 雲端中的託管工作站。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來提供遠端環境？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to use SQL syntax to perform a direct query of objects in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which AWS service can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要使用 SQL 語法對 Amazon S3 儲存桶中的物件進行直接查詢。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company uses Amazon RDS for a product database. The company wants to ensure the database is highly available. Which feature of Amazon RDS will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon RDS 作為產品資料庫。該公司希望確保資料庫具有高可用性。 Amazon RDS 的哪個功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service provides serverless compute for use with containers?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務提供可用於容器的無伺服器運算？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: A company is using multiple AWS accounts for different business teams. The finance team wants to receive one bill for all of the company's accounts. Which AWS service or tool should the finance team use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司正在為不同的業務團隊使用多個 AWS 帳戶。財務團隊希望收到公司所有帳戶的一張帳單。財務團隊應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs a firewall that will control network connections to and from a single Amazon EC2 instance. This firewall will not control network connections to and from other instances that are in the same subnet. Which AWS service or feature can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要一個防火牆來控制與單一 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間的網路連線。此防火牆不會控制與相同子網路中其他執行個體之間的網路連線。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to use the Amazon EC2 instances as web servers. Customers from around the world will use the web servers. Most customers will use the web servers only during certain hours of the day. How should the company deploy the EC2 instances to achieve the LOWEST operational cost?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體作為 Web 伺服器。來自世界各地的客戶都將使用這些網頁伺服器。大多數客戶只會在一天中的特定時段使用網頁伺服器。公司應如何部署 EC2 執行個體以實現最低的營運成本？ 【選項】

question_en: Which benefit is always free of charge with AWS, regardless of a user’s AWS Support plan?
question_zh: 無論用戶的 AWS Support 計畫為何， AWS 的哪一項福利始終是免費的？ 【選項】

question_en: A company uses Amazon EC2 instances to run its application. The application needs to be available and running continuously for three or more years. What type of EC2 instance should the company purchase for a discount on the EC2 pricing?
question_zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體來執行其應用程式。該應用程式需要可用並連續運行三年或更長時間。公司應該購買哪種類型的 EC2 執行個體才能享有 EC2 定價折扣？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to perform an audit of recent AWS account activity. The audit will investigate who initiated an event and what actions were performed. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要對最近的 AWS 帳戶活動進行審計。審計將調查誰發起了事件以及執行了哪些行動。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: Which design principles are included in the reliability pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 完善架構框架的可靠性支柱包含哪些設計原則？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: Grant everyone access to increase AWS service quotas.
B.zh: 授予每個人存取權限以增加 AWS 服務配額。

D.en: Design applications to run in a single Availability Zone.
D.zh: 設計應用程式在單一可用區域內運作。

E.en: Plan to increase AWS service quotas first in a secondary AWS Region.
E.zh: 該計劃首先在輔助 AWS 區域增加 AWS 服務配額。

question_en: A company needs to use AWS technology to deploy a static website. Which solution meets this requirement with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司需要使用 AWS 技術部署一個靜態網站。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Deploy the website on Amazon EC2.
A.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上部署網站。

B.en: Host the website on AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
B.zh: 在 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 上託管網站。

C.en: Deploy the website with Amazon Lightsail.
C.zh: 使用 Amazon Lightsail 部署網站。

D.en: Host the website on Amazon S3.
D.zh: 在 Amazon S3 上託管網站。

question_en: Which recommendation can AWS Cost Explorer provide to help reduce cost? AWS Cost Explorer
question_zh: 可以提供哪些建議來幫助降低成本？ 【選項】

A.zh: 使用特定的資料庫引擎。

B.en: Change the programming language for an application.
B.zh: 更改應用程式的程式語言。

question_en: A company wants to deploy an application in multiple Availability Zones in a single AWS Region. Which benefit will this deployment provide to the company?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在單一 AWS 區域的多個可用區中部署應用程式。此次部署將為公司帶來哪些好處？ 【選項】

A.en: Improved connection performance for global customers
A.zh: 為全球客戶提高連線效能

B.en: Resilient architecture and a highly available solution
B.zh: 彈性架構和高可用性解決方案

C.zh: 降低整體資料儲存成本

D.en: Ability to shut down an Availability Zone during periods of low demand
D.zh: 在需求低迷期間關閉可用區域的能力

question_en: Which AWS service can companies use to subscribe to RSS feeds for updates about all AWS service issues?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來訂閱 RSS 來源以取得所有 AWS 服務問題的更新？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: Which Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances term commitment will give users the MOST cost savings?
question_zh: 哪一種 Amazon EC2 預留執行個體期限承諾能為使用者帶來最多的成本節省？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is running big data analytics and massive parallel computations on its AWS test and development servers. The company can tolerate occasional downtime. What is the MOST cost-effective Amazon EC2 purchasing option for the company to use?
question_zh: 一家公司正在其 AWS 測試和開發伺服器上運行大數據分析和大規模並行運算。該公司可以容忍偶爾的停機。對於公司來說最具成本效益的 Amazon EC2 購買選項是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs Amazon EC2 instances in a research lab. The instances run for 3 hours each week and cannot be interrupted. What is the MOST cost-effective instance purchasing option to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司在研究實驗室中運行 Amazon EC2 執行個體。實例每週運作 3 小時，不可中斷。滿足這些要求的最具成本效益的實例購買選項是什麼？ 【選項】

question_en: A new AWS user needs to interact with AWS Support by using API calls. Which AWS Support plan will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 新的 AWS 使用者需要使用 API 呼叫與 AWS Support 進行互動。哪個 AWS Support 計劃能夠最經濟高效地滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company migrated to the AWS Cloud. Now the company pays for services on an as-needed basis. Which advantage of cloud computing is the company benefiting from?
question_zh: 一家公司遷移到了 AWS 雲端。現在公司根據需要支付服務費用。該公司受益於雲端運算的哪些優勢？ 【選項】

A.en: Stop spending money running and maintaining data centers
A.zh: 不再花錢運作和維護資料中心

D.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense
D.zh: 用固定費用代替變動費用

question_en: A company will run a predictable compute workload on Amazon EC2 instances for the next 3 years. The workload is critical for the company. The company wants to optimize costs to run the workload. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司將在未來 3 年內在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行可預測的運算工作負載。工作量對公司來說至關重要。該公司希望優化成本來運行工作負載。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to estimate the cost for its AWS architecture solution before migration. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在遷移之前估算其 AWS 架構解決方案的成本。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to centrally manage its employee's access to multiple AWS accounts. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望集中管理其員工對多個 AWS 帳戶的存取。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

A.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer
A.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理存取分析器

D.zh: AWS 安全性令牌服務 (AWS STS)

question_en: A university receives a grant to conduct research by using AWS services. The research team needs to make sure the grant money lasts for the entire school year. The team has decided on a monthly allocation that adds up to the total grant amount. Which AWS service or feature will notify the team if spending exceeds the planned amount?
question_zh: 一所大學獲得資助，利用 AWS 服務進行研究。研究團隊需要確保資助金能維持整個學年。團隊已決定每月分配總額作為資助金額。如果支出超出計畫金額，哪一項 AWS 服務或功能會通知團隊？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has migrated its workload to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to optimize existing Amazon EC2 resources. Which AWS services or tools provide this functionality? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司已將工作負載遷移至 AWS 雲端。該公司希望優化現有的 Amazon EC2 資源。哪些 AWS 服務或工具提供此功能？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company with multiple accounts and teams wants to set up a new multi-account AWS environment. Which AWS service supports this requirement?
question_zh: 擁有多個帳戶和團隊的公司想要建立一個新的多帳戶 AWS 環境。哪些 AWS 服務支援此要求？ 【選項】

D.zh: 亞馬遜虛擬私有雲 (Amazon VPC)

question_en: A company needs access to checks and recommendations that help the company follow AWS best practices for cost optimization, security, fault tolerance, performance, and service quotas. Which combination of an AWS service and AWS Support plan on the AWS account will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要獲得檢查和建議，以幫助公司遵循 AWS 在成本優化、 安全性、 容錯、 效能和服務配額方面的最佳實踐。 AWS 帳戶上的哪種 AWS 服務和 AWS Support 計劃組合可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.en: AWS Trusted Advisor with AWS Developer Support
A.zh: 提供 AWS 開發人員支援的 AWS Trusted Advisor

B.en: AWS Health Dashboard with AWS Enterprise Support
B.zh: 具有 AWS 企業支援的 AWS Health Dashboard

C.en: AWS Trusted Advisor with AWS Business Support
C.zh: 具有 AWS 商業支援的 AWS Trusted Advisor

D.en: AWS Health Dashboard with AWS Enterprise On-Ramp Support
D.zh: 具有 AWS Enterprise On-Ramp 支援的 AWS Health Dashboard

question_en: Which AWS service helps users plan and track their server and application inventory migration data to AWS?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可協助使用者規劃和追蹤其伺服器和應用程式庫存遷移資料到 AWS ？ 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: Which AWS team or offering helps users accelerate cloud adoption through paid engagements in any of several specialty practice areas?

question_en: A company needs to purchase Amazon EC2 instances to support an application that will run continuously for more than 1 year. Which EC2 instance purchasing option meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司需要購買 Amazon EC2 執行個體來支援一個連續運行 1 年以上的應用程式。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which programming languages does AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) currently support? (Choose two.) AWS
question_zh: 雲端開發工具包 (AWS CDK) 目前支援哪些程式語言？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature gives users the ability to provision AWS infrastructure programmatically?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能使用戶能夠以程式設計方式配置 AWS 基礎架構？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 雲端開發工具包 (AWS CDK)

question_en: Which AWS service or feature allows a company to have its own logically isolated section of the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能允許公司擁有自己的 AWS 雲端邏輯隔離部分？ 【選項】

C.zh: 亞馬遜虛擬私有雲 (Amazon VPC)

question_en: Which of the following actions are controlled with AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 下列哪些操作由 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 控制？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Control access to AWS service APIs and to other specific resources.
A.zh: 控制對 AWS 服務 API 和其他特定資源的存取。

B.en: Provide intelligent threat detection and continuous monitoring.
B.zh: 提供智慧威脅偵測和持續監控。

C.en: Protect the AWS environment using multi-factor authentication (MFA).
C.zh: 使用多重身份驗證 (MFA) 保護 AWS 環境。

D.en: Grant users access to AWS data centers.
D.zh: 授予使用者存取 AWS 資料中心的權限。

E.en: Provide firewall protection for applications from common web attacks.
E.zh: 為應用程式提供防火牆保護，抵禦常見的網路攻擊。

question_en: Why are AWS CloudFormation templates used?
question_zh: 為什麼要使用 AWS CloudFormation 範本？ 【選項】

A.en: To reduce provisioning time by using automation.
A.zh: 透過使用自動化來減少配置時間。

B.en: To transfer existing infrastructure to another company.
B.zh: 將現有基礎設施轉移到另一家公司。

C.en: To reuse on-premises infrastructure in the AWS Cloud.
C.zh: 在 AWS 雲端中重複使用本機基礎架構。

D.en: To deploy large infrastructure with no cost implications.
D.zh: 部署大型基礎設施且不涉及任何成本。

question_en: A company is using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). Who can manage the access keys of the AWS account root user?
question_zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 。誰可以管理 AWS 帳戶根用戶的存取金鑰？ 【選項】

A.en: IAM users in the same account that have been granted permission
A.zh: 同一帳戶下已被授予權限的 IAM 用戶

B.en: IAM roles in any account that have been granted permission
B.zh: 任何帳戶中已授予權限的 IAM 角色

C.en: IAM users and roles that have been granted permission
C.zh: 已授予權限的 IAM 使用者和角色

question_en: Which group shares responsibility with AWS for security and compliance of AWS accounts and resources?
question_zh: 哪個小組與 AWS 共同負責 AWS 帳戶和資源的安全性和合規性？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs an event history of which AWS resources the company has created. Which AWS service will provide this information?
question_zh: 一家公司需要一份該公司所建立的 AWS 資源的事件歷史記錄。哪項 AWS 服務將提供此資訊？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run relationship databases in the AWS Cloud. The company wants to use a managed service that will install the database and run regular software updates. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 AWS 雲端中運行關聯式資料庫。該公司希望使用託管服務來安裝資料庫並運行定期軟體更新。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: Which AWS service provides a fully managed graph database for highly connected datasets?
question_zh: 哪項 AWS 服務為高度連接的資料集提供完全託管的圖形資料庫？ 【選項】

question_en: A company's cloud environment includes Amazon EC2 instances and Application Load Balancers. The company wants to improve protections for its cloud resources against DDoS attacks. The company also wants to have real-time visibility into any DDoS attacks. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 該公司的雲端環境包括 Amazon EC2 執行個體和應用程式負載平衡器。該公司希望加強其雲端資源抵禦 DDoS 攻擊的保護。該公司還希望即時了解任何 DDoS 攻擊。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to update its online data processing application by implementing container-based services that run for 4 hours at a time. The company does not want to provision or manage server instances. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過實施一次運行 4 小時的基於容器的服務來更新其線上資料處理應用程式。該公司不想配置或管理伺服器實例。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service enables users to create copies of resources across AWS Regions?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務允許使用者跨 AWS 區域建立資源副本？ 【選項】

question_en: Which task is the responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Apply guest operating system patches to Amazon EC2 instances.
A.zh: 將客戶作業系統修補程式套用到 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Provide monitoring of human resources information management (HRIM) systems.
B.zh: 提供人力資源資訊管理（ HRIM ）系統的監控。

C.en: Perform automated backups of Amazon RDS instances.
C.zh: 執行 Amazon RDS 執行個體的自動備份。

D.en: Optimize the costs of running AWS services.
D.zh: 優化運行 AWS 服務的成本。

question_en: A user needs to perform a one-time backup of an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that is attached to an Amazon EC2 instance. What is the MOST operationally efficient way to perform this backup?
question_zh: 使用者需要對附加到 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區執行一次性備份。執行此備份的最有效的方法是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Attach another EBS volume to the EC2 instance, and copy the contents.
A.zh: 將另一個 EBS 磁碟區附加到 EC2 實例，並複製內容。

B.en: Copy the EBS volume to a server that is running outside AWS and is connected with AWS Direct Connect.
B.zh: 將 EBS 磁碟區複製到在 AWS 外部運作並透過 AWS Direct Connect 連線的伺服器。

C.en: Create an EBS snapshot of the volume.
C.zh: 建立磁碟區的 EBS 快照。

D.en: Create a custom script to copy the EBS file contents to Amazon S3.
D.zh: 建立自訂腳本以將 EBS 檔案內容複製到 Amazon S3 。

question_en: A developer who has no AWS Cloud experience wants to use AWS technology to build a web application. Which AWS service should the developer use to start building the application?
question_zh: 沒有 AWS 雲端經驗的開發人員想要使用 AWS 技術建立 Web 應用程式。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來開始建立應用程式？ 【選項】

D.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: A company wants to manage access and permissions for its third-party software as a service (SaaS) applications. The company wants to use a portal where end users can access assigned AWS accounts and AWS Cloud applications. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望管理其第三方軟體即服務 (SaaS) 應用程式的存取和權限。該公司希望使用一個門戶，讓最終用戶可以存取分配的 AWS 帳戶和 AWS 雲端應用程式。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.zh: AWS IAM 身分中心 (AWS 單一登入 )

D.en: AWS Directory Service for Microsoft Active Directory
D.zh: 適用於 Microsoft Active Directory 的 AWS Directory Service

question_en: Which AWS service is designed for users running workloads that include a NoSQL database?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務是為執行包含 NoSQL 資料庫的工作負載的使用者設計的？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a website on AWS. The company wants to deliver the website to a worldwide audience and provide low-latency response times for global users. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

question_en: A company wants to add a conversational chatbot to its website. Which AWS service can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想在網站上新增一個對話聊天機器人。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or feature can be used to monitor for potential disk write spikes on a system that is running on Amazon EC2?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或功能可用於監控在 Amazon EC2 上執行的系統上的潛在磁碟寫入峰值？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has applications that control on-premises factory equipment. Which AWS service should the company use to run these applications with the LEAST latency?
question_zh: 一家公司擁有控制內部工廠設備的應用程式。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來以最小的延遲運行這些應用程式？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspective focuses on organizing an inventory of data products in a data catalog?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 視角著重於組織資料目錄中的資料產品清單？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs its production workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to choose one of the AWS Support Plans. Which of the AWS Support Plans will meet these requirements at the LOWEST cost?
question_zh: 一家公司在 AWS 雲端中運行其生產工作負載。該公司需要選擇其中一個 AWS 支援計劃。哪一個 AWS 支援計畫能夠以最低的成本滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: What is the primary use case for Amazon GuardDuty? Amazon GuardDuty
question_zh: 的主要用例是什麼？ 【選項】

B.zh: 防範 SQL 注入攻擊

C.en: Automatic monitoring for threats to AWS workloads
C.zh: 自動監控 AWS 工作負載面臨的威脅

D.zh: 自動配置 AWS 資源

question_en: Which VPC component can a company use to set up a virtual firewall at the Amazon EC2 instance level?
question_zh: 公司可以使用哪個 VPC 元件在 Amazon EC2 執行個體層級設定虛擬防火牆？ 【選項】

question_en: A developer needs to interact with AWS by using the AWS CLI. Which security feature or AWS service must be provisioned in the developer's account to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 開發人員需要使用 AWS CLI 與 AWS 進行互動。必須在開發人員帳戶中設定哪項安全功能或 AWS 服務才能滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A food delivery company needs to block users in certain countries from accessing its website. Which AWS service should the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家食品配送公司需要阻止某些國家的用戶訪問其網站。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to use Amazon S3 to store audio files that are each 5 megabytes in size. The company will rarely access the files, but the company must be able to retrieve the files immediately. Which S3 storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司需要使用 Amazon S3 儲存每個大小為 5 MB 的音訊檔案。公司很少會存取這些文件，但公司必須能夠立即檢索這些文件。哪一種 S3 儲存類別能夠最經濟有效率地滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: S3 標準 - 不頻繁訪問（ S3 標準 -IA ）

question_en: A company wants to set up a secure network connection from on premises to the AWS Cloud within 1 week. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在一周內建立從本地到 AWS 雲端的安全網路連線。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: What is a customer responsibility under the AWS shared responsibility model when using AWS Lambda?
question_zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 時， AWS 共享責任模型下的客戶責任是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: Maintenance of the underlying Lambda hardware.
A.zh: 底層 Lambda 硬體的維護。

B.en: Maintenance of the Lambda networking infrastructure.
B.zh: Lambda 網路基礎架構的維護。

C.en: The code and libraries that run in the Lambda functions.
C.zh: Lambda 函數中執行的程式碼和函式庫。

question_en: Which tasks are the responsibility of AWS according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些任務是 AWS 的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Configure AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM).
A.zh: 配置 AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM) 。

B.en: Configure security groups on Amazon EC2 instances.
B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上設定安全性群組。

C.en: Secure the access of physical AWS facilities.
C.zh: 確保實體 AWS 設施的存取安全。

D.en: Patch applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances.
D.zh: 修補在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式。

E.zh: 執行基礎設施修補和維護。

question_en: A company's compliance officer wants to review the AWS Service Organization Control (SOC) reports. Which AWS service or feature should the compliance officer use to complete this task?
question_zh: 一家公司的合規官想要審查 AWS 服務組織控制 (SOC) 報告。合規官應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來完成此任務？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a compliance requirement to record and evaluate configuration changes, as well as perform remediation actions on AWS resources. Which AWS service should the company use?
question_zh: 一家公司有合規性要求，需要記錄和評估配置更改，以及對 AWS 資源執行補救措施。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務？ 【選項】

question_en: A company plans to perform a one-time migration of a large dataset with millions of files from its on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service should the company use for the migration?

A.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

D.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: Which AWS network services or features allow CIDR block notation when providing an IP address range? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 網路服務或功能在提供 IP 位址範圍時允許使用 CIDR 區塊表示法？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

C.zh: 網路存取控制清單（網路 ACL ）

E.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company wants to develop an accessibility application that will convert text into audible speech. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要開發一款能夠將文字轉換為可聽語音的輔助應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to set up dedicated network connectivity between its on-premises data center and the AWS Cloud. The network cannot use the public internet. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在其本地資料中心和 AWS 雲端之間建立專用網路連線。此網路無法使用公共互聯網。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to use dashboards and charts to analyze insights from business data. Which AWS service will provide the dashboards and charts for these insights?
question_zh: 公司需要使用儀表板和圖表來分析業務數據的見解。哪項 AWS 服務將提供這些見解的儀表板和圖表？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises infrastructure to the AWS Cloud. Which advantage of cloud computing will help the company reduce upfront costs?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其本地基礎設施遷移到 AWS 雲端。雲端運算的哪些優勢可以幫助公司降低前期成本？ 【選項】

C.en: Benefit from massive economies of scale

D.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense
D.zh: 用固定費用代替變動費用

question_en: A company is designing workloads in the AWS Cloud. The company wants the workloads to perform their intended function correctly and consistently throughout their lifecycle. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this goal represent?
question_zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 雲端中設計工作負載。公司希望工作負載在整個生命週期中能夠正確、 一致地執行其預期功能。此目標代表 AWS 完善架構框架的哪個支柱？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is used to temporarily provide federated security credentials to access AWS resources?
question_zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務用於臨時提供聯合安全憑證來存取 AWS 資源？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 簡單令牌服務 (AWS STS)

question_en: What is a benefit of using an Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) load balancer with applications running in the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 在 AWS 雲端中運行的應用程式使用 Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) 負載平衡器有什麼好處？ 【選項】

A.en: An ELB will automatically scale resources to meet capacity needs.
A.zh: ELB 將自動擴展資源以滿足容量需求。

B.en: An ELB can balance traffic across multiple compute resources.
B.zh: ELB 可以平衡多個運算資源之間的流量。

C.en: An ELB can span multiple AWS Regions.
C.zh: ELB 可以跨越多個 AWS 區域。

D.en: An ELB can balance traffic between multiple internet gateways.
D.zh: ELB 可以平衡多個網際網路閘道之間的流量。

question_en: A company needs to convert video files and audio files to a format that will play on smartphones. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要將視訊檔案和音訊檔案轉換為可以在智慧型手機上播放的格式。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to securely store Amazon RDS database credentials and automatically rotate user passwords periodically. Which AWS service or capability will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望安全地儲存 Amazon RDS 資料庫憑證並定期自動輪換用戶密碼。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS Systems Manager 參數存儲

question_en: A company needs to have the ability to set up infrastructure for new applications in minutes. Which advantage of cloud computing will help the company meet this requirement?
question_zh: 公司需要有能力在幾分鐘內為新應用程式建立基礎設施。雲端運算的哪些優勢能幫助公司滿足這項要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense
A.zh: 用固定費用代替變動費用

question_en: A company needs a managed NFS file system that the company can use with its AWS compute resources. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要一個託管的 NFS 檔案系統，以便公司可以與其 AWS 運算資源一起使用。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

B.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 磁帶網關

C.zh: Amazon S3 Glacier 彈性檢索

question_en: A company plans to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to gather information about its on-premises data center. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望收集有關其內部數據中心的資訊。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

D.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: Which tasks are responsibilities of the customer, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，哪些任務是客戶的責任？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: Encrypt data and maintain data integrity.
B.zh: 加密資料並維護資料完整性。

C.en: Patch the Amazon RDS operating system.
C.zh: 修補 Amazon RDS 作業系統。

D.en: Maintain identity and access management controls.
D.zh: 維護身分和存取管理控制。

question_en: An online retail company wants to migrate its on-premises workload to AWS. The company needs to automatically handle a seasonal workload increase in a cost-effective manner. Which AWS Cloud features will help the company meet this requirement? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家線上零售公司希望將其本地工作負載遷移到 AWS 。公司需要以經濟高效的方式自動處理季節性工作量增加。哪些 AWS 雲端功能將幫助公司滿足這項要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

C.zh: 內建 AWS CloudTrail 稽核功能

question_en: A developer needs to use a standardized template to create copies of a company's AWS architecture for development, test, and production environments. Which AWS service should the developer use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 開發人員需要使用標準化範本來建立公司 AWS 架構的副本，用於開發、 測試和生產環境。開發人員應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can create a private network connection from on premises to the AWS Cloud?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以建立從本地到 AWS 雲端的私有網路連線？ 【選項】

question_en: Under the AWS shared responsibility model, which of the following is a responsibility of the customer?
question_zh: 在 AWS 共享責任模型下，下列何者是客戶的責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Shred disk drives before they leave a data center.
A.zh: 在磁碟機離開資料中心之前將其粉碎。

B.en: Prevent customers from gathering packets or collecting traffic at the hypervisor level.
B.zh: 防止客戶在虛擬機器管理程式層級收集資料包或收集流量。

C.en: Patch the guest operating system with the latest security patches.
C.zh: 使用最新的安全性修補程式來修補客戶作業系統。

D.en: Maintain security systems that provide physical monitoring of data centers.
D.zh: 維護提供資料中心物理監控的安全系統。

question_en: Which AWS service uses speech-to-text conversion to help users create meeting notes?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務使用語音到文字轉換來幫助使用者建立會議記錄？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool provides users with a graphical interface that they can use to manage AWS services?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具為使用者提供了可用於管理 AWS 服務的圖形介面？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has a workload that will run continuously for 1 year. The workload cannot tolerate service interruptions. Which Amazon EC2 purchasing option will be MOST cost-effective?
question_zh: 某公司有一個工作量將連續運作 1 年。工作量不能容忍服務中斷。哪種 Amazon EC2 購買選項最具成本效益？ 【選項】

question_en: A company migrated its systems to the AWS Cloud. The systems are rightsized, and a security review did not reveal any issues. The company must ensure that additional developments, integrations, changes, and system usage growth do not jeopardize this optimized AWS infrastructure. Which AWS service should the company use to report ongoing optimization and security?
question_zh: 一家公司將其係統遷移到 AWS 雲端。系統規模合適，安全審查沒有發現任何問題。公司必須確保額外的開發、 整合、 變更和系統使用成長不會危及這個優化的 AWS 基礎架構。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來報告持續的最佳化和安全性？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service integrates with other AWS services to provide the ability to encrypt data at rest?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務與其他 AWS 服務整合以提供靜態資料加密能力？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 金鑰管理服務 (AWS KMS)

question_en: A company wants to track the monthly cost and usage of all Amazon EC2 instances in a specific AWS environment. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要追蹤特定 AWS 環境中所有 Amazon EC2 執行個體的每月成本和使用情況。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants the ability to automatically acquire resources as needed and release the resources when they are no longer needed. Which cloud concept describes this functionality?
question_zh: 公司希望能夠根據需要自動取得資源，並在不再需要資源時釋放資源。哪個雲概念描述了此功能？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants a cost-effective option when running its applications in an Amazon EC2 instance for short time periods. The applications can be interrupted. Which EC2 instance type will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 執行個體中短暫運行其應用程式時有一種經濟高效的選擇。應用程式可能會被中斷。哪種 EC2 執行個體類型可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has an AWS Business Support plan. The company needs to gain access to the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to help mitigate DDoS events. Which AWS service or resource must the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個 AWS 商業支援計劃。該公司需要獲得 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 的協助，以協助緩解 DDoS 事件。公司必須使用哪種 AWS 服務或資源來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool provides a visualization of historical AWS spending patterns and projections of future AWS costs?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以視覺化 AWS 歷史支出模式和未來 AWS 成本預測？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is migrating to the AWS Cloud instead of running its infrastructure on premises. Which of the following are advantages of this migration? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正在遷移到 AWS 雲，而不是在本地運行其基礎設施。下列哪些是這次遷移的優點？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Elimination of the need to perform security auditing

B.zh: 增強全球影響力和敏捷性

C.en: Ability to deploy globally in minutes
C.zh: 幾分鐘內即可實現全球部署

D.en: Elimination of the cost of IT staff members
D.zh: 消除 IT 員工成本

E.en: Redundancy by default for all compute services
E.zh: 所有計算服務預設冗餘

question_en: Which AWS service uses edge locations to cache content?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 服務使用邊緣位置來快取內容？ 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜簡單隊列服務 (Amazon SQS)

question_en: A company wants to securely access an Amazon S3 bucket from an Amazon EC2 instance without accessing the internet. What should the company use to accomplish this goal?
question_zh: 一家公司希望從 Amazon EC2 執行個體安全地存取 Amazon S3 儲存桶，而無需存取網際網路。公司應該用什麼來達成這個目標？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants an AWS service that can automate software deployment in Amazon EC2 instances and on-premises instances. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一種可以在 Amazon EC2 執行個體和本機執行個體中自動執行軟體部署的 AWS 服務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS services are serverless? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務是無伺服器的？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

B.en: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka
B.zh: 適用於 Apache Kafka 的 Amazon Managed Streaming

question_en: A company wants to continuously improve processes and procedures to deliver business value. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this goal represent?
question_zh: 公司希望不斷改進流程和程序以實現商業價值。此目標代表 AWS 完善架構框架的哪個支柱？ 【選項】

question_en: Which of the following is a customer responsibility according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 共享責任模型，下列哪一項是客戶責任？ 【選項】

A.en: Apply security patches for Amazon S3 infrastructure devices.
A.zh: 為 Amazon S3 基礎設施設備套用安全修補程式。

B.en: Provide physical security for AWS datacenters.
B.zh: 為 AWS 資料中心提供實體安全。

C.en: Install operating system updates on Lambda@Edge.
C.zh: 在 Lambda@Edge 上安裝作業系統更新。

D.en: Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for IAM user accounts.
D.zh: 為 IAM 使用者帳戶實施多因素身份驗證 (MFA) 。

question_en: Which AWS service should a company use to organize, characterize, and search large numbers of images?
question_zh: 公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來組織、 描述和搜尋大量影像？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service is always available free of charge to users?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務總是免費供用戶使用？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to run some of its workloads on premises to comply with regulatory guidelines. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to run workloads that are not required to be on premises. The company also wants to be able to use the same API calls for the on-premises workloads and the cloud workloads. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要在內部運作部分工作負載以遵守監管準則。該公司希望使用 AWS 雲端來運行不需要在本地運行的工作負載。該公司還希望能夠對內部工作負載和雲端工作負載使用相同的 API 呼叫。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: What is the recommended use case for Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances? Amazon EC2
question_zh: 隨選執行個體的建議使用案例是什麼？ 【選項】

A.en: A steady-state workload that requires a particular EC2 instance configuration for a long period of time
A.zh: 需要長期使用特定 EC2 執行個體配置的穩定狀態工作負載

B.en: A workload that can be interrupted for a project that requires the lowest possible cost
B.zh: 為了實現最低成本的項目，可以中斷的工作量

C.en: An unpredictable workload that does not require a long-term commitment
C.zh: 工作量無法預測，無需長期投入

D.en: A workload that is expected to run for longer than 1 year
D.zh: 預計運轉時間超過 1 年的工作負載

question_en: A company wants to use an AWS networking solution that can act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs and on-premises networks. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 網路解決方案，該解決方案可以充當多個 VPC 和本地網路之間的集中網關。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: 網關 VPC 終端節點

question_en: An administrator observed that multiple AWS resources were deleted yesterday. Which AWS service will help identify the cause and determine which user deleted the resources?
question_zh: 一位管理員發現昨天有多個 AWS 資源被刪除。哪項 AWS 服務將有助於識別原因並確定哪個使用者刪除了資源？ 【選項】

question_en: To assist companies with Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) compliance in the cloud, AWS provides:
question_zh: 為了幫助公司在雲端遵守支付卡產業資料安全標準 (PCI DSS) ， AWS 提供： 【選項】

A.en: physical Inspections of data centers by appointment.
A.zh: 透過預約的方式對資料中心進行實體檢查。

B.en: required PCI compliance certifications for any application running on AWS.
B.zh: 在 AWS 上運行的任何應用程式都需要 PCI 合規性認證。

C.en: an AWS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) report for specific AWS services.
C.zh: 針對特定 AWS 服務的 AWS 合規性證明 (AOC) 報告。

D.zh: 專業的 PCI 合規服務。

question_en: In which situations should a company create an IAM user instead of an IAM role?
question_zh: 在什麼情況下公司應該創建 IAM 使用者而不是 IAM 角色？ 【選項】

A.en: When an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances requires access to other AWS services
A.zh: 當在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式需要存取其他 AWS 服務時

B.en: When the company creates AWS access credentials for individuals
B.zh: 當公司為個人建立 AWS 存取憑證時

C.en: When the company creates an application that runs on a mobile phone that makes requests to AWS
C.zh: 當公司建立一個在手機上運行的應用程式並向 AWS 發出請求時

D.en: When the company needs to add users to IAM groups
D.zh: 當公司需要將使用者新增至 IAM 群組時

E.en: When users are authenticated in the corporate network and want to be able to use AWS without having to sign in a second time
E.zh: 當使用者在公司網路中進行身份驗證並希望能夠使用 AWS 而無需再次登入時

question_en: A company hosts a web application on AWS. The company has improved the availability of its application by provisioning multiple Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to distribute its traffic across the EC2 instances while providing a single point of contact to the web clients. Which AWS service can distribute the traffic to multiple EC2 instances as targets?
question_zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上託管一個 Web 應用程式。該公司透過配置多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體提高了其應用程式的可用性。該公司希望在 EC2 執行個體之間分配其流量，同時為 Web 客戶提供單一聯絡點。哪個 AWS 服務可以將流量分送到多個 EC2 執行個體作為目標？ 【選項】

question_en: What is the total volume of data that can be stored in Amazon S3? Amazon S3
question_zh: 中可以儲存的資料總量是多少？ 【選項】

question_en: Which design principle is related to the reliability pillar according to the AWS Well-Architected Framework?
question_zh: 根據 AWS 完善架構框架，哪一項設計原則與可靠性支柱有關？ 【選項】

question_en: A company stores data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which task is the responsibility of AWS?
question_zh: 一家公司將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。哪些任務是 AWS 負責的？ 【選項】

A.zh: 配置 S3 生命週期策略。

B.zh: 啟動 S3 版本控制。

C.zh: 配置 S3 儲存桶策略。

D.en: Protect the infrastructure that supports S3 storage.
D.zh: 保護支援 S3 儲存的基礎設施。

question_en: A company wants to transfer a virtual Windows Server 2022 that is currently running in its own data center to AWS. The company wants to automatically convert the existing server to run directly on AWS infrastructure instead of visualized hardware. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將目前在自己的資料中心運行的虛擬 Windows Server 2022 轉移到 AWS 。該公司希望將現有伺服器自動轉換為直接在 AWS 基礎架構上運行，而不是在視覺化硬體上運行。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

C.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

D.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: Which AWS service is a fully managed NoSQL database service?
question_zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務是完全託管的 NoSQL 資料庫服務？ 【選項】

question_en: A company deployed an application in multiple AWS Regions around the world. The company wants to improve the application’s performance and availability. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司在全球多個 AWS 區域部署了一款應用程式。該公司希望提高應用程式的效能和可用性。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises SQL Server database to the AWS Cloud. The company wants AWS to handle the day-to-day administration of the database. Which AWS service will meet the company's requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其本地 SQL Server 資料庫遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望 AWS 負責資料庫的日常管理。哪一種 AWS 服務能夠滿足公司的要求？ 【選項】

A.en: Amazon EC2 for Microsoft SQL Server
A.zh: 適用於 Microsoft SQL Server 的 Amazon EC2

question_en: A company needs stateless network filtering for its VPC. Which AWS service, tool, or feature will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司需要對其 VPC 進行無狀態網路過濾。哪些 AWS 服務、 工具或功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which option is an advantage of AWS Cloud computing that minimizes variable costs?
question_zh: 哪種選擇是 AWS 雲端運算的優勢，可以最大限度地降低變動成本？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate its server-based applications to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to determine the total cost of ownership for its compute resources that will be hosted on the AWS Cloud. Which combination of AWS services or tools will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司希望將其基於伺服器的應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望確定將在 AWS 雲端上託管的運算資源的總擁有成本。哪些 AWS 服務或工具組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

D.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

E.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: A company has data lakes designed for high performance computing (HPC) workloads. Which Amazon EC2 instance type should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司擁有專為高效能運算 (HPC) 工作負載設計的資料湖。公司應該使用哪種 Amazon EC2 執行個體類型來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which benefits does a company gain when the company moves from on-premises IT architecture to the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 當公司從本地 IT 架構遷移到 AWS 雲端時，公司可以獲得哪些好處？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Reduced or eliminated tasks for hardware troubleshooting, capacity planning, and procurement
A.zh: 減少或消除硬體故障排除、 容量規劃和採購任務

B.en: Elimination of the need for trained IT staff
B.zh: 無需訓練有素的 IT 人員

C.en: Automatic security configuration of all applications that are migrated to the cloud
C.zh: 所有遷移到雲端的應用程式的自動安全配置

D.en: Elimination of the need for disaster recovery planning

E.en: Faster deployment of new features and applications
E.zh: 更快地部署新功能和應用程式

question_en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司正在進行組織轉型，希望能夠更快地回應客戶的詢問和回饋。根據 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) ，公司應該執行哪項任務來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

A.en: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.
A.zh: 重新調整團隊以專注於產品和價值流。

B.en: Create new value propositions with new products and services.
B.zh: 透過新產品和服務創造新的價值主張。

C.en: Use agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve.
C.zh: 使用敏捷方法快速迭代和發展。

D.en: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.
D.zh: 使用新的數據和分析平台來創建可行的見解。

E.zh: 遷移和現代化遺留基礎設施。

question_en: A company that is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud is based in an isolated area that has limited internet connectivity. The company needs to perform local data processing on premises. The company needs a solution that can operate without a stable internet connection. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端的公司位於一個網路連線有限的偏遠地區。該公司需要在本地進行資料處理。該公司需要一種無需穩定互聯網連接即可運行的解決方案。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to build graph queries for real-time fraud pattern detection. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望建立圖形查詢以即時偵測詐欺模式。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company needs the ability to acquire resources when the resources are necessary. The company also needs the ability to release those resources when the resources are no longer necessary. Which architecture concept of the AWS Cloud meets these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司需要具備在需要資源時獲取資源的能力。當資源不再需要時，公司還需要釋放這些資源的能力。 AWS 雲端的哪一種架構理念符合這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to deploy a web application as a containerized application. The company wants to use a managed service that can automatically create container images from source code and deploy the containerized application. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將 Web 應用程式部署為容器化應用程式。該公司希望使用一種託管服務，可以從原始程式碼自動建立容器映像並部署容器化應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

question_en: A company has moved all its infrastructure to the AWS Cloud. To plan ahead for each quarter, the finance team wants to track the cost and usage data of all resources from previous months. The finance team wants to automatically generate reports that contains the data. Which AWS service or feature should the finance team use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司已將所有基礎設施遷移至 AWS 雲端。為了提前規劃每個季度，財務團隊希望追蹤前幾個月所有資源的成本和使用數據。財務團隊希望自動產生包含數據的報告。財務團隊應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) perspective focuses on real-time insights and answers questions about strategy?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 視角著重於即時洞察並回答有關策略的問題？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to migrate critical on-premises production systems to Amazon EC2 instances. The production instances will be used for at least 3 years. The company wants a pricing option that will minimize cost. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望將關鍵的本地生產系統遷移到 Amazon EC2 執行個體。生產實例將使用至少 3 年。該公司希望找到一種可以最大限度降低成本的定價方案。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS Well-Architected Framework concept represents a system's ability to remain functional when the system encounters operational problems?
question_zh: 哪個 AWS 完善架構框架概念代表系統在遇到操作問題時保持正常運作的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework focuses on the ability to recover automatically from service interruptions? AWS
question_zh: 完善架構框架的哪個支柱著重於從服務中斷中自動復原的能力？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has multiple SQL-based databases located in a data center. The company needs to migrate all database servers to the AWS Cloud to reduce the cost of operating physical servers. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?
question_zh: 一家公司在資料中心有多個基於 SQL 的資料庫。該公司需要將所有資料庫伺服器遷移到 AWS 雲，以降低營運實體伺服器的成本。哪種 AWS 服務或資源能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to build, train, and deploy machine learning (ML) models. Which AWS service can the company use to meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司想要建置、 訓練和部署機器學習 (ML) 模型。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service or tool provides recommendations to help users get rightsized Amazon EC2 instances based on historical workload usage data?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以根據歷史工作負載使用資料提供建議來幫助使用者取得適當大小的 Amazon EC2 執行個體？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to explore and analyze data in Amazon S3 by using a programming language. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望使用程式語言來探索和分析 Amazon S3 中的資料。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to run an application on Amazon EC2 instances without interruption. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上不間斷地執行應用程式。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠最經濟且有效率地滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants a fully managed service that centralizes and automates data protection across AWS services and hybrid workloads. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一種完全託管的服務，可以集中並自動化跨 AWS 服務和混合工作負載的資料保護。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company plans to migrate its application from on premises to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to gather usage and configuration data for the application components. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃將其應用程式從本地遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司需要收集應用程式元件的使用和配置資料。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

C.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

question_en: Which design principle aligns with performance efficiency pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework?
question_zh: 哪項設計原則與 AWS 完善架構框架的效能效率支柱一致？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to provide low latency to its users around the world. Which feature of the AWS Cloud meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望為其全球用戶提供低延遲服務。 AWS 雲端的哪些功能可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which type of workload should a company run on Amazon EC2 Spot Instances?
question_zh: 公司應該在 Amazon EC2 Spot 執行個體上執行哪種類型的工作負載？ 【選項】

A.en: A steady-state workload that requires a particular EC2 instance configuration for a long period of time
A.zh: 需要長期使用特定 EC2 執行個體配置的穩定狀態工作負載

B.en: A workload that can be interrupted and can control costs
B.zh: 可中斷並可控製成本的工作負載

C.en: A steady-state workload that does not require a long-term commitment
C.zh: 不需要長期投入的穩定狀態工作負載

D.en: A workload that cannot be interrupted and can control costs
D.zh: 無法中斷且可控製成本的工作負載

question_en: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company needs to receive a consolidated bill from AWS and must centrally manage security and compliance. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司有多個 AWS 帳戶。該公司需要收到來自 AWS 的合併帳單，並且必須集中管理安全性和合規性。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: For which use case are Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances MOST cost-effective?
question_zh: 對於哪種用例來說， Amazon EC2 按需執行個體最具成本效益？ 【選項】

A.en: Compute-intensive video transcoding that can be restarted if necessary
A.zh: 計算密集型視訊轉碼，必要時可重新啟動

B.en: An instance in continual use for 1 month to conduct quality assurance tests
B.zh: 連續使用一個月進行品質保證測試的實例

C.en: An instance that runs a web server that will run for 1 year
C.zh: 運行 Web 伺服器的實例將運行 1 年

D.en: An instance that runs a database that will run for 3 years
D.zh: 運行資料庫的執行個體將運行 3 年

question_en: A company has developed a new In-house application. The company does not have a way to determine or predict the usage demand that the application will create. Which AWS Cloud computing benefit is the company seeking?
question_zh: 一家公司開發了一款新的內部應用程式。公司無法確定或預測該應用程式將產生的使用需求。公司正在尋求哪種 AWS 雲端運算優勢？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS offering can analyze a company’s AWS environment to discover security vulnerabilities on Amazon EC2 instances?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 產品可以分析公司的 AWS 環境以發現 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的安全漏洞？ 【選項】

question_en: A company plans to onboard new employees that will be working remotely. The company needs to set up Windows virtual desktops to create a working environment for the new employees. The employees must be able access the working environment from anywhere and by using their computer or a web browser. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃招募遠距辦公的新員工。公司需要設定 Windows 虛擬桌面，為新員工創造工作環境。員工必須能夠從任何地方使用他們的電腦或網頁瀏覽器存取工作環境。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to visualize and manage AWS Cloud costs and usage for a specific period of time. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望視覺化和管理特定時間內的 AWS 雲端成本和使用情況。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service supports MySQL database engines?
question_zh: 哪些 AWS 服務支援 MySQL 資料庫引擎？ 【選項】

question_en: A company purchased Amazon EC2 Standard Reserved Instances (RIs) for a workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to move part of the workload to an instance family that does not match the instance family of these Standard RIs. How can the company take advantage of the Standard RIs that it no longer needs?
question_zh: 一家公司為 AWS 雲端中的工作負載購買了 Amazon EC2 標準預留執行個體 (RI) 。該公司需要將部分工作負載轉移到與這些標準 RI 的實例係列不符的實例係列上。公司如何利用不再需要的標準 RI ？ 【選項】

A.en: Contact the AWS Support team, and ask the team to sell the Standard RIs
A.zh: 聯絡 AWS Support 團隊，並要求團隊銷售標準 RI

B.en: Sell the Standard RIs on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace
B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 預留執行個體市場上銷售標準 RI

C.en: Sell the Standard RIs as a third-party seller on the AWS Marketplace
C.zh: 在 AWS Marketplace 上作為第三方賣家銷售標準 RI

D.en: Convert the Standard RIs to Savings Plans
D.zh: 將標準 RI 轉換為儲蓄計劃

question_en: A company is releasing a business-critical application. Before the release, the company needs strategic planning assistance from AWS. During the release, the company needs AWS infrastructure event management and real-time support. What should the company do to meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正在發布一款關鍵業務應用程式。在發布之前，該公司需要 AWS 的策略規劃協助。在發布期間，該公司需要 AWS 基礎設施事件管理和即時支援。公司該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

B.zh: 聯絡 AWS 合作夥伴網路 (APN)

C.en: Sign up for AWS Enterprise Support
C.zh: 註冊 AWS 企業支援

D.zh: 聯絡 AWS 專業服務

question_en: A company wants to improve employee productivity by providing a way for employees to search for questions and retrieve specific answers. The company wants to use a single intelligent search interface. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望透過為員工提供一種搜尋問題和檢索具體答案的方式來提高員工的工作效率。該公司希望使用單一的智慧搜尋介面。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants an Amazon S3 solution that provides access to object storage within single-digit milliseconds. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要一個可以在個位數毫秒內提供對物件儲存存取的 Amazon S3 解決方案。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company runs an uninterruptible Amazon EC2 workload on AWS 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The company will require the same instance family and instance type to run the workload for the next 12 months. Which combination of purchasing options should the company choose to MOST optimize costs? (Choose two.)
question_zh: 一家公司每週 7 天、 每天 24 小時在 AWS 上運作不間斷的 Amazon EC2 工作負載。該公司將需要相同的實例係列和實例類型來運行未來 12 個月的工作負載。公司應該選擇哪種採購選項組合來最大程度地優化成本？ （選兩個。） 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run its application's code without having to provision and manage servers. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_zh: 一家公司希望運行其應用程式的程式碼，而不必配置和管理伺服器。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to understand the existing on-premises usage and configuration. The company does not want to replicate its workloads to AWS, yet. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司需要了解現有的內部使用情況和配置。該公司還不想將其工作負載複製到 AWS 。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務

B.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

question_en: A company wants to allow its employees to work remotely from home. The company's employees use Windows or Linux desktops. The company's employees need access from anywhere and at anytime by using any supported devices. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望允許員工在家遠距工作。該公司的員工使用 Windows 或 Linux 桌面。公司的員工需要使用任何受支援的設備隨時隨地進行存取。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to test a new application. Which AWS principle will help the company test the application?
question_zh: 一家公司想要測試一個新應用程式。哪項 AWS 原則將幫助公司測試應用程式？ 【選項】

A.en: Make long-term commitments in exchange for a cost discount.
A.zh: 做出長期承諾以換取成本折扣。

B.en: Scale up and down when needed without any long-term commitments.
B.zh: 可根據需要擴大或縮小規模，無需任何長期承諾。

C.en: Have total control over the application infrastructure.
C.zh: 完全控制應用程式基礎設施。

D.en: Manage all of the maintenance tasks associated with the cloud.
D.zh: 管理與雲端相關的所有維護任務。

question_en: A company plans to launch an ecommerce website that contains many images for a product catalog. The company wants to keep the cost of running the website within a specific budget. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to monitor the ongoing costs of the website?
question_zh: 一家公司計劃推出一個包含許多產品目錄圖片的電子商務網站。該公司希望將網站營運成本控制在特定預算之內。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來監控網站的持續成本？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has deployed several public applications behind Application Load Balancers. The company wants to improve the performance of the applications. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司在應用程式負載平衡器後面部署了幾個公共應用程式。該公司希望提高應用程式的效能。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company has an on-premises application. The application has processing times of less than 5 minutes and is invoked only a few times each day. The company wants to move the application to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service will support this application MOST cost-effectively?
question_zh: 一家公司有一個內部部署應用程式。該應用程式的處理時間不到 5 分鐘，並且每天僅調用幾次。該公司希望將應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。哪種 AWS 服務能夠最經濟高效地支援此應用程式？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜彈性容器服務 (Amazon ECS)

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

question_en: A company is learning about the perspectives of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF). Which perspective of the AWS CAF addresses the strategy management capability?
question_zh: 一家公司正在了解 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 的觀點。 AWS CAF 的哪個視角涉及策略管理能力？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to consolidate its call centers to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望整合其呼叫中心，以改善客戶與呼叫中心代理的語音和聊天體驗。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

A.zh: 亞馬遜簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)

question_en: A company needs to provision uninterruptible Amazon EC2 instances, when needed, and pay for compute capacity by the second. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 公司需要在需要時提供不間斷的 Amazon EC2 實例，並按秒支付運算容量費用。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項可以滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can migrate Amazon EC2 instances from one AWS Region to another?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以將 Amazon EC2 執行個體從一個 AWS 區域移轉到另一個 AWS 區域？ 【選項】

A.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務

B.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)

question_en: A company needs to block SQL injection attacks. Which AWS service or feature provides this functionality?
question_zh: 一家公司需要阻止 SQL 注入攻擊。哪個 AWS 服務或功能提供此功能？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to run its application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to keep the application on-premises to meet a compliance requirement. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行其應用程式。公司需要將應用程式保留在本地以滿足合規性要求。哪種 AWS 產品能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to connect its supported AWS services and VPCs. The company does not want to expose its internal traffic to the public internet. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要連接其支援的 AWS 服務和 VPC 。該公司不想將其內部流量暴露到公共互聯網上。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: Which AWS service can manage permissions for AWS resources by using policies?
question_zh: 哪種 AWS 服務可以使用政策管理 AWS 資源的權限？ 【選項】

question_en: A company needs to run some of its workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to keep some of the workload in its own on-site data center due to compliance reasons. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司需要在 AWS 雲端中運行部分工作負載。由於合規原因，該公司需要將部分工作負載保留在自己的現場資料中心。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

question_en: A company wants to deploy an application that stores data in a relational database. The company wants database tasks, such as automated backups and database snapshots, to be managed by AWS. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_zh: 一家公司想要部署一個將資料儲存在關聯式資料庫中的應用程式。該公司希望由 AWS 管理資料庫任務，例如自動備份和資料庫快照。哪種 AWS 服務能夠滿足這些要求？ 【選項】

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store （ Amazon EBS ）

question_en: A company that operates on-premises servers decides to start a new line of business. The company determines that additional servers are required for the new workloads. Which advantage of cloud computing can help the company to provision additional infrastructure as quickly as possible?
question_zh: 一家經營本地伺服器的公司決定開展新的業務。該公司確定需要額外的伺服器來應對新的工作負載。雲端運算的哪些優勢可以幫助公司盡快配置額外的基礎設施？ 【選項】

A.en: Benefit from massive economies of scale

C.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense
C.zh: 用固定費用代替變動費用
